name: Rick
line: Oh, boy, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Usually, walking down the courthouse steps is the easy part of the adventure.

name: Rick
line: What do you say, Morty?

name: Morty
line: I say give me a hand, sidekick.

name: NOTE
line: to make this easier an * will be put next to meeseeks every time a different meeseeks talks.

name: Jerry
line: Everybody shut up! Let me try! (Jerry swings and misses again) Damn it! Damn it! Damn it!

name: Beth
line: I'm going out.

name: Jerry
line: Wait. What?

name: Beth
line: Well, you're busy. I'm hungry. I thought I'd go out. Do you want me to be happy or do you want me to be in prison?

name: Jerry
line: Whoa, whoa, where in the hell is, I'll take you to dinner.

name: All the Meeseeks
line: AWWWWWWW!

name: Jerry
line: Hey, you know what? It's hard being me, too. I'll be right there. Look, I've got a marriage to keep together. At this point, my golf swing is more your problem than mine.

name: Meeseeks
line: I can't take it anymore. I just want to die!

name: Meeseeks *
line: We all want to die! We're Meeseeks! Why did you even rope me into this?

name: Meeseeks *
line: 'Cause he roped me into this!

name: Meeseeks *
line: Well, him over there, he roped me into this!

name: Meeseeks *
line: Well, he roped me into this!

name: Meeseeks *
line: Well, what about me? He roped me into this.

name: Meeseeks *
line: Well, that one over there roped me into this.

name: Meeseeks *
line: Well, he roped me into this.

name: Rick
line: Yeah, Morty, this is the part of the story everybody loves scaling down 650,000 oversized steps.

name: Morty
line: All right, okay, you know, if this was a story, this part wouldn't be included, stupid. (They see an opening in one of the steps) Hey, Rick, what do you know? Look down there. Looks like some kind of tavern or something built right into the side of the step.

name: Morty
line: Oh, wow, Rick. Now, this is more like it. Look, there's little staircase-shaped people in here. All kinds of crazy characters. This place is great, you know? It's whimsical and fun.

name: Rick
line: What are you looking at, motherfucker?

name: Morty
line: Easy, Rick.

name: Waitress
line: Pay them no mind. Those stair goblins can be moody. Now, what can I getcha? We've got skarlog poppies, flurlow, halzingers, bloogies, juicy time babies.

name: Rick
line: Yeah, yeah, yeah, how about some scotch whiskey? You got any of that around here? Or just a bunch of nonsense words?

name: Morty
line: Rick... We'll have two bloogies, please. And, uh, we were wondering, is there a faster way two heroes could get down these stairs?

name: Slippery
line: Y'all need to ride down the stairs? My name is slippely-slippery stair. I'll take you down there for 25 shmeckels.

name: Rick
line: 25 shmeckels? I don't know how much I don't know what that is. Is that a lot? Is it a little?

name: Waitress
line: That's exactly how much I spent on my big fake boobies.

name: Mr. Booby Buyer
line: Hi, I'm Mr. Booby Buyer. I'll buy those boobies for 25 shmeckels.

name: Waitess
line: It's a tempting offer, but I'm gonna have to decline.

name: Mr. Booby Buyer
line: Rats! What a shame.

name: Rick
line: Morty, your adventure's in a spiral. For real, man, time to pull out.

name: Morty
line: You keep heckling my adventure, Rick! You know why?

name: Rick
line: Uh, because it's lame?

name: Morty
line: It's because you're petty! You know, how many times have I had to follow you into some nonsensical bull crap? I always roll with the punches, Rick. Why can't you? Look, I got to take a leak, and when I come back, if you haven't learned how to lighten up, don't be here!

name: Rick
line: Whatever.

name: Meeseeks
line: It's become clear-look at me- that if we concentrate all our efforts on Jerry's follow-through, we will solve this problem. I'm Mr. Meeseeks.

name: Meeseeks *
line: I'm Mr. Meeseeks. Look at me. The only thing that's clear is that choking up is the one true solution.

name: Meeseeks 3
line: Look at me. I'm Mr. Meeseeks. I've been trying to help Jerry for two days, an eternity in Meeseeks time, and nothing's worked. I fear the worst.

name: Meeseeks
line: Your failures are your own, old man. I'm Mr. Meeseeks! Look at me. I say follow-through! Who's with me?! Follow-through!

name: New Meeseeks
line: I'm Mr. Meeseeks! Look at me!

name: Meeseeks
line: Kill him!

name: New Meeseeks
line: Hisssss! (He attacks another meeseeks)

name: Mr. Jelly Bean
line: How are you today? I'm Mr. Jelly Bean!

name: Morty
line: Hi, Mr. Jelly Bean. I'm Morty. My grandpa and I are on an adventure.

name: Mr. Jelly Bean
line: Nice. Is it a fun adventure?

name: Morty
line: I hope so. But I'm starting to get nervous that maybe it's gone a little too far off the rails.

name: Mr. Jelly Bean
line: Well, isn't that what adventures do?

name: Morty
line: Hey, you know what? You're right. Everything's going fine. I just got to relax and go with the flow.

name: Mr. Jelly Bean
line: Yeah. (He rubs Morty's sholders)

name: Morty
line: Okay. Uh. B-bye.

name: Mr. Jelly Bean
line: Uhh, no, stay. Go with the flow!

name: Morty
line: Stop. You're making me really uncomfortable.

name: Mr. Jelly Bean (aggresive)
line: Stop fighting me! Just let this happen!

name: Morty
line: Get off of me!

name: Rick
line: ♪ Sweet home Alabama. Wooooo! ♪

name: Morty
line: Whoo! No! Stop! Please!

name: Mr. Jelly Bean
line: Stop being such a fucking tease, you sweet little twat!

name: Morty
line: No! No!

name: Meeseeks
line: Everybody sto-o-o-p! Look at me! My brothers, nothing will be accomplished by shedding Meeseeks blood. None of us can die until our job is done.

name: Meeseeks *
line: The job can't be done! We'll never get two strokes off his game!

name: Meeseeks
line: No, we won't. But we will get all strokes off his game.

name: All other Meeseeks
line: Where's he going with this? What does he mean?

name: Meeseeks
line: When we kill him!

name: Beth
line: Jerry, maybe it's time I take that trip I always talk about.

name: Jerry
line: Where would you go?

name: Beth
line: I don't know, man. Italy. Greece. Argentina.

name: Jerry
line: Countries known for their sexually aggressive men. Did I tell you how much I love your new haircut?

name: Jerry
line: What the heck?

name: Meeseeks
line: There he is!

name: Beth
line: Run, Jerry!

name: Meeseeks
line: Come on out, Jerry!

name: Jerry
line: Guys, I'll choke up. I'll follow through. I'll do whatever you tell me to do, okay?

name: Meeseeks
line: Oh, we're well past that, Jerry.

name: Card Player
line: Come on, Rick, quit stalling. What do ya got?

name: Rick
line: Read 'em and weep, fellas! (Morty comes back) Oh, hey, Morty. Listen, I'm really sorry about all that stuff I said earlier about your adventure. I'm havin' a good time, Morty. It's not so bad.

name: Morty (very stressed)
line: Let's just go home, okay? I'm calling it. The adventure's over.

name: Rick
line: We can't leave now, Morty. I'm on fire!

name: Morty
line: Look, I want to leave now. You win the bet, okay? (Searches Rick's lab coat for the portal gun) Just give me the portal gun and let's go, please!

name: Morty
line: Please, I just want to... go h-home. (Tears up and holds onto Rick)

name: Rick
line: Okay. Listen, Morty. I just won a bunch of shmeckels. Why don't we use 25 of them to pay slippery stair here for a ride back to the village, and then we'll give the rest of the shmeckels to the villagers, huh?

name: Morty
line: Really?

name: Rick
line: Sure, Morty. Yeah. You know, a good adventure needs a good ending.

name: Slippery
line: Buckle up! (He starts to take them down)

name: Meeseeks (presumably 3)
line: Meeseeks are not born into this world fumbling for meaning, Jerry! We are created to serve a singular purpose for which we will go to any lengths to fulfill! Existence is pain to a Meeseeks, Jerry. And we will do anything to alleviate that pain. Just ask... (Meeseeks grabs a woman) ...what's your name, ma'am?

name: Woman
line: Samantha. Please, mister! Give him what he wants!

name: Jerry
line: Innocent people are going to die because of me. Why am I so mediocre?

name: Beth
line: Jerry, turn around. Straighten your back. Bend your knees. Bend them. Square your shoulders. Take a deep breath. I love you.

name: Meeseeks (presumably 3)
line: I'm counting to three, Jerry.

name: All Meeseeks
line: Ooooohhh!

name: Samantha
line: What the fuck is going on?

name: All Meeseeks
line: He's got it! That's a lower handicap stro-o-ke!

name: Meeseeks
line: Excuse me. I'm a bit of a stickler Meeseeks. What about your short game?

name: Samantha (Crying)
line: Oh, my God, oh, my God! What about your short game?!

name: Meeseeks
line: Ooh, nice! (Stops existing)

name: Jerry (Kisses Beth)
line: I think we'll take our food to go.

name: Owner
line: No, you won't. The police are coming. You have so many questions to answer.

name: Jerry
line: Fair enough.

name: The First Villager
line: Thank you, kind sir. Our village is saved! You are both true heroes!

name: Rick
line: Good job, Morty. Looks like you won the bet.

name: Morty
line: Thanks, Rick, but I don't know if I should. You know, you were right about the universe. It's a crazy and chaotic place.

name: Rick
line: Well, you know, maybe that's why it could use a little cleaning up every now and then, you know. This one's wrapped up neat and clean because we did it Morty style.

name: The First Villager
line: Oh! Heroes, we would like to introduce you to our beloved king so that he may thank you personally.

name: Morty
line: Uh, no, I-it's cool. Rick. Portal. Hurry.

name: Jerry
line: So... You still thinking about taking that trip?

name: Beth
line: Jerry, look. We don't have a perfect marriage, but I'm not going anywhere. When we were in that freezer, I realized the Meeseeks are like the guys I went to high school with willing to say anything to 'complete their task.'

name: Jerry
line: Was I one of those guys?

name: Beth
line: The difference is you didn't disappear afterwards.

name: Jerry
line: Well... I got you pregnant.

name: Beth
line: Yeah...

name: Rick
line: What the hell happened to this place?

name: Beth
line: Uh, your Meeseeks box happened. They went crazy when they couldn't take two strokes off Jerry's golf game. He felt terrible.

name: Rick
line: Hey, it's not my fault that Jerry's an idiot.

name: Beth
line: Dad! Is there anything you can do to clean this place up?

name: Rick
line: Well, you know, I do have a Fleeseeks box.

name: Jerry
line: No. No more boxes.

name: Rick
line: What? It just has a mop and some floor wax in it. Wubba lubba dub dub! (Everyone laughs) Yeah! That's my new thing! I'm kind of like what's his name Arsenio. Isn't that it's what Arsenio used to say on his show. Wobble gobba lop bops! Right? See you next week, everybody.

name: Beth
line: I don't get it.

name: Villager 1
line: Sir, I think you're going to want to see this. We found it inside a lockbox inside king Jelly Bean's closet. (A box of pictures of many young boys Mr. Jelly Bean molested) We have to tell the people.

name: Villager 2
line: Wait. Destroy it. (They set the box on fire) Our people will get more from the idea he represented... than from the jelly bean he actually was.

name: Principal Vagina
line: (Over the intercom, while the students talk) Principal Vagina here, don't let the name fool you, I'm very much in charge, reminding you that tonight is our annual flu season dance. I don't know how many times I have to say this but if you have the flu, stay home, the flu season dance is about awareness, not celebration. You don't bring dead babies to Passover.

name: Grace Smith
line: (to Jessica) Hey.

name: Morty
line: Ohhh. Okay, here we go. *Walks over to Jessica and her friends* (Nervously) H-Hey, Jessica, ughh.

name: Jessica
line: What's up, Morty? *sneezes*

name: Morty
line: Ugghh-

name: Brad
line: *Butts in, in front of Jessica* What are you doing?

name: Morty
line: Ummm...

name: Brad
line: Wait, wait. Were you about to talk... to her?

name: Morty
line: Well, I mean, I was thinking about it.

name: Brad
line: Dude- (hand hits Morty's chest) stay in your league! Look at how hot she is! You don't see me going to a bigger school in a wealthier district and hittin' on their prettiest girl!

name: Jessica
line: (Sarcastically) Gee, thanks, Brad.

name: Brad
line: I throw balls far. You want good words, date a languager.

name: Jerry
line: Eh, Try not to worry about it, Morty. You're a good kid, and there's not a premium on that right now, but you'll be getting girls sometime after Brad's out of shape.

name: Morty
line: (Plays with a cookie in sadness) You're missing the point, Dad. I don't want girls, I want Jessica!

name: Jerry
line: Ahhh, well, (gets another jar of sauce out of the cupboard) I remember feeling that way about a young lady named your mom, and that's not an urban dis, your mom was my Jessica. I remember the first time I saw her, I thought...

name: Rick
line: (enters and interrupts Jerry) I should get her pregnant, then she'll have to marry me. (grabs a glass from a cupboard)

name: Jerry
line: I beg your pardon, Rick, INAPPROPRIATE. (points to Morty)

name: Rick
line: (grabs ice from out of the freezer)(sarcastically) Sorry, please proceed with your story about banging my daughter in high school. (gets juice out of the refrigerator) I'm not sure you want to take romantic advice from this guy, Morty, his marriage is hanging from a thread.

name: Jerry
line: (Angrily) My marriage is fine, thank you.

name: Rick
line: Jerry, it's your house, whatever you say it is is how it is, (pours juice into the glass) but I think a blind man could see that Beth is looking for the door. I barely have a reason to care and even I noticed.

name: Morty
line: Come on, Rick, don't talk about my parents like that.

name: Rick
line: Listen, Morty, I hate to break it to you, but what people call 'love' is a chemical reaction that compels animals to breed. It hits hard, Morty, then it slowly fades, leaving you stranded in a failing marriage. I did it, your parents are gonna do it. Break the cycle, Morty. Rise above. Focus on science. (exits room, drinking juice)

name: Morty
line: (In woe) Alright, well, I'm gonna go get dressed for the dance. (exits kitchen)

name: Jerry
line: Yeah, I'm just going to...check on your mom. (exits opposite direction)

name: Rick
line: (With his back to Morty) Morty, hand me that screwdriver, huh? *Morty closes door* I'm almost finished making my ionic defibulizer, Morty. It's gonna be great.

name: Morty
line: Hey, listen, Rick. You know how you said that, you know... love is a chemical and all that stuff from earlier? (walks to Rick at his desk) Well, I was thinkin', you know, www... could you make some sort of chemical thing happen inside of Jessica's mind, you know, so where she falls in love with me and all that sort of thing, you know, like maybe make some sort of love potion or something?

name: Rick
line: Morty, that's such a poor use of my time, it's beneath me. Hand me the screwdriver. (points to the shelf)

name: Morty
line: (Angrily) YOU KNOW WHAT, NO RICK! I'M NOT GONNA HAND YOU THE SCREWDRIVER! Uh, I'm never gonna hand you anything ever again, Rick. (Rick gets up and grabs a box of supplies from the shelf) I'm always helping you with this and that and the other thing. Www...what about me, Rick? Www... why can't you just help me out once, once, for once?

name: Rick
line: *sighs* You're growing up fast, Morty. You're growing into a real big thorn straight up into my ass! (grabs some test tubes with yellow liquid and holds one up) Listen, this is called oxytocin. I extracted it from a vole. You know what a VOLE is, Morty, you know what a vole is?

name: Rick
line: It's a, it's a rodent that mates for life, Morty. This is the chemical release in the mammal's brain, (sets down the box of objects, opens a hatch in a machine, and pours the oxytocin in) ...that makes it fall in love. Alright Morty, I just gotta *burps* combine it with some of your DNA.

name: Morty
line: Oh well, okay... (zips down his fly)

name: Rick
line: A hair, Morty, I need one of your hairs! This isn't Game Of Thrones. (plucks hair from Morty's head)

name: Morty
line: Oww!

name: Rick
line: (grabs the flask containing the orange liquid) Alright, Morty, whoever you smear this stuff on will fall in love with you, and only you, forever. Ya happy now, Morty?

name: Morty
line: Heck yeah! Thank you, Grandpa Rick! (walks to the door, but thinks about it and looks back) Hey there's no dangers or anything or side effects, right?

name: Rick
line: Www.. what am I, a hack?! Go nuts, Morty, it's full proof.

name: Rick
line: Huh, unless she has the flu. (shrugs it off)

name: Jerry
line: Beth, do you still love me?

name: Beth
line: *sighs* Want kinda question is that?

name: Jerry
line: The 'yes' or 'no' kind. *weak laugh of obviousness*

name: Beth
line: Jerry, do you want homeless people to have homes?

name: Jerry
line: Yes.

name: Beth
line: Are you gonna build them?

name: Jerry
line: No.

name: Beth
line: Then what good was the 'yes'?

name: Jerry
line: (walks to Beth at the computer)(confused) Wait, iii... is loving me the house or the homeless people?

name: Beth
line: (Turns around to Jerry)(Irritated) Loving you is work, Jerry, hard work, like building a homeless shelter. Nobody want to say 'no' to doing it, but some people put the work in. So what do ya say? Do you see me working here? Does this conversation seem tedious to me?

name: Jerry
line: Sort of.

name: Beth
line: But I obviously sort of love you, don't I? *alert on Beth's phone* So stop asking and maybe I'll love you more. (looks at her phone) Crap, They need me at the horse hospital.

name: Jerry
line: This late?

name: Beth
line: (puts on her jacket) The racetrack had a starlit derby, there's a seven horse collision, and Davin's there alone. (leaves the room, leaving Jerry alone)

name: Jerry
line: (In his head)(Progressively angrier) *Davin, Davin, Davin, Davin, Davin, Davin, Davin, Davin*

name: Band Vocalist / MC Haps
line: (Background) Flu. Yo, you gotta be aware. Aware about the flu, up in the air. Imma get me a shot and make the flu go away. Flu hatin' rappers just rappin' away. Yo. Yo. Flu hatin' rapper. It's a flu hatin' rap....This is about flu awareness. Gotta be aware of the flu in the airness. Yo, I'm a flu hatin' rapper. My name is MC Haaaaaaaaaaps- Haps Yeah, I'm MC Haps, I'm a flu hatin' rapper, yo......

name: Morty
line: Hey there, Jessica. (Pretends to trip, wiping the potion on Jessica's arm) Whooa-whoopsie!

name: Jessica
line: (infected) Omigod, Morty. You look REALLY nice tonight.

name: Morty
line: WOW, thanks!

name: Jessica
line: (infected) I love you, Morty. I love you so much it burns!

name: Morty
line: Oh man. I love you too, Jessica! (Brad walks passed with a drink, he overhears)

name: Brad
line: (outraged) *spits* Is this punk bothering you, Jessica?(shoves Morty)

name: Jessica
line: (Infected) LEAVE HIM ALONE, JERK! (pulls Morty away) I'M IN LOVE WITH HIM! HE'S MORE MAN THEN YOU WILL EVER BE! *sneezes*

name: Brad
line: (infected) Aw man, Morty, ugh, I'm really sorry.

name: Morty
line: Oh, well, no problem Brad.

name: Brad
line: (hugs Morty)(infected) There's somethin' special bout you, somethin' special. (squeezes Morty's butt and back)

name: Morty
line: (pushes Brad away) Whoa, take it easy!

name: Jessica
line: (grabs Morty's left arm)(infected) GET YOUR HANDS OFF OF HIM!

name: Brad
line: (grabs Morty's right arm)(infected) BACK OFF I'M TRYING TO BE WITH MY MAN!

name: Principal Vagina
line: (Stops the fight, pulling Brad back, aided with Mr. Goldenfold) That's enough Bradley. We don't want you injuring your ball-throwing arm.

name: Brad
line: (disappointment)(infected) Oh, Principal Vagina.

name: Jessica
line: (infected) Never leave me, Morty, NEVER.

name: Morty
line: (confused) Uh, sure. I mean, of course not. What do you think that was all about?

name: Jessica
line: (infected) Who cares? Just hold me.

name: Brad
line: (infected) LET ME GO!!! I LOVE YOU MORTY! *sneeze, sneeze* (exits the gym)

name: Jerry
line: (V.O.) She's gonna be alone with that guy all night.

name: Summer
line: Yeah, Dad, digging around the inside of horses. It's not a very romantic setting.

name: Rick
line: Well, Summer, there's always the possibility that she made the whole work thing up. Maybe Davin's digging around in her insides.

name: Summer
line: Grandpa, so gross! You're talking about my mom.

name: Rick
line: Well, she's my daughter, Summer. I outrank you. Or family means nothing, in which case don't play that card.

name: Jerry
line: She's not responding to my texts!

name: Summer
line: Careful, dad. Jealousy turns women off.

name: Jerry
line: Well, isn't that convenient?

name: Rick
line: Not for the men they cheat on, no.

name: Jerry
line: Okay, I'm... going to go out... for some ice cream. And maybe stop by the hospital... to support my wife... with my confidence.

name: Summer
line: God, grandpa, you're such a dick.

name: Rick
line: I'm sorry, Summer. Your opinion means very little to me. How come you're not at this stupid dance everyone loves so much?

name: Summer
line: Screw that. I don't want to get sick. It's flu season.

name: Rick
line: It is?

name: Summer
line: Yeah.

name: Rick
line: (Realizes Morty is in terrible danger) Uh-oh.

name: Morty
line: Please just let this work out.

name: Morty
line: Um... can we maybe go somewhere more private?

name: Morty
line: (Realizes what's happening) Oh, crap.

name: Rick
line: Morty, come on! We got to get you out of here. You're not gonna believe this because it usually never happens, but I made a mistake.

name: Morty
line: are you okay?

name: Morty
line: I'm fine!

name: Rick
line: I didn't realize when I gave you that serum that Jessica had the flu you know, t-t-t-t-t-t-t-that might have been valuable information for me, Morty.

name: Morty
line: What the hell is going on, Rick?

name: Rick
line: What does it look like?

name: Morty
line: Oh, crap.

name: Rick
line: It's gonna be fine, Morty, relax. I whipped up and antidote. It's based on praying-mantis DNA. You know, praying mantises are the exact opposite of voles, Morty. I mean, they they mate once, and then they, you know, decapitate the partner. I mean, it's a whole ritual. It's really gruesome and totally opposite. There's no love at all. I-i-i basically mixed this with a more contagious flu virus. It should neutralize the whole thing, Morty. It'll all be over very shortly.

name: Rick
line: Uh, by the way, Morty, I know you didn't ask or anything, but I'm not interested in having s*x with you. These serums, they don't work on anybody related to you genetically.

name: Rick
line: Okay, well, sometimes, science is more art than science, Morty. A lot of people don't get that.

name: Jerry
line: Nobody's killing me until after I catch my wife with another man.

name: Summer
line: Come on.

name: This just in
line: Morty Smith's whereabouts are still unknown.

name: Summer
line: What the hell?

name: Morty
line: Oh, my god, Rick. The whole world is infected!

name: Rick
line: Yeah, it's pretty wild how fast that spread. I've really outdone myself.

name: Morty
line: Outdone yourself?! W-w a-are are you kidding me, Rick? This is not okay! Not only do they all want to have s*x with me, but, you know, now they want to eat me afterwards!

name: Rick
line: Yeah, I don't know what I was thinking. Mantises are they opposite of voles? I mean, obviously, DNA's a little more complicated than that. You know what, though, Morty? This right here's gonna do the trick, baby. It's koala mixed with rattlesnake, chimpanzee, cactus, shark, golden retriever, and just a smidge of dinosaur. Should add up to normal humanity.

name: Morty
line: I don't that doesn't make any sense, Rick. How does that add up to normal humanity?

name: Rick
line: What, Morty, you want me to show you my math? I'm sorry a-are you the scientist or are you the kid that wanted to get laid?

name: Beth
line: Yes, it's satisfying work.

name: Beth
line: Hmm, uh, what are you doing?

name: Beth
line: Oh, ha, um, hey, I b I'd better get going.

name: Beth
line: What is it, Davin?

name: Beth
line: What?!

name: Beth
line: Let go of me, Davin!

name: Davin
line: (Mutates into a mantis creature) Take me to Morty.

name: Jerry
line: You're not Morty.

name: Jerry
line: (Turns on the lights, revealing that his clothes are now tattered and is armed with a crowbar) No. I'm Mr. Crowbar, and this is my friend, who is also a crowbar.

name: Davin
line: That's... stupid.

name: Jerry
line: Yeah? Well, look where being smart got you.

name: Beth
line: Jerry! Thank god!

name: Jerry
line: God? God's turning people into insect monsters, Beth. I'm the one beating them to death. Thank me.

name: Beth
line: Thank you, Jerry. Thank you.

name: Rick
line: Take a good look down there, Morty, and soak it in, because, you know, once I pull this lever, it's all back to normal.

name: Morty
line: Just do it already.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Crowd rick
line: Uh uh, not you!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (Crononberg)
line: Aaaaah!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Armed Rick 1
line: Nooo!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Armed Rick 2
line: Arrrrgh! Ahhhh!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Armed Rick 3
line: Aaaah!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Armed Ricks 4 and 5
line: Oof!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (Crononberg)
line: Oh! Oooh!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Pizza 1
line: Yeah, I’d like to order one large person with extra people please.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Pizza 2
line: White people. No no no no no, black people. And hispanic on half.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Phone 1
line: Yes, I’d like to order one large sofa chair with extra chair please.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Phone 2
line: High chair. No no no no no, recliner! And wheelchair on half.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Armed Rick 6
line: They could have gone into any one of these.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Armed Ricks
line: (Ugh, son of a-, aw geez, aw man, we lost him, etc. Ad lib)

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Sofa 1
line: Yeah, I’d like to order one large phone with extra phones please.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Sofa 2
line: Cellphone. No no no no no, rotary! And payphone on half.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: That’ll keep ‘em busy for a while.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Those guys were wrong, right? You don’t- you wouldn’t kill yourself... y-yourselves?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: ‘Course not, Morty! How could that profit me? Someone out there is killing Ricks, and the council ain’t gonna stop thinking it’s me until we clear our names.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: By finding the real Rick killer.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: I’m scared, Rick! Maybe we should go home and stockpile weapons like that show Doomsday Preppers.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Not really my style, Morty. Besides, your home is most likely swarming with Ricks right now.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Alright, listen, Jerry. If Rick calls, this device is going to trace his location. You just gotta keep ‘em on the phone for thirty seconds or longer.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Beth
line: Who wants lemonade?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Oh yeah! Mmm! Oh, delicious!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 2
line: Beth, you’re a treasure.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 3
line: I have a Beth just like you in my reality, except you know what? She’s not as brilliant or attractive!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Beth
line: Aww, thank you!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: All Ricks
line: Ohohoho! She did it! She did it!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Uh, hello?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick (phone)
line: Hey Jerry, it’s Rick.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Rick! Heyy. Haha, what’s- what’s up?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick (phone)
line: So listen, the heat’s on and there’s nowhere left to turn so Morty and I are just going to fly my spaceship into a black hole.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: What?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick (phone)
line: Is that cool with you, dog?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Rick, no! Mortyyyy!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 4
line: I got it! The call’s coming from... inside the house!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: All Ricks
line: (Look at his face! I can’t believe our daughter married you, too easy, etc. Ad lib)

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: The Ricks are probably gonna waste some time messing with Jerry. They won’t be able to help themselves. But as soon as they get bored they’ll be on to us.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Chair waiter
line: Phones á la clams, and phonesgetti with phoneballs. Anything else?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Yeah, more phonesticks please.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Phone waiter
line: Right away, sir.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: You know Rick, when I first saw all those Ricks and Mortys, I thought ‘gee, that kinda devalues our bond.’ But then I realised that just means that our relationship must be pretty special to span over all those different timelines.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Yeah, it’s gotta be that way. You’re a camouflage.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Camouflage? Wh-wh-what are you talking about, Rick?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Ricks have a very distinct and traceable brainwave due to our genius. The best way to hide from an enemy’s radar is to stand near someone with complementary brainwaves that make ours invisible. See, wh-wh-when a Rick is with a Morty, the genius waves get cancelled out by the uh, Morty waves.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Um... because... our personalities are so different?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Oh, shit dog! My portal gun was hacked remotely Morty, obviously by the real killer to frame me. But I was able to trace the signal. Come on, let’s go!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick (C-137)
line: Uh-oh!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: ‘Scuse me, we’ve tracked a pair of dangerous criminals to this exact location. They look exactly like us, so in order to avoid confusion I’m going to mark us each with a red X right now. That way if someone has a gun and we both tell you to shoot the other one because they’re the evil one, you’ll know who’s lying.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 2
line: Hey, check it out!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Dammit!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Chair waiter
line: Hey! You didn’t pay your bill!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: The red X! Red X.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Hey, it’s a good thing that space outlet had labcoats and your favourite kind of shirt in stock, huh Morty?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Yeah, Rick. I-I heard you the first time. You don’t have to keep saying it over and over and over.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Man, this place is wayyy off the grid. This guy does not wanna be found.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Well, if he’s a Rick, doesn’t he just have to stand by a Morty to hide? I mean, isn’t that what Mortys are? Human cloaking devices?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Morty, you’re making a bigger deal out of this than it is.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Oh my god, Rick, look! There’s a bunch of people strapped all over that building!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Not people, Morty. Mortys.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (C-137)
line: Oh my god... wh-why would somebody do this? It’s horrible!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Well, one Morty’s enough to hide from the bureaucrats. But you g- you get a whole matrix of Mortys and put ‘em in agonising pain. That creates a pattern that can hide even from other Ricks, motherfucker. I fiddled with a concept like this once.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: On paper, Morty, on paper! I wouldn’t do this, it’s barbaric overkill. I mean, you could accomplish the same result with like five Mortys and a jumper cable. Which I also wouldn’t do! I’m just saying, it’s bad craftsmanship.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Beth
line: Coffee time!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: All ricks
line: (Yeah! That’s what I like to hear! etc. Ad lib)

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Ugh.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Hi Jerry!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Leave me alone, I’m working!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Oh, you are? Wh-wh-what do you do?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Ugh. I’m- I’m in between advertising jobs.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Advertising? Wow! So, people need help figuring out what to buy and then y-you help them?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: W-well, it’s a little more complicated than that...

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Well, I mean, you do it, and you seem like a guy that really has it all together!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Dude, are you... wh- you’re being a dick, right?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Oh gosh, wh- I hope not! I-I-I-I wouldn’t want to offend you in any way!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: You’re really a Rick?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Ohoho! Y-of course I am! Just as much as my Morty’s a Morty!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Hey, he looks a lot like Eric Stoltz from the movie ‘Mask.’ You know, the one with Cher in it?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: That’s right, Jerry! He-he’s from a reality where everyone is Eric Stoltz mask people! He’s Eric Stoltz mask Morty! They assigned him to me because... I never had any kids of my own. But if I did, boy, I’d love ‘em if they were as smart and as successful as you are, Jerry.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Hey, get a load of this! Jerry’s hanging out with doofus Rick.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 2
line: Haha, this is perfect.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: I’m not doofus Rick! I’m Rick J-19-Zeta-7!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Oh, is that the timeline where everybody eats poop? Jerry, you know this guy eats poop, right?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Hey! I don’t eat poop! Y-you guys are always so mean to me!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: I guess it’s only fair to tell you now, Jerry... I’m the worst Rick of them all.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: According to who? Other versions of you? If I’ve learned one thing, it’s that before you get anywhere in life, you gotta stop listening to yourself.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Wow, you really are wise, Jerry. I-I guess that’s why you work in advertising!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: The fact that you feel that way makes you the best Rick of them all.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: You don’t care about me at all! I’m no different than that jacket you’ve got on! Y-y-or-or your stupid portal gun! I’m just a tool! I-I’m just an object!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Hey, it’s your choice to take it personally, Morty. Now for the love of god, be quiet! The point of this is to get the drop on the guy!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: You know what Rick, I’ll tell you something! I’m more than a human shield!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Yeah, that’s right! You are! You’re a perfect impenetrable suit of human armour, Morty! Because you’re as dumb as I am smart! Which is why when I say ‘shut up’ it’s really good advice.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Great, nice work, Morty.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Urrgh.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Ooh, look at you, C-137! You’re- aren’t you a tough customer?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: The slow clap? Really? Kinda played out, dude.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Not in this dimension it isn’t. In fact, hah, I invented it and nobody else has ever even done it here before.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Well lah-dee-dah.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Hey, that’s mine!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: I don’t like the look of that Rick, Morty. We gotta escape.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: I’m not gonna help you, Rick. Y-you’re a monster.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Don’t be Rickdiculous, Morty.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: W-will you stop saying that? It’s stupid.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Take his Morty away.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Morty
line: Come with me.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Yeah, gladly. Geez man, Ricks huh?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Hey man, you seem to know how this place works. Is there any way we can... shut down that grid and rescue all those Mortys outside?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Morty
line: It would be pointless. Mortys have no chance of defeating a Rick.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Morty
line: In here.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Ahh, isn’t it beautiful?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Yeah, yeah, looks like payday at Neverland ranch in here. Zing!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Lobster alien
line: Hehehehehehehehehe.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: That guy got it.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Ah-ah Rick, quiet. You’re missing my symphony.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Hey, I’ll take it over Mumford and Sons. Zip!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Lobster alien
line: Hehehehehehehehehe.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: This guy is on it!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: He’s not laughing at your dumb jokes, Rick. That’s just a random noise it makes every ten seconds.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Lobster alien
line: Hehehehehehehehehe.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Awww.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: See, Rick, you’re not as clever as you think you are. I wanted you to find me. We’re not so different, you and I.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Yeah, duh!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: See this right here, Rick? I crunched the numbers, I created a spectrum of all the Ricks. I listed ‘em out from most evil to least evil. Here’s where I am. And look at right here’s where you are, Rick. This guy right here? Super weird.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: I get it. So you want me to team up with you to take down the council of Ricks, right? Is that where you’re going with this? ‘Cause that’s where I’d be going.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Please. I think I’m doing pretty good on my own. I’m simply going to download the contents of your brain, and then kill you.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Okay, if we add a little more titanium nitrate, and just a tad of chlorified tartrate: ovenless brownies!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: It’s incredible what a gifted mind can accomplish when priorities are in order!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Well, come on, I can’t take all the credit, Jerry. It was your idea. C’mere Jerry!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Hey, uh. C’mere, uh. I-I wanna show you something.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Okay, look. Everybody makes fun of me for getting these, but... you’re a genius scientist, what do you think? There’s little R2D2s where the George Washingtons should be!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: You know Jerry, I’m not gonna tell you that these will increase in value, or even hold their current value. The truth is... you bought ‘em ‘cause you like ‘em. They have value to you. That’s what matters.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: (tearing up) How long are you staying?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Until we find your Rick.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: (hugging doofus Rick) I found mine. I found mine.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (C-137)
line: Help!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Religious Morty
line: There is no escape, my son. We will find our peace in the next world.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (C-137)
line: So what? Y-y-y-y-you’re just going to give up?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Religious Morty
line: We’re giving in to the power of the One True Morty. One day he will return!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: All religious Mortys
line: Praise the One True Morty!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (C-137)
line: Alright Mortys, listen up! My name is Morty Smith, from Earth dimension C-137! I know you’re scared, because I’m scared! But that’s no reason to accept our fate. We’re Mortys! We’re not defined by our relationships to Rick. Our destiny is our own!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty 1
line: This sounds like something the One True Morty might say. I’m sick of being a human shield! I-I-I-I wanna be a gardener!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty 2
line: I wanna write really crazy, intense action novels.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Hammer Morty
line: I’m more than just a hammer!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Religious Morty
line: He is the one true Morty! The one true Morty!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: All Mortys
line: Hooray!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Lobster alien
line: Hey, keep it down!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: All Mortys
line: Raaaaugh!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: You’ve lived quite a life, Rick. It’s a real shame you’re not gonna be around to see it through.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: You’re crying? Over a Morty?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: No, I’m just allergic to dipshits.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Ugh, pathetic. We both know that if there’s any truth in the universe, it’s that Ricks don’t care about Mortys.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Evil Rick
line: Do your worst, you little bastards! Kill me! Do it! Do it!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Morty! Get me out of this! Come on!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (C-137)
line: You’re lucky I’m not a Rick.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Point taken, but this is no time for arcs.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Yeah, hello?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick (C-137)
line: Hey, what do me and O.J. not have in common?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Huh? Wh-who is this?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick (C-137)
line: I found the real killer, biitch! Get over here!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: Yo ding-dong! We’re done here. Time to go.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Well Jerry, I guess this means goodbye.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: W-w-well, does it have to? Heh, you, you look just like Rick. We could maybe... you know... get rid of him? I’m not saying kill him, necessarily, I-I’m also not saying necessarily not kill him, but-

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Jerry. W-we both know it wouldn’t work. It’s time to go back to our lives. I love you, Jerry. I love ya.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty (C-137)
line: Wh-wh-what’s gonna happen to all these Mortys?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Council Rick 1
line: They’ll go back to their families, attend school regularly, play video games, date girls... poor little Rickless bastards.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Council Rick 1
line: Earth Rick C-137, the Council apologises for its false accusation. And in the way of reparations for our terrible mistake, we would like to compensate you with this voucher for a free replacement Morty, in the event that your current Morty should-

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Uh, guys? Not a good time. Come on, Morty, let’s hit it.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Is it time for arcs yet, Rick? I did a pretty great job back there for a human cloaking device. Saved your ass.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Alright, Morty, don’t break an arm jerking yourself off.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Man, I can’t believe you, Rick! That right there! Tha-that was a great opportunity to show a little humanity. You know? To connect with me a little?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Hey Morty, you want connection? Go be part of some stupid club like all those dumb Ricks. You know, maybe I don’t connect because I’m the Rickest Rick there is. And you know, it would go without saying that the Rickest Rick... would have the Mortyest Morty.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: It would go without saying, huh?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Yeah, it would. Did you hear me say it?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Na (to himself) The Mortyest Morty...

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Just don’t get too big for your loafers, Buster Brown. A cocky Morty could lead to some big problems. Could be a real bad thing for everybody.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Morty
line: Oh yeah, how’s that?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: I-I-I’ll explain when you’re older.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: What a mess!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 2
line: Pride cometh before the fall. I guess he got what he deserved.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: What is that?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 2
line: Hand me the laser defibrillator.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Doofus Rick
line: Hey guys! Uh, c-can I help?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 2
line: No! Go clean the toilets! Maybe you’ll make friends with some turds.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: You make us ashamed to be ourselves!

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 1
line: My God! I’ve seen this technology before. This Rick was being controlled remotely, puppeteered by somebody else! This is the Receiver.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick 2
line: Yeah, but where’s the Transmitter?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: [After credits scene
line: Jerry is sitting in Rick’s bedroom, trying not to cry. Rick enters]

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Wubbalubbadubdub! Oh. Hey Jerry. Wh-wh-what are you doing in my room, buddy?

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Jerry
line: Nothing! I was just, um, checking the smoke detectors.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: Alright. Okay, get out.

episode name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
name: Rick
line: What’s that dipshit doing out there? Are you friends with him? You know he eats his own shit, right? Oh my god, this is rich! I’ve got like ten Ricks to call right now!

name: Summer
line: Bye, mom! Bye, dad!

name: Morty
line: Drive carefully!

name: Rick
line: Have fun, you two.

name: Beth
line: Yes, we will have as much fun as possible on our... (Sarcastic and moody) Titanic-themed getaway.

name: Jerry
line: (Finishes packing the car, and closes the door of the car.) Let's lose the 'tude, please. It's supposed to be romantic. (Opens the passenger seat door.)

name: Beth
line: Speaking of disasters, dad, we are leaving you in charge, here.

name: Rick
line: I know, c-can we wrap this up? Morty and I (belching) have some synthetic laser-eels oxidizing in the garage.

name: Beth
line: (Angry) Hey, don't blow me off. I am drawing a line, okay? Any damage to this house or these children when we get back, and... no more adventures with Morty. (Opens the car door off screen.)

name: Morty
line: Aw, geez, Rick! If my mom's the one who's saying it, then you know it's pretty serious this time.

name: Beth and Jerry in unison
line: That's right.

name: Jerry
line: Wait... What?

name: Rick
line: Listen, you have my word as a caregiver, everything's gonna be fine. And if not, like you say, no more adventures or whatever. It's like that old song 'blomp blomp-a noop noop a-noop noop noop'. You guys know that song? (Elbows Morty.) From Tiny Roger's? You never heard of it? You know, the black effeminate guy from the '50s?

name: Rick
line: No-nobody? (Angry) A-all right, whatever. Look, who cares? Just go on your stupid trip.

name: Jerry
line: (Serious) Not one thing out of place.

name: Jerry
line: Not a single thing.

name: Summer
line: (Happy) Well, we're past the point of no return. I'm going to have a party.

name: Summer
line: (Off screen) I found Jello.

name: Summer
line: Can you sneak your mom's vodka? Yes, she does. I saw it in your laundry room. (Grabs another box) Listen, you can't both be in denial about it. Okay, bye. (Stops the call)

name: Morty
line: Summer, you can't throw a party! Remember what mom said?

name: Summer
line: Yeah, if anything gets messed up, you and grandpa Rick get punished. I'm only a human being, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Rick, tell Summer she can't have a party!

name: Rick
line: (Pulls out a tray with canapes on it, and places it on the bench off screen.) Uh, Summer, you can't have a party.

name: Summer
line: Ugh.

name: Rick
line: (Back on screen.) Because (burp) I'm having a party, b-I-I-I-itch! (burp)

name: Morty
line: Oh, what?! Rick, you can't!

name: Summer
line: What do you mean you're having a party? (Sarcastic) Are some glip glops from the third dimension going to come over and play cards or something?

name: Rick
line: 'Glip glop?' You're lucky a Traflorkian doesn't hear you say that.

name: Summer
line: Is that like their n-word?

name: Rick
line: It's like the n-word and the c-word had a baby, and it was raised by all the bad words for Jews. (Drinks from a soda can.)

name: Morty
line: Listen, I think the three of us could just, you know, have a nice time, like just hanging out, and, you know, doing a little bonding and --

name: Summer
line: (Interrupts Morty) screw that. This is my chance to gain some footing with the cool kids.

name: Rick
line: That's why you party? Boy, you really are 17.

name: Summer
line: Why do you party?

name: Rick
line: To get (burp) wr-wriggedy wriggedy wrecked, son!

name: Summer
line: Just keep your sci-fi friends away from my awesome ones.

name: Rick
line: Yeah, and you keep your awesome friends away from my canapes. (Places a piece of food into his canapes to finish preparing them.)

name: Tour Guide
line: After dinner, Titanic 2 will attach to the rail system near our replica iceberg, and the hydraulics encased in these tubes will execute a controlled sink into the icy depths.

name: Jerry
line: A rail system seems archaic for an attraction this impressive. Are you sure the ship will sink?

name: Tour Guide
line: I can assure you the ship will sink, as it has a thousand times before. It is un-unsinkable.

name: Jerry
line: (Notices the front of the Titanic, full of people.) Ooh! Look, it's the line for the bow!

name: Beth
line: (Bored and unimpressed) Jerry, I'd love to just kick back with a Margarita and read.

name: Beth
line: Do you mind if I skip the whole 'king of the world' bit?

name: Jerry
line: Well, it's not the 'king of the world' bit. That's Jack and fabrizio. (Grabs Beth's hat and places it on her head.) This is where rose says, 'I'm flying, Jack!' But whatever. I can be the only one to do it alone.

name: Beth
line: (Looks to her right, and smiles.) Well, what about her?

name: Beth
line: Excuse me, ma'am. Would you like to take my place in line?

name: Lucy
line: (Shy) I, uh -- I could get into trouble.

name: Beth
line: (Takes off her hat and places it onto Lucy's.) We won't tell.

name: Jerry
line: So... You're a Titanic fanatic?

name: Lucy
line: Oh, yes. I've worked here since it opened, but I've never been able to participate.

name: Jerry
line: Happy to help... rose.

name: Tammy
line: (To a girl) I love watching bukkake. I mean, like, I don't know if I personally would ever do it...

name: Summer
line: Brad! Hey!

name: Brad
line: Yo.

name: Tammy
line: (To the girl) Brad is here! Quick, make my hair look drunk.

name: Brad
line: Check it out. Tammy's already drunk. Cool.

name: Birdperson
line: The beacon was activated. Who is in danger?

name: Summer
line: Ugh! Grandpa!

name: Rick
line: Birdperson!

name: Birdperson
line: I am pleased there is no emergency.

name: Rick
line: Oh, there's an emergency, all right. (He puts his arm around Birdperson) A pussy emergency! When's the last time you got laid, 'pers?

name: Birdperson
line: It has been a... challenging mating season for birdperson.

name: Rick
line: Then it's time to get your beak wet tonight, playah. (Leads Birdperson into the house) Go have some fun out there birdp-- bird-- birdperson.

name: Morty
line: Oh, man, how many people did you invite, Rick?

name: Rick
line: Uh... people? Mm, six.

name: Rick
line: Yo! What up, my glip glops?!

name: Morty
line: Oh, man!

name: Morty
line: (Walking around picking up trash from the ground and putting it in a garbage bag. The house is very crowded) (Huff) (Huff) Oh! Y-y-you know there's a garbage, right?

name: Morty
line: Hey, uh, what the hell?!

name: Jelly-like creature with items stuck inside of it
line: Ooh. That's why you never invite a floopy doop and a shmoopy doop to the same party. (Exits the room)

name: Morty
line: Oh, oh, g-- oh, that's disgusting! You guys are in my parents' bed!

name: Blue alien
line: Oh. Sorry. I'm not feeling too well. I just needed to lie down for a bit.

name: Morty
line: Oh. Okay. S-s-sorry. Haha.

name: Morty
line: Oh, my God! Are you kidding me?!

name: Gearhead
line: The thing people don't realize about the Gear Wars is that it was never really about the gears at all.

name: Rick
line: Uh-huh. Yeah. No, no, to-totally.

name: Morty
line: Rick, you got to stop --

name: Rick
line: Morty! Have you met Gearhead?

name: Morty
line: (Waves) Hey, how's it --

name: Rick
line: (Interrupts Morty) Morty here, he -- he would love to hear all about the Gear Wars. (Rick quickly leaves them)

name: Gearhead
line: How familiar are you with the Gear Wars, exactly?

name: Morty
line: Uh... Not at all.

name: Gearhead
line: Oh, boy. I envy you. Okay, it was about 754 years ago...

name: Rick
line: Oh, hey, Morty! H-have you -- have you met my buddy scropon?

name: Morty
line: Not again, Rick. That last guy droned on for 20 minutes, you know? And meanwhile, the whole house is being destroyed!

name: Rick
line: Whoa, Morty, this guy's entire planet was destroyed.

name: Rick
line: Have a little perspective.

name: Squanchy
line: Hey, Rick, squanchy party, bro!

name: Rick
line: Aw! Squanchy!

name: Squanchy
line: Is there a good place for me to squanch around here?

name: Rick
line: Squanchy, you can squanch wherever you want, man. Mi casa es su casa, dawg!

name: Squanchy
line: All right! I like your squanch! (He runs away, excited)

name: Morty
line: Uh, Rick, what exactly is 'squanching'?

name: Rick
line: Morty, listen -- we've had a lot of really cool adventures over the last year, but it's time to relax.

name: Morty
line: Yeah, if I relax now, there might not even be any more adventures!

name: Rick
line: Jesus, Morty, you're bumming me out. Can't we just pretend like everything's fine for a few hours, enjoy ourselves, and then worry about all this later?

name: Morty
line: Yeah, that's easy for you to say, Rick. You know, you like not caring about stuff. You know, wh-wh-what's in this for me?

name: Morty
line: (In slow motion) Jessica.

name: Rick
line: Knock it off, Slow Mobius!

name: Slow Mobius
line: Ha ha! Sorry, dude! I'm just trying to show off my powers, bro!

name: Morty
line: I can't believe she's here.

name: Rick
line: Well, what are you doing standing here, Morty? Go. Talk to her. (He shoves Morty away. Morty follows Jessica.)

name: Rick
line: Tonight, the only adventure you're on is your cusping manhood.

name: Jerry
line: Oh, Rose.

name: Lucy
line: Whee!

name: Jerry
line: Is that what I think it is?

name: Lucy
line: (Off screen) Yes, every couple gets to re-create Jack's drowning at the end of the movie.

name: Lucy
line: It's so romantic.

name: Jerry
line: I can't wait to do that with Beth.

name: Lucy
line: I don't know, Jerry. With all due respect, it seems like your wife may not be that interested.

name: Jerry
line: (Gasp!) Look! (Points at the iceberg in front of the boat, as it rises higher out of the water)

name: Voice through speaker
line: Iceberg, right ahead! The buffet is now closed.

name: Voice through speaker
line: Iceberg, right ahead! The buffet is now closed.

name: Captain #1
line: (Worried) Uh, sir? There's not a problem.

name: Captain #2
line: What do you mean there's not a problem?

name: Captain #1
line: The guidance system isn't putting us on a direct collision course. This ship is about to completely miss the giant iceberg!

name: Captain #2
line: Well, do something! Steer into it!

name: Captain #1
line: (Frantically trying to steer towards the iceberg) I'm trying!

name: Captain #2
line: It's too late. (Removes his hat, and speaks into a microphone.) Ladies and gentlemen... Don't brace yourselves.

name: Jerry
line: No! What happened?!

name: Lucy
line: Their rail system must have failed.

name: Passengers
line: Oh, my God! We're not gonna sink! What are we gonna do?!

name: Guy
line: Totally gonna get laid tonight. (Drinks from the cup.)

name: Tammy
line: (In awe) I like your feathers.

name: Birdperson
line: They are designed to attract the attention of the female.

name: Tammy
line: It's working.

name: Birdperson
line: Tammy, I should let you know I just got out of a highly intense soul bond with my previous spirit mate.

name: Tammy
line: I'm not looking to get into a soul bond. I'm just looking for... (Whispers into Birdperson's ear.)

name: Birdperson
line: I believe birdperson can arrange that.

name: Nancy
line: Hey, Summer, haven't seen you at flute practice in a while.

name: Girl
line: Summer, don't tell me you're friends with her.

name: Summer
line: (Lying) Are you kidding me? I don't even know what she's doing here.

name: Rick
line: Whoa. Not cool, summer. This is a party. (He accidentally splashes some of his drink into Nancy's face.) Everybody should be welcome.

name: Rick
line: Oh, great. Who invited Abradolph Lincoler? (Tries to hide his face from Abradolph Lincoler.)

name: Summer
line: I thought everyone was welcome.

name: Rick
line: It's not the same, Summer. Lincoler is a crazed maniac -- just a misguided effort of mine to create a morally neutral superleader by combining the DNA of Adolf Hitler and Abraham Lincoln. Turns out (burp) it just adds up to a lame, weird loser.

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: Rick, you brought me into this world, a suffering abomination tortured by the duality of its being.

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: (Walks closer to Rick) But I shall finally know peace when I watch the life drain from your wretched body! (He accidentally bumps Brad with his arm. Brad is standing next to Jessica and Morty)

name: Brad
line: Whoa. What's up, man?

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: I have no quarrel with you, boy.

name: Brad
line: 'Boy'? What's that supposed to mean? (Gets up into Abradolph Lincoler's face)

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: (Threatened) It's just -- l-look, I-I don't know how you thought I meant it, but... (Looks at Rick for help)

name: Rick
line: Don't look at me, dude.

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: Look, I'm half-Abraham Lincoln, so --

name: Brad
line: (Angry) So I should get on my knees and kiss your ass?!

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: Well, no, but... You know?

name: Brad
line: What do I know? That the third reich will reign for a thousand years?

name: Jessica
line: Leave him alone, Brad.

name: Brad
line: Stay out of this, Jessica!

name: Rick
line: Kick his ass, Brad! (chanting)

name: Everyone except Morty and Jessica
line: (Chanting) Kick his ass! Kick his ass! Kick his ass!

name: Jessica
line: Brad!

name: Morty
line: Rick!

name: Rick
line: (Shoves Morty towards the door where jessica went) I just did you a favor, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Sorry about all that. Rick has some really strange friends.

name: Jessica
line: (Annoyed) Ugh! Brad is such a jerk. He's always trying to prove what a man he is. I just want to find somebody nice and sweet.

name: Morty
line: Jessica, can I show you something?

name: Jessica
line: Wow! Look at all this stuff.

name: Morty
line: (Walks over to the shelves and picks up a circular device.) Yeah. This is me and my grandpa Rick's Sci-Fi workshop. Check this out.

name: Jessica
line: It's beautiful.

name: Morty
line: You know, Jessica, there's something I've always wanted to tell you.

name: Jesica
line: What's that, Morty?

name: Morty
line: I think that you're the most --

name: Jessica
line: No, that -- those weird sounds coming from the closet over there. (Points at the shaking closet.)

name: Jessica
line: Aah!

name: Morty
line: Oh, my God!

name: Squanchy
line: Hey, I'm squanching in here!

name: Morty
line: Oh, my God! Oh, that is so disgusting!

name: Morty
line: Ow! Oh! Oh, crap!

name: Rick
line: Huh. Big star in the sky. (Breathes in) Oxygen-rich atmosphere. Giant testicle monsters. (Turns around, excited) We'll be fine! Let's party!

name: Stereo
line: ♪ Just shake that ass, bitch, and let me see whatcha got ♪

name: Summer
line: I swear to God, Morty, if it weren't for the fact that everyone's still having a blast in there, I would be so furious with you right now.

name: Rick
line: Oh, man. Y-you hear that, Morty? You really lucked out with Summer o-on that one. (Sips from his drink)

name: Morty
line: How are you guys not freaking out right now?! T-the whole house is sitting in another dimension! I-I mean, w-what the hell are we supposed to do?! M-m-mom and dad are gonna kill us! I'm losing it here, Rick!

name: Rick
line: (Holds Morty to get his attention) Relax, Morty, rela-a-a-ax! (Lets go) It's gonna be fine. All we have to do is go out and find us some kalaxian crystals. (Rick is still scanning with his device. It suddenly starts to beep.) Oh, shit, motherfucker! Kalaxian crystals, Morty, just a few miles South of here.

name: Morty
line: Okay. Let's go, then.

name: Morty
line: W-w-we got to go get those crystals right now, Rick.

name: Rick
line: (Makes Morty let go) Whoa, whoa, whoa. Morty, Morty, I-I can't go with you. I got to hang back and make sure everything stays cool here, you know? I mean, who knows what -- what if somebody breaks something?

name: Summer
line: Yeah. Me too. I should stay.

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: You guys have any aspirin?

name: Rick
line: Oh, hey, Morty, this is perfect! You can take Lincoler with you.

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: Hey, man, I'm not going anywhere. I'm injured.

name: Rick
line: Shut up, Lincoler. (Shoves him away) It's the least you can do for wrecking the living room.

name: Summer
line: (Grabs Nancy's shoulders) Yeah! And, Nancy, you should go, too.

name: Nancy
line: What? Why -- why me?

name: Summer
line: Because, uh, you're -- you're so good at playing the flute. (Shoves Nancy towards Morty and Abradolph Lincoler)

name: Captain #2
line: Sorry for the inconvenience, folks. We should resume sinking shortly. In the meantime, please, stay on the ship and enjoy a complimentary plate of James Cameronion rings. (He hands Beth a small card.)

name: Jerry
line: (Annoyed) Great. Not only is the ship not sinking, but now the fourth wall has been broken.

name: Beth
line: (Sigh) I am gonna go back to the room to finish my book. You should find that Lucy woman. (Walks away from Jerry)

name: Jerry
line: But -- but --

name: Lucy
line: You see, Jerry? (She puts her hand on Jerry's shoulder) May I show you something?

name: Lucy
line: Had everything gone as planned, this entire area would be underwater.

name: Jerry
line: I would have liked to see it. This trip has been a 'Titanic' failure. (Turns to face Lucy) Get it?

name: Jerry
line: (Shocked and confused) Ooh!

name: Lucy
line: Draw me, Jerry.

name: Jerry
line: (Awkwardly glancing at her body) Oh, boy. Lucy, wow. Uh, this isn't what I had in mind.

name: Lucy
line: But it's the perfect moment. We've been dreaming about this for 16 years.

name: Jerry
line: Um, not like this. Not -- not with you. Heh.

name: Lucy
line: (Lifts up a gun she has in her hand, and aims it at Jerry. She walks towards him) You are gonna draw me.

name: Jerry
line: Aah! (Backs away)

name: Lucy
line: Then you're going to fuck me in that car over there. (Points at an old-fashion car with the gun)

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: (Thinking) It's weird, 'cause I definitely think that all men are created equal. But, at the same time --

name: Morty
line: (Interupts him to shut him up) Okay! Um, the crystals should be really close.

name: Nancy
line: (Points at big pink crystals growing out of the ground) There they are!

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: Wait. Something's not right.

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: Get the crystals! I'll handle the beast! Prepare to be emancipated from your own inferior genes! (He lunges at the creature, as he tackles it down. Nancy and Morty quickly grab some crystals and put them in a small bag.)

name: Nancy
line: Summer's gonna like me again.

name: Morty
line: Lincoler, come on! Let's get out of here!

name: Abradolph Lincoler
line: Mein journey is over, Morty. (Grunts) I have something important to tell you.

name: Gearhead
line: ♪ And the gears, they turned for a thousand years ♪ ♪ until the dark day that they stopped ♪

name: Morty
line: (Huff) Rick, I got them! I got the crystals! (He hands Rick the bag)

name: Rick
line: All right! You did it, Morty. (Walks away)

name: Morty
line: Rick, wait! There's something you need to know. I couldn't have done it without Lincoler. He said that he was really sorry and that he loves you like a father.

name: Morty
line: He only wanted you to accept him, and he hopes that his final act would redeem him in your eyes. (Morty tears up and wipes his eye) He sacrificed himself to save all of us, Rick. He died.

name: Rick
line: Well, at least he didn't die in vain. He got these crystals. (Rick cuts up the crystals into dust with his credit card, and snorts it up. Ricks eyes turn blue) And these babies just saved this lame-ass party! Wubba, lubba, dub, dub! Play something. Somebody, play something.

name: Morty
line: Wait a minute. What?

name: Rick
line: (Dancing) ♪ Put your right foot forward ♪ ♪ and your left foot back ♪ ♪ then fucking slide around ♪ ♪ like on a nordictrack ♪

name: Rick
line: ♪ move to the left ♪ ♪ step to the right ♪ ♪ wiggle your elbows, and look ♪ ♪ up into the light ♪

name: Song
line: ♪ it's the, it's the ♪ ♪ it's the Rick dance ♪ ♪ it's the, it's the ♪ ♪ it's the Rick dance ♪

name: Rick
line: Slow Mobius, hit me with the clock beam!

name: Song
line: ♪ It's the, it's the ♪ ♪ it's the Rick dance ♪

name: Rick
line: That's the Rick dance! All right! (burp) Whoa, man!

name: Morty
line: What the hell was that?! I thought those crystals were supposed to help us get home or something!

name: Rick
line: What? No, no, no. I can get us home whenever I want to. But, listen, speaking of those crystals, can I get the rest of them? I'm starting to come down, Morty. (His eye color turns back to normal) Crystal kalaxian is a really strong, but fleeting high. (He scratches the side of his face)

name: Morty
line: That's what I think of your crystals, Rick!

name: Rick
line: Oh, Morty, you idiot! Does anybody else have any more k-lax? B-birdperson?

name: Rick
line: Uh, squanchy?

name: Squanchy
line: Don't squaunch at me.

name: Morty
line: All right, everybody, party is officially over! Rick, take us home now.

name: Rick
line: All right, all right, fine, Morty, you party pooper buzzkill! Boo, boo! Morty sucks!

name: Tammy
line: Boo! You suck, whatever your name is.

name: Everyone
line: Boo!

name: Rick
line: Morty, you're the worst, Morty.

name: Gearhead
line: But these gears just started turnin'.

name: Lucy
line: Almost finished, Jerry?

name: Jerry
line: Uh, almost. I haven't quite captured your beautiful eyes.

name: Lucy
line: (Still holding the gun) I'm sure it's good enough. Move!

name: Lucy
line: Every weekend, Jacks and Roses have their Titanic experience in this car, and I have to mop it up. The floor drops out to make it easier. (She licks the car, as the floor of the car detatches.) But now it's my turn. We're going to get it nice and steamy in there, and I'm going to slam my hand on the steam and leave a nice handprint, and then you're going to love inside of me.

name: Lucy
line: No mess. No clean.

name: Jerry
line: (Reieved) Beth!

name: Beth
line: Bet you're glad I think kindles are dumb now.

name: Beth
line: I can't help but feel a little guilty. I didn't peg Lucy for a rapist.

name: Jerry
line: What does a rapist look like exactly, Beth? Is it a slavic man wearing a denim jacket with a patchy beard and the scent of cheap champagne wafting over his blister-pocked lips? (Feeling scared due to a flashback)

name: Beth
line: What?

name: Beth
line: Well, at least you got all this free stuff. (She enters the door into the drivers seat, as Jerry closes the back door, and tries to fit a painting board from the titanic boat.)

name: Beth
line: Should be enough to satisfy your Titanic Jones for a while.

name: Jerry
line: (Puts the board into the passenger seat) Ugh! I'm not going to fit. (Hangs onto the board, recreating Jack's death from the Titanic movie. He slowly slips off) Beth, listen to me. You're going to get out of here. You're gonna go on, and --

name: Beth
line: (Interrupts Jerry) Jerry, just leave the door.

name: Jerry
line: It's not a door, Beth. It's debris.

name: Beth
line: I don't care. Just leave it.

name: Jerry
line: Yeah. Okay. (He takes out the board and leaves it on the ground, as he gets into the car. He has Lucy's necklace. He drops it out of the car window. Lucy is seen hanging onto the underneath of their car. The car starts moving)

name: Lucy
line: Ahahahah! 'Cape fear'! Hahahaha! 'Cape fear'! I'm -- I'm doing -- I'm -- I'm going to do like from 'cape fear'.

name: Lucy
line: Ugh! Auh! Augh! (huff) (huff)

name: Squanchy
line: Hey, squanchers! The party's squanching on at my place!

name: Summer
line: Cool. I'm coming, too.

name: Squanchy
line: (Stops Summer) Uh, no. You're not squanchy enough for a squanchy party.

name: Summer
line: What?

name: Squanchy
line: Nancy told us what a bitch you are. (Leaves)

name: Summer
line: Guys, seriously. Nancy?

name: Nancy
line: Summer, you're a bad person. All you care about is having popular people like you. That's not what Abradolph Lincoler stood for. Well, I-it was hard to pin down what he stood for, but it's certainly not what he died for.

name: Summer
line: Next time I party, I'm just gonna focus on getting totally wrecked. (To Rick) You're so wise.

name: Rick
line: (Groan) (Mumbles) Hmm, yeah. Mhh mhm... (Rick falls asleep, snoring)

name: Birdperson

line: Isn't there a kitten somewhere that needs a manicure?

name: Lawyer
line: That's right Mrs. Smith, *whispers* give in to your anger. Neglect that deer.

name: Jerry
line: Honey, it's gonna be okay. These men are from the Cervine Institute of Elk, Moose Deer and Stag. They can take this deer to a helicopter and fly it to the country's top deer surgeon on a wildlife reserve across the state border, where your jurisdiction ends.

name: Vet
line: I guess that's the end of that.

name: Lawyer
line: There is just one more thing. According to this state's veterinarian statute, this animal can't be transferred until the current attending physician verbally confirms their inability to provide adequate care. You heard the man horse doctor, you have to say you couldn't hack it.

name: Jerry
line: We did it...

name: Testicle Monster A
line: (On phone) Uh-huh, no motha- no, Earth, dude, I'm talking 'bout, yeah, with the dinosaurs. No, if you've get to the dolphin people, you've gone too far. Alright man, I'll talk to you later, okay. (hangs up) You know what they do with 3rd dimensional life forms in time prison? Same thing they do in every other prison, only forever.

name: Morty
line: Why are you doing this?

name: Testicle Monster A
line: You think I wanna be an omniscient immortal being transcending time and space my whole life? I got ambitions man, bringin' you guys in is my ticket up.

name: Rick
line: What if I told you there's a huge ticket up right behind you?

name: Testicle Monster A
line: You really think I'm that stupid?

name: Rick
line: Alright, hear me out on this. You're immortal, right, which means your life is infinite. Well in that case there's 100% chance that you'll eventually do everything, including turning around to look behind you.

name: Testicle Monster A
line: I cannot argue that.

name: Rick
line: Ah, God, gross and weird!

name: Testicle Monster A
line: Chris!

name: Testicle Monster A
line: You killed my gun!

name: Rick
line: Summer, Morty, take off your collars!

name: Testicle Monster A
line: What? What the hell are you doing?

name: Rick
line: Good question. I suppose the answer is: I'm not certain!

name: Testicle Monster A
line: Oh, no, what are you doin'?

name: Rick 1
line: I have no idea!

name: Rick 2
line: I'm not sure.

name: All Ricks (off sync)
line: Maybe I will, maybe I won't.

name: All Ricks (off sync)
line: I'm really uncertain about everything, even kicking your ass!

name: Testicle Monster A
line: Lis- ay, to, AH. But these arms are vestigial. Now you poked me where an eye would have been about six million years ago.

name: All Summers (off sync)
line: Come on, let's help Grampa.

name: All Mortys (off sync)
line: Yeah. I'm like a hundred percent not sure about anything.

name: (Zooms into only show one timeline
line: Timeline 23)

name: Morty 23
line: Kick his ass, Rick!

name: Rick 23
line: Die, motherfucker!

name: Testicle Monster A
line: Ow, I'm defeated...

name: Summer 23
line: What's happening?

name: Rick 23
line: Time is falling apart, we've got to get back to certainty, quick! Give me your collars!

name: Morty 23
line: Oh man, don't you have to fix, like, thirty of them?

name: Rick 23
line: Morty, I have to fix three of them, and then there's thirty-one other versions of me that have to also fix three for a total of 96. I'm not an idiot. I know how to be decisive, now hand me that (Phillips/Flathead) screwdriver. Actually, make it a (Phillips/Flathead).

name: All Ricks (off sync)
line: Oh, shit.

name: Jerry
line: Look, I know I was kind of a nuisance today. I know it's my fault we hit the deer, and I know you wanted to be the one to save it.
