name: Beth
line: Whatever. How petty would I have to be to care less about an animal's life than my own ego?

name: Jerry
line: Hmm... you'd have to be pretty petty. But you'd still be the woman I married.

name: Beth
line: Where are we going?

name: Jerry
line: One last stop.

name: Beth
line: Where's the helicopter?

name: Jerry
line: There is no helicopter and there is no Cervine Institute.

name: Beth
line: But the top deer surgeon...

name: Jerry
line: I'm looking at her. Thanks for F.D.'ing me up like that.

name: Cold Stone Employee
line: You'd better get moving, these lights are designed for basic ice cream work, they're not gonna last all night.

name: Beth
line: I need five minutes.

name: Beth
line: Jerry, this was the most romantic weekend I've ever had.

name: Jerry
line: Thanks to Cold Stone Creamery.

name: Cold Stone Employee
line: You're welcome.

name: (Presumably) All Ricks
line: Okay, we're out of time. It's ironic, huh?

name: Morty 30
line: Rick!

name: Rick 30
line: What's goin' on?

name: Morty 30
line: The collar, oh, the latch is broken! It won't latch closed around my neck!

name: (Presumably) All Mortys Except Morty 30
line: What's wrong, how come our collars aren't green?

name: (Presumably) All Ricks Except Rick 30
line: Obviously because someone doesn't know how to put his collar on and one of me is stuck trying to help him.

name: (Presumably) All Mortys Except Morty 30
line: Don't blame this on me, you're the one that couldn't fix a latch!

name: Rick 30
line: What are you talking about, it's not broken, Morty, I fixed it, just put it on!

name: Morty 30
line: It won't close, it's broken!

name: Rick 30
line: Fine, bring it here.

name: Morty 30
line: Ooh, ooh, Rick!

name: (Presumably) All Ricks Except Rick 30
line: Oh, really, Morty? Well I'm sorry, I'm not the one that's so fucking uncertain about everything!

name: (Presumably) All Mortys Except Morty 30
line: You know what I'm certain of, Rick? I've really made up my mind about this, I never wanna see you again!

name: (Presumably) All Ricks Except Rick 30
line: You're never gonna see anything again you little dummy! You killed us!

name: Rick 30
line: Goddammit!

name: Morty 30
line: Ooh

name: Rick 30
line: Morty where's your collar I'll fix it

name: Morty 30
line: I dropped it

name: (Presumably) All Ricks Except Rick 30
line: What the hell? What have you done to me, Morty?

name: Rick 30
line: I'm okay with this. Be good Morty. Be better than me. Holy shit, the other collar! I'm not okay with this! I am not okay with this! Oh, sweet Jesus please let me live. Oh, my God I--I've gotta fix this thing, please God in Heaven, please, God, oh Lord, hear my prayers. Yes! Fuck you God! Not today, bitch.

name: (Presumably) All Ricks Except Rick 30
line: Please, God, if there's a Hell, please be merciful to me.

name: Rick 30
line: Yes I did it! There is no God! In your face. One dot, motherfuckers!

name: Morty
line: Yes, oh, yes, yes!

name: Summer
line: Woohoo! Whoo! Whoo!

name: Morty
line: Oh, that was a close call. Oh yeah, do it Rick, do it right.

name: Rick
line: You know what I'm talking about, oh yeah. I'm gonna do the cabbage patch, Morty. Check me out I'm doing the cabbage patch dance. It's a classic dance, remember, like this. Oh shit look at that.

name: Morty
line: Do the cabbage patch. Do--do--do the dance.

name: Summer
line: Hey wait a second, how come you guys took longer to get here?

name: Morty
line: I don't know. I think like one sixty-fourth of my collars didn't work. It's hard to keep straight now that I have sixty-three other memories of everything.

name: Rick
line: Yeah.

name: Morty
line: But I feel like one of the sixty-four Ricks like, sacrificed himself for me, maybe, I think.

name: Rick
line: Shut up, Morty. The last time you felt something, we all almost died. You little s--piece of shit.

name: Beth
line: Hey guys, we're home.

name: Morty & Summer
line: Mom, Dad!

name: Jerry
line: Um, hold the phone, where did you guys get those necklaces from? Uh, Lady Gaga, table for three, am I right?

name: Beth
line: *laughs*

name: Jerry
line: Are you guys Power Rangers? But only on one small part of your necks? Hey, do those things need batteries? Were they included? Clean up in the fruit isle! Not in a homophobic way though, they're just fruity necklaces is all I was saying.

name: Beth
line: *laughing* I'm gonna pee my pants.

name: Morty
line: Doesn't feel so good, does it?

name: Rick
line: No it doesn't. It hurts.

name: Beth
line: I'm gonna pee-hee-hee.

name: Jerry
line: Somebody call the planet of Tron, we have three Tron people over here. But seriously, are these Halloween costumes? Are you going as motorcycles? With green headlights instead of normal ones? Are you dogs? Robot dogs? Gosh, you guys are lame. Are those chokers from the 90's? What is this, a 90's nostalgia thing? Are you guys in that movie “The Craft” with Fairuza Balk?

name: Testicle Monster A
line: Hey man, when the hell were you?

name: Testicle Monster B
line: Looking for you, asshole.

name: Testicle Monster A
line: I told you past the dinosaurs.

name: Testicle Monster B
line: You know how much time is past the dinosaurs? Half of all time!

name: Testicle Monster A
line: Come on, man, it's this way...

name: Testicle Monster B
line: Come on, give me that thing, speed it up, he can't be this far back.

name: Testicle Monster A
line: There he is, there he is, there he is, there he is, stop, stop.

name: Testicle Monster B
line: So that's the guy, huh?

name: Testicle Monster A
line: Yeah, that's him. Hey, man, remember me? I got something for your ass! You don't mess with time! You don't fuck with time, motherfucker!

name: Albert Einstein
line: I vill mess vith time!

name: Albert Einstein
line: I vill mess vith time...

name: Rick
line: Learning to fly this thing, Morty, it's gonna be really liberating. Y-Y-You’re gonna be free to go on all kinds of errands for me.

name: Morty
line: Cool.

name: Rick
line: *points out the window* See that planet right there? Don’t fly too close to that planet. Someone’ll come out and try to wash your windshield. (Rick’s phone rings.) Hold on. *picks up* Yup. Yeah, I have it. Where do you wanna meet? Alright, cool. *hangs up* Alright Morty, lesson’s over. We got some business to attend to a few lightminutes south of here.

name: Jerry
line: Oh, you still use ‘south’ in space?

name: Rick
line: *startled* WHOA! Jesus, Jerry, what the hell are you doing here?!

name: Jerry
line: What are you talking about? We agreed a boy’s father should be present when he’s learning to drive.

name: Rick
line: I guess I remember that. *rubs forehead* Wow. And you’ve just been back there this whole time? Amazing. Well we don’t have time to take him to Earth, Morty. Head for 3124-917.

name: Jerry
line: *chuckles* Cool! Looks like I’m comin’ along for an adventure!

name: Rick
line: Yep.

name: Morty
line: This is where we’re going?

name: Rick
line: Nope. (An asteroid-like mass materializes before them.) This is. You can park in a handicapped spot, Morty. Anything with less than eight limbs is considered disabled here.

name: Jerry-Sitter
line: Well look at this fella. *pinches Jerry’s cheek* Aren’t you handsome?

name: Jerry
line: Thank you! I’m Jerry. *extends hand*

name: Jerry-Sitter
line: *as if speaking to a child* Oh, I know you are. Did you come here in a spaceship?

name: Jerry
line: I’m travelling with my son and father-in-law. Uh, wait, are they coming?

name: Jerry-Sitter
line: Oh, they’ll be back soon.

name: Jerry
line: What?

name: Pajama Jerry
line: I don’t know how this works!

name: Underpants Jerry
line: Help me!

name: Jerry
line: What the hell?

name: Pajama Jerry
line: I know, right?

name: Tuxedo Jerry
line: *enters room* Oh, what the hell?

name: Jerry
line: I know, right?

name: Morty
line: *looking at a pamphlet* Jerryboree? You created a daycare for my dad?

name: Rick
line: You kidding? I wish I had this idea. Well... I did have this idea, but I wish I was the version of me that owned it. That guy’s rich.

name: Receptionist
line: Don’t forget to check the reason for your drop-off.

name: Rick
line: *checks off “Stowaway” and “Annoying me”* Trust me Morty, I’ve heard stories from other Ricks. Jerrys don’t tend to last five minutes off of Earth. This is a totally unregistered cross-temporal asteroid. Here they can romp and play with other Jerrys. It couldn’t be safer.

name: Rick
line: Hey Morty, hang onto this. That number’s your dad. If you lose it, we’re not gonna be able to get him back.

name: Rick
line: Okay, wait here.

name: Morty
line: I wanna come with.

name: Rick
line: Don’t come with. It’s boring, it’s *burps* business stuff.

name: Morty
line: What kinda business do you do in a garage? You know, this seems a little shady.

name: Rick
line: Right, like nothing shady ever happened in a fully furnished office? You ever hear about Wall Street Morty? Y-You know what those guys do in th--in their fancy board rooms? They take their balls, and they dip ‘em in cocaine, and they wipe ‘em all over each other. You know, Grandpa goes around, and he does his business in public because Grandpa isn’t shady.

name: Rick
line: Ah, crap. *rolls down window* Hey, what’s up?

name: Krombopulos Michael
line: Hey, Rick! Haha! Here you go, three thousand Flurbos! D’you have the weapon?

name: Rick
line: Can... Can we please...? This is my grandson, Morty.

name: Krombopulos Michael
line: Well hi Morty! I’m Krombopulos Michael! I’m an assassin. I buy guns from your grandpa.

name: Rick
line: Ugh. *passes Krombopulos Michael a case containing the antimatter gun* Here, now go away.

name: Krombopulos Michael
line: *examines weapon* Ooh, yeah, this looks deadly. So this shoots antimatter? My target can’t be killed with regular matter. Nice to meet you, Morty! Listen, if you ever need anybody murdered, *passes Morty his card* please give me a call. I’m very discrete--

name: Rick
line: Y-Y-Y-You’re gonna give him your card?!

name: Krombopulos Michael
line: I have no code of ethics, I will kill anyone, anywhere! Children, animals, old people, doesn’t matter. I just love killin’!

name: Morty
line: ...You sell weapons to killers for money?

name: Rick
line: Ugh... You’ve got what the intergalactic call a very planetary mindset, Morty. It’s more complicated out here! These are Flurbos. Do you understand what two humans can accomplish with three thousand of these?

name: Morty
line: Uh, what?

name: Rick
line: An entire afternoon at Blips and Chiiiitz!

name: Rick
line: Aw, this place is the best. It’s got beer, games, prizes, and you can never tell what time it is.

name: Morty
line: You sold a gun to a murderer so you could play video games?

name: Rick
line: Yeah, sure, if you spend all day shuffling words around you can make anything sound bad, Morty. *puts a helmet on Morty’s head* Here, check this out.

name: Roy
line: Ah!

name: Roy’s mother
line: Roy, what’s wrong?

name: Roy
line: I...had a nightmare. I was with an old man... He put a helmet on me.

name: Roy’s mother
line: It’s just a fever. Get some sleep, I don’t want you missing school on Monday. *walks out of the room and switches off the lights*

name: Teacher
line: I want you kids to look around you today and think about your future. (Roy looks outside and sees kids playing with a football. He smiles.) Now is the time in your life when anything is possible.

name: Announcer
line: Spiraling perfectly, it’s gonna be caught by Roy Parsons! Roy Parsons is at the 20! (Roy makes eye contact with a girl in the stands.) Now he’s at the 10! Nothing can stop Roy the Rocket! Touchdown!

name: Roy’s wife
line: I just think it’s time to get realistic. Have you talked to my father about the carpet store? Roy?

name: Doctor
line: Had we caught it sooner... Well, hindsight is 20-20, Roy. What’s important is that we move quickly.

name: Roy
line: I’m not...ready to die...

name: Roy’s wife
line: *takes his hand* You’re not going to.

name: Customer
line: Hey, thanks for the carpet, Roy.

name: Voice
line: *shouting from off screen* Hey Roy, you pull those Persian off-white shags for the clearance sale?

name: Roy
line: Whoa. Sh-shit! Shit!

name: Morty
line: Whoa! What the hell?! Wha--Where am I?! What the hell?!

name: Rick
line: Fifty-five years. Not bad, Morty. You kinda wasted your thirties though with that whole birdwatching phase.

name: Morty
line: *looks around, grips his head* W... Where’s my wife?

name: Rick
line: Morty. You were just playing a game. It’s called Roy. Snap out of it, come on. *hands him his tickets*

name: Morty
line: I’m Morty... You’re Rick... Hey, you sold a gun to a guy that kills people!

name: Rick
line: Lookit this. You beat cancer and then you went back to work at the carpet store? Boo.

name: Morty
line: Don’t dodge the issue, Rick! Selling a gun to a hitman is the same as pulling the trigger!

name: Rick
line: It’s also the same as doing nothing. If Krombopulos Michael wants someone dead, there’s not a lot anybody can do to stop him. That’s why he does it for a living? Now if you’ll excuse me, it’s time to thrash your Roy score. *puts on the helmet*

name: Morty
line: You could stop this killing from happening, Rick! You know, y-you did a bad thing selling that gun, but you could undo it if you wanted!

name: Rick
line: Uh-huh, yeah, that’s the difference between you and me, Morty. I never go back to the carpet store.

name: Harold
line: *passing by, sees Rick playing Roy* Holy shit! This guy’s taking Roy off the grid! (Other alien patrons gasp and congregate around Rick.) This guy doesn’t have a social security number for Roy!

name: Jerry
line: Hi, I’m sorry, I think there was a misunderstanding. I’m an adult and would like to go home, please.

name: Jerry-Sitter
line: Well of course! Right through that tube. *points to a tube in the wall*

name: Jerry
line: *muttering to self* Unbelievable. *approaches the tube and starts climbing in*

name: Jerry-Sitter
line: You’re doing great!

name: Jerry
line: *indignantly* I know how to crawl in a tube. *to himself, while crawling* Ugh... Come on... This is harder than it looks... (Suddenly the tube transitions into a slide.) Whoooooaaaa!

name: Pink-shirt Jerry
line: Marco? (Jerrys laugh.) Marco?

name: Other Jerry
line: Come find me.

name: Pink-shirt Jerry
line: Marco? (Jerrys laugh again.)

name: Jerry
line: You guys are enjoying this? Don’t you feel a little... patronized?

name: Pink-shirt Jerry
line: How so?

name: Daycare Beth
line: Jerry!

name: Other Jerry
line: Beeeth.

name: Jerry
line: Oh, come on, this is ridiculous!

name: Daycare Beth
line: I love you, Jerry!

name: Jerry
line: Aw... Beth...

name: Daycare Beth
line: Who wants to come watch Midnight Run with director’s commentary on?

name: Jerrys
line: Oh! Yes! Definitely!

name: Daycare Beth
line: First one there gets to adjust the picture settings!

name: Jerry
line: The factory tint setting is always too high! *climbs out of the ballpit and hurries after “Beth” with the other Jerrys*

name: Other Jerry
line: Out of my way!

name: Another Jerry
line: The factory tint setting is always too high!

name: Krombopulos Michael
line: Oh boy, here I go killin’ again!

name: Ship
line: You have arrived at Krombopulos Michael. Your destination is below.

name: Morty
line: *dazed* All out of off-white Persians... *gets out of the ship and realizes he killed Krombopulos Michael* Oh man, wha-wh-wh-what have I done?! *picks up KM’s arm and the antimatter gun*

name: Gromflomite
line: (pointing a gun at Morty) Drop the gun!

name: Morty
line: You don’t understand! This guy was gonna kill someone!

name: Gromflomite
line: I guess that makes two of us. *fires up his weapon*

name: Rick
line: What are you doing Morty?! This is a Galactic Federation outpost! Look, I don’t have time to tell you my entire backstory, but Grandpa and government don’t get along!

name: Fart
line: You saved my life!

name: Rick
line: What?

name: Morty
line: Huh?! Are you Krombopulos Michael’s target? W-Wwwwhat’s your name?

name: Fart
line: My kind has no use for names. I communicate through what you call “Jessica’s feet.” No, “telepathy.”

name: Rick
line: Oh, good job, Morty. Y-Y-Y-You killed my best customer but you saved a mind-reading fart!

name: Fart
line: I like this name, ‘Fart.’ Morty, would you kindly release me by pulling that lever to the left of my cell? I am in great pain.

name: Rick
line: Morty, don’t do it. (Morty walks toward the lever.) Morty... (Morty glances at Rick before pulling the lever. Alarms start to sound as Fart escapes his cell.) Morty, you idiot!

name: Morty
line: Oh crap, let’s get you outta here!

name: Rick
line: We can’t get him outta here. He’s gaseous. He’s not gonna make it through a portal, Morty.

name: Morty
line: *stomps past Rick* Well then I guess we’re all getting in the car! Right, uh...

name: Fart
line: Fart.

name: Morty
line: No! Jus-j-j-just get in the car!

name: Rick
line: Morty, come on, I-I wanna go back to Blips and Chitz. I don’t wanna deal with this!

name: Morty
line: Y-You’ve been clear on the fact that you don’t wanna help, so just go away!

name: Fart
line: More are coming.

name: Rick
line: Screw this. I’m out.

name: Morty
line: Oooh...! Come on, come on!

name: Gromflomite
line: Get out of the vehicle made of garbage or we will open fire!

name: Morty
line: *still trying to start the car* Oh no no no!

name: Gromflomite
line: Open fire!

name: Rick
line: Stupid-ass fart-saving carpet-store motherfucker! *shoves Morty out of the driver’s seat and takes the wheel* Move!

name: Rick
line: Wait, did you fuck with my seat settings?

name: Fart
line: More are coming.

name: Morty
line: Rick!

name: Rick
line: Yeah, yeah. (He crashes the car into the Gromflomites before flying away from the outpost.)

name: Gearhead
line: Your geldon convertor is pretty dinged up.

name: Rick
line: That’s ‘cause my grandson drives like a male Obavradian. Yeah, I said it. Some stereotypes are based in fact.

name: Gearhead
line: Actually, it’s because of years of neglect. You really need to respect your gears, Rick. To you, they’re just wheels with teeth, but in my culture, wars have been fought, entire--

name: Rick
line: *interrupts him* So I’ve heard. Just fix it. *to Morty* I don’t think the Gromflomites can track us now, but it looks like we’re gonna be here for awhile. *lowers voice* Or, ya know, if you still have that gun K. Michael dropped, we can finish the job and go home.

name: Fart
line: You do understand I’m telepathic, right?

name: Rick
line: I’m being polite.

name: Morty
line: Rick, we’re taking him back where he belongs!

name: Rick
line: Yeah, where’s that? Are you going on a quest to find he who smelt it?

name: Fart
line: I came here accidentally through a wormhole located in what you call “get out of my head, Fart, I know you’re in here, la la la la--” No, in what you call the Promethean Nebula.

name: Rick
line: Oh great, just a hop, skip, and an 800 lightyear jump!

name: Morty
line: You know, you can leave any time you want, Rick.

name: Rick
line: *walks away, muttering* Whatever you wanna do you little punk-ass little bitch...

name: Fart
line: Thank you, Morty. You are not like other carbon-based life forms. You put the value of all life above your own.

name: Morty
line: That’s how things should be. It’s how they could be.

name: Fart
line: I could not agree more.

name: Fart
line: (singing over a montage formed from Morty’s imagination) The world can be one together / Cosmos without hatred / Stars like diamonds in your eyes. / The ground can be space (space, space, space, space) / With feet marching toward a peaceful sky. / All the moonmen want things their way / But we make sure they see the sun. / Goodbye, moonmen / You say goodbye, moonmen. / Goodby--

name: Rick
line: *holding a golf club* Shut the fuck up about moonmen! This isn’t a musical number. This is a fucking operation, we gotta be cool and fucking lay low!

name: Random Jerry
line: *opens email and laughs* Duck, duck, birdie? (All Jerrys open emails and laugh.) Very funny!

name: Jerry
line: Here comes another funny...

name: Other Jerry
line: Hahaha! Oh, this place is great.

name: Jerry
line: I almost wish I could stay longer than one day.

name: Other Jerry
line: *suddenly serious* You just might.

name: Jerry
line: W-What do you mean?

name: Other Jerry
line: These are the Jerrys whose Ricks and Mortys never came back. (Forgotten Jerrys stand, sit, and lie around the room, generally looking despondent.) ...They live here now.

name: Jerry
line: Uuuum...

name: Gear Anchor
line: No gear turnings as of yet in the curious case of these unidentified humanoid fugitives (An image of Rick and Morty in the car as Rick was adjusting the seat settings appears onscreen.) reportedly at large somewhere within the Gear System.

name: Rick
line: Son of a... *approaches Fart* Why were the Gromflomites holding you prisoner? What the fuck is so valuable about you?

name: Fart
line: I am no more valuable than life itself. However, I am able to alter the composition of atoms, like this. (An electric fuzz seems to go through the gaseous cloud and a lump of gold materializes, dropping to the ground beneath him.) That was oxygen. I added seventy-one protons to it.

name: Rick
line: *picks up the gold* Ah, terrific. The fart that pooped gold. No wonder every cop in the system is lookin’ for us! *pockets gold* Any species that gets a hold of this thing is gonna use it to take over the galaxy. Do you know how inconvenient that’s gonna be to my work?

name: Rick
line: Somebody dropped the dime on us. Gearhead... *turns around*

name: Gearhead
line: *pointing a gun at Rick* I’m sorry, Rick. The reward on your head is too high. And like you always say, you gotta look out for Number One.

name: Rick
line: Number One is me, asshole! You’re supposed to be my friend!

name: Gearhead
line: Friend? Do you even know my real name? It’s Revolio Clockberg Junior. I belong to an entire species of gear people. Calling me ‘Gearhead’ is like calling a Chinese person ‘Asia-face.’

name: Gearhead
line: No, not twigs!

name: Rick
line: Two things I wanna make clear to everybody in this room. Never betray me, and it’s time to go.

name: Gear Policeman #1
line: Nobody move!

name: Gear Policeman #2
line: Oh my god.

name: Gear Policeman #1
line: Are those...?

name: Rick
line: Hey Morty, remember when you said selling a gun was as bad as pulling the trigger? How do you feel about all these people getting killed because of your choices?

name: Morty
line: I did the right thing, Rick!

name: Rick
line: Tell that to Gearhead’s gearsticles.

name: Morty
line: You did that!

name: Rick
line: Wrong! I’d be playin’ Roy right now. At a certain point, my hands are tied, Morty.

name: Jerry
line: *playing poker with other Jerrys, sighs* I can’t believe Rick did this. This is the eighth to the last straw.

name: Bearded Jerry
line: Ante up.

name: Jerry
line: You know what? *throws down cards* Screw it! I have a better gamble for your guys. *leans forward* I say we escape.

name: Bearded Jerry
line: If you want to leave, you can just go out the front door.

name: Tank-top Jerry
line: You think we’re kept here against our will? That would be illegal.

name: Jerry
line: But... If you can leave, then why are you still here?

name: Buzzcut Jerry
line: Same reason as you. *looks to other Jerrys for confirmation* ...We’re Jerrys.

name: Jerry
line: I’m leaving.

name: Jerry-Sitter
line: Okay then, that was always allowed.

name: Rick
line: Morty, take the wheel!

name: Morty
line: Whoa, whoa!

name: Rick
line: Whoa!

name: Rick
line: Geez, dammit, Morty! Who taught you to fly this thing?! *laughs* Haha, I’m kidding, I know that’s on me.

name: Morty
line: Um, Rick!

name: Rick
line: Shit. Well, I guess this is it.

name: Fart
line: Morty, crack the window.

name: Fart
line: I wonder why Greg is always so critical of my girlfriend.

name: Officer
line: Well... He’d probably like to have me to himself, that’s how friends are.

name: Fart
line: Or does he want her to himself?

name: Fart
line: The world can be one together / Cosmos without hatred / Stars like diamonds in your eyes.

name: Officer
line: *anguished* My life is a fucking joke.

name: Fart
line: Goodbye, moonmen. / You say, goodbye, moonmen.

name: Fart
line: Goodbye, moonmen... (Fart floats back in through the window and the song ends.) Alright, let’s proceed.

name: Rick
line: Damn. Can’t blame that on the dog. ...Talk about silent but deadly. I-I’ve seen some nerve gas but ga- th-this gas got some nerve! Haha, you know what I’m sayin’?

name: Morty
line: *not amused* Are you done?

name: Rick
line: I’ll let you know, Morty. Gone with the wind, am I right? If you don’t like that one, Morty, an alt on that one could be, like...if I said Gasablanca! ...Alright, I’m done. (Morty starts driving.) Let’s get to the Promethean Nebula, so my grandson can finish savin’ a life!

name: Garblovian
line: Ga-ga blahg blahg?

name: Jerry
line: Um... Earth, please?

name: Jerry
line: Um... Is this... Do I pay?

name: Garblovian
line: Agah blahg-blah! (Jibberish continues as Jerry rushes away. Other aliens heckle him.)

name: Jerry
line: Sorry!

name: Jerry
line: Hmm. Hmm... *hesitantly makes to pet the creature, but its face suddenly splays out in a tentacle formation* Agh! *runs away*

name: Garblovian
line: Agah blahg blahg?

name: Jerry
line: I don’t...

name: Garblovian
line: *angrily* Agah blahg!

name: Jerry
line: What do you want?

name: Garblovian
line: *holds out cup* Agah blahg blah--

name: Jerry
line: Oh! *looks at self and begins panicking* Ahahaaaahhhhh....

name: Jerry
line: *wiping goo off himself* Uhhh... Huhhh.... (Stumbles upon two fleshy alien creatures mid-coitus.) Oooh! *runs away*

name: Tank-top Jerry
line: Hey, are you the one that left?

name: Jerry
line: *single nod*

name: Tank-top Jerry
line: I get it. It’s... uh... a hassle out there.

name: Jerry
line: *suddenly less forlorn* Right? Who needs that?

name: Other Jerrys
line: *to one another* Right? Not me.

name: Paul
line: Oh-ho, not us!

name: Jerry
line: Uh... Who are you?

name: Paul
line: Oh, excuse me. Paul Fleishman. *shakes Jerry’s hand* Infinite timelines! In some of them Beth remarries.

name: Jerry
line: ...Geez...

name: Paul
line: Don’t worry. I treat Beth very well, and I do not overstep my bounds with Morty. Every kid needs a dad, but there’s no replacing you. Hey, you wanna give us a hand with this? *gestures to the TV* We’re trying to figure out how to get the sound coming through the stereo instead of the TV. I-I-I don’t--It’s very difficult.

name: Jerry
line: Oh. Uh, well, is there an Aux input?

name: Tank-top Jerry
line: I tried that, but there’s two different colors.

name: Various Jerrys
line: Uh... There’s two different colors.

name: Fart
line: The wormhole is seventy of what you call ‘meters’ what you call ‘north’ of what you call ‘here.’

name: Rick
line: Fine. Morty, take your fart to his hole and say your goodbyes. I’m gonna find some fuel and take a biiiig fat Morty. (Morty gets out of the car.) That’s my new word for ‘shit’ because of today’s events.

name: Fart
line: Here it is. This should take me back to my kind.

name: Morty
line: I’m gonna miss you, um, Fart. I’m really sorry your name became Fart.

name: Fart
line: I will be back soon, Morty.

name: Morty
line: *excited* Really?

name: Fart
line: After I return to the others with this location, we will be back for your cleansing.

name: Morty
line: Um... Cleansing...?

name: Fart
line: Carbon-based life is a threat to all higher life. To us, you are what you would call a disease. Wherever we discover you, we cure it. You said yourself that life must be protected even through sacrifice. (Morty, shocked and saddened, begins to tear up.) You haven’t changed your mind about that. I can sense your thoughts. Morty.

name: Morty
line: *wipes his eyes* Um... Before you go... Could you sing a... C-Could you sing for me again?

name: Fart
line: Yes, Morty. *approaches him as “Goodbye Moonmen” begins, again set to a sequence formed from Morty’s imagination* Cosmos without hatred / Blinding stars of cosmic light / Quasars shine through endless night / And everything is one in the beauty / And now we say goodby--

name: Fart
line: Morty... Why... Why?

name: Morty
line: Goodbye.

name: Rick
line: So did you guys make out a little bit? Is he gonna send you a postcard? (Morty wordlessly enters the car.) Man, that guy hit the lottery when he crossed paths with you.

name: Rick
line: Morty, I know I picked on your core beliefs and decision making a lot today, but I am glad you insisted on gettin’ that fart home. You know, at least all the death and destruction wasn’t for nothin’, you know? *notices Morty’s detached, almost anguished expression* You miss your fart friend, huh? Well I’ve got a little surprise for you, buddy. While you were gone I found another wormhole with millions of beings just like him on the other side and they’re all coming to visit.

name: Morty
line: *panicking* What?! Rick! No, you can’t!

name: Rick
line: Too late, Morty. The hole’s opening.

name: Morty
line: No, no, Rick! You don’t understand!

name: Rick
line: Th-there’s a lot more where that came from too.

name: Rick
line: Hey. *taps another Rick’s arm* Hey bro. How many people was your Morty responsible for killing today?

name: Other Rick
line: None, we chilled at Blips and Chitz all day, ain’t that right homie?

name: Other Morty
line: Darn right bro! Roy rules!

name: Other Rick
line: Haha!

name: Rick
line: *glares at Morty* Must be nice... Hey, Morty, there’s our Jerry.

name: Jerry
line: Mm, I missed you. Hey, Rick.

name: Rick
line: Glad you’re safe Jerry. What do you say we go home?

name: Jerry
line: I’d like that.

name: Another Rick
line: *holding a ticket* Hey, wait, do you have 5126?

name: Rick
line: Uh, I’m not sure. Morty.

name: Other Rick
line: Uh, that’s a Blips and Chitz ticket.

name: Morty
line: What?!

name: Rick
line: Way to go, Morty. Eh, whatever.

name: Jerrys
line: Uh... W-wait, what?

name: Ricks
line: Alright, come on, Jerry.

name: Announcer
line: Are you tired of the same daily droll? Well, get on over to Blips and Chitz! (As he describes things, they appear on screen.) We got, uh... one game! We got a whole bunch of games here! Uh, we got chabos and flobos and you can shoot things! Get on over here and play the games! Use your Flurbos to get tickets! Roy 2 just got here! G-Get over here at Ch... Chips and Chitz!

name: Rick
line: It’s the coolest place in the world! Hahahaha, I g- I get to be in a commercial!

name: Morty and Summer
line: Whoa!

name: Rick
line: One out of ten times its a deadly trap, but I'm ready to roll those dice!

name: Summer
line: Seems like something terrible happened here.

name: Rick
line: Yeah. Cha-ching. Oh yeah, if you find a room full of eggs, don't shy away from it, give one of them a shake. Those facehuggers are worth more than this ship.

name: Morty
line: Uh, what's that?

name: Rick
line: This will make the cops write it up as a looting by the Korblocks.

name: Summer
line: That's horrible!

name: Rick
line: I hear you man, cops are racist.

name: Rick
line: Oh, hey! You're alive! Thank God.

name: Female alien
line: Can you help us? Our planet was taken over by some kind of entity! It absorbed the minds of our people!

name: Male alien 1
line: We didn't notice until it was too late. The people it takes over, they look like your friends, your family, your leaders, but they're not, themselves any more; They're part of It.

name: Rick
line: And how do you know it didn't get on the ship with you? Those two ding-dongs seem pretty calm about the whole thing.

name: Male alien with glasses
line: Hey! No, no- uurgh!

name: Rick
line: Called it.

name: All six aliens together
line: Hello Rick. Long time no see.

name: Rick
line: Unity!?

name: Morty
line: Rick?

name: Summer
line: Grandpa?

name: Rick
line: Oh boy. Uh, these are my grandkids, Summer and Morty. Summer, Morty, this is uh, Unity. We sort of used to, uh, date.

name: Rick
line: Quite an operation you got going here Une. You're a whole planet now huh?

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: After we broke up, I spend some time wandering through space,

name: Unity (Thin suited man)
line: then I found this world,

name: Unity (Large suited man)
line: where I was better able to focus on my passion for unification.

name: Summer
line: You mean stealing peoples’ bodies?

name: Rick
line: Summer, rude. Why don't you kids run off and play with Unity while Unity and I do some catching up.

name: Summer
line: Ugh.

name: Morty
line: Wait! Rick, aren't these people going to barf into our mouths and absorb us?

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: You're guests here on my planet, you're free to be yourselves; I've never been good at disappointing Rick.

name: Summer
line: Well now I'm going to barf. Come on Morty.

name: Beth
line: Jerry, what are you- what are you doing in here?

name: Jerry
line: I'm trying to find our weed whacker, ‘cause our weeds are wack, yo.

name: Beth
line: But you can't go in the garage when Rick's not here.

name: Jerry
line: I can't?

name: Beth
line: Well, he doesn't like it.

name: Jerry
line: What's he gonna do, crash rent-free at his other family's house?

name: Beth
line: What is that supposed to mean?

name: Jerry
line: Your dad gets to walk all over us because of your abandonment issues! He's playing you, shorty.

name: Beth
line: Oh, stop affecting that stupid hip-hop dialect!

name: Jerry
line: Stop shifting the crosshairs to my ironic urban patois just because your relationship with your father is toe-up from the flow-up.

name: Jerry
line: What the hell was that?

name: Beth
line: (whispering) I don't know, let's just leave!

name: Jerry
line: That is a hatch! Your father put a hatch in my garage!

name: Beth
line: You don't know it was him! Anyway, we’re not supposed to be in here!

name: Jerry
line: Obviously, neither is whatever's gurgling down there.

name: [Trans. to Unity’s planet
line: Rick is approaching a news stand]

name: Rick
line: World peace achieved. Nice! A little weird to publish a paper about it for yourself, but hey. So what's next?

name: Unity (Newsagent)
line: After I become a type-one civilisation, this world will be invited into the Galactic Federation.

name: Rick
line: Oh, goody.

name: Unity (Customer)
line: From there I'll have access to countless planets and species.

name: Unity (Pedestrian)
line: One by one, I will unify them, I will become the universe, and I will be what the single-minded once called a god.

name: Rick
line: I like that. Oh, that's pretty sexy. Hey listen, where can I get a drink around here?

name: Unity (Old woman)
line: Recreational substances were phased out here. There's no need for escape from the self when your world is one.

name: Rick
line: Unity, Unity, who am I talking to? I watched you assimilate a whole police station just to get your hands on the evidence locker.

name: Unity (Worker)
line: Rick, when we met I was a young hivemind with the population of a small town. People... change.

name: Unity (Busker)
line: Especially when I change them. I'm sorry to disappoint you, but... I’ve grown.

name: Rick
line: Hey, listen, I’ve grown too. I have! See, I’ve- I’ve reconnected with my family, right?

name: Unity (Police officer)
line: Hm, why is that I wonder?

name: Rick
line: Maybe it's part of getting old. Maybe I just miss being with... a collective.

name: Unity (Crowd)
line: Yes Rick! Yes! Yes!

name: Rick
line: Oh yeah!

name: Unity (Crowd)
line: Yes! Yes!

name: Rick
line: Wait, wait, stop! H-Hold it! Not like this. We need a hang glider. And a crotchless Uncle Sam costume. And I want the entire field of your largest stadium covered end to end with naked redheads! And I want the stands packed with every man that remotely resembles my father!

name: Morty
line: Look at ‘em go! So coordinated! What’s your problem? They’re making you into a Mount Rushmore! They made burgers!

name: Summer
line: Morty, open your eyes! There is no they! These poor people's’ bodies are being used! They're a planet of puppets!

name: Unity (Fan holder)
line: I can hear you.

name: Summer
line: Ugh!

name: Morty
line: Well, seems like everybody here's cool with it. Except for all those redheads. They seem like they're in a hurry to be somewhere else.

name: Unity (Clown)
line: Balloon, Summer? Balloon, Morty?

name: Summer
line: No, we don't want your dumb balloons. We’re bored. Take us back to Rick.

name: Unity (Clown)
line: Now's... not a good time.

name: Rick
line: Oh yeah! I want youuuuuu!

name: Unity (Stadium)
line: Go son go! Go son go! Go son go!

name: [Trans. to Earth
line: Jerry and Beth are looking down the hatch, which is open]

name: Jerry
line: Oh! Real nice! Real nice! How does a man do this without me noticing?

name: Beth
line: Oh, you know my dad. Once he puts his mind to something...

name: Jerry
line: You're spinning this to his credit?

name: Jerry
line: I'm going down there.

name: Beth
line: Jerry!

name: Jerry
line: Beth, this is my house, which makes this my garage, my secret hatch, my hidden subterranean lair, and my faceless gargler. Now, are you going to keep hating this playa, or are you gonna jack my steed?

name: Beth
line: Okay, you're just making stuff up now.

name: Rick
line: Oh my god. Oh my god.

name: Unity (Redheads)
line: Oh Rick, it was so bad.

name: Rick
line: What's this ‘was’ stuff? I just need to hydrate and then we’re doing that again!

name: Unity (Redhead)
line: Oh damn.

name: Rick
line: Listen, if this is an invasion I gotta sit this one out, but I'll- I'll be back to have sex with the survivors.

name: Unity (Redhead)
line: It's a neighboring hivemind species, Beta-7. Our planet's maintained a practical alliance for exchange of vital resources. (whispering) So be nice!

name: Beta-7
line: Unity. Is it a... bad time? Are all... present lifeforms... assimilated?

name: Unity (Man with glasses)
line: Beta-7, this is my single-minded friend from Earth, Rick.

name: Beta-7
line: Rick... Sanchez. Unity has spoken of you.

name: Rick
line: All bad I hope.

name: Rick
line: Whoa, Jesus Christ!

name: Unity (Redhead)
line: Beta-7, if my allies are a problem for you perhaps our alliance is as well.

name: Beta-7
line: Our alliance is beneficial. When Beta-7 expresses concern it- it's only ... be-because...

name: Rick
line: Oh snap! Powdered neutronium? Amphetetron? You know what I can make with this stuff?

name: Unity (Redhead)
line: Oh... Rick, I- I shouldn't...

name: Rick
line: Come on, it's not every day that I'm in town! It- it's for old time's sake.

name: Unity (Redhead)
line: Uh... Okay, what the hell! We can purify the resin and make fractal dust!

name: Rick
line: Oh, I was thinking velocitinis, but...

name: Unity
line: Aww, old man Rick can't party with the whole planet?

name: Rick
line: I can do whatever you do and more, baby.

name: Beta-7
line: Hrmm...

name: Rick
line: You know, I think Beta-7 over there is hoping your alliance can be more than practical.

name: Jerry
line: Well, this explains the six thousand dollar electric bill.

name: Jerry
line: Well. Nice. Real nice. Alien prisoners under the house. Real nice. Nice. Reeeal-

name: Beth
line: Goddamn it, stop.

name: Summer
line: Wake up people! You have to fight it! You're under the spell of an evil monster!

name: Unity (Man with glasses)
line: I can hear you.

name: Summer
line: Yeah! So you keep saying!

name: Morty
line: Summer!

name: Summer
line: Wake up! You have to have some individuality left in there!

name: Unity (Steven Phillips)
line: Why do you hate me, Summer?

name: Summer
line: I'm not talking to you! I'm talking to...

name: Summer
line: ...Steven Phillips! Steven! Set yourself free!

name: Unity (Steven Phillips)
line: Summer, before I took over this planet, this man was a registered sex offender.

name: Summer
line: ...Yeah, well so what? At least he was himself.

name: Unity (M.Biologist)
line: This woman was a drug addict on the verge of suicide. Now she's a marine biologist.

name: Morty
line: Listen Unity, I don't think my sister's trying to say that life would be perfect without you. I think she's just saying that life would be... you know, life.

name: Unity (Old man)
line: I have transformed life here into a paradise. Prostitutes are now scientists. The homeless are now phisosophers.

name: Summer
line: Oh, phi- phisosophers?

name: Unity (Old man)
line: Philophiluh... phiphophibup...

name: Summer
line: Oh my god. Where did you learn to talk you grandpa-stealing slut?

name: Unity (Old man)
line: I'm feeling... urk!

name: Morty
line: Oh man! Let me help all of you guys up!

name: Unity (All)
line: I'm fine!

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: Do you know what I love about you, Rick? You're the only single mind I’ve met who really sees the big picture.

name: Rick
line: You got that right. But... baby, listen. Y-you're talking about taking over planets and galaxies, you gotta... you gotta just... remember to let go sometimes, you know.

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: I can let go! Hey, look! You see that town across the river? Watch this.

name: Rick
line: Whoa!

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: Ha ha! Woot!

name: Rick
line: Whoa! That's not what I meant!

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: It's okay! It's okay, I evacuated! I evacuated the town, look!

name: Unity (Townspeople)
line: Hey! Right here! We’re fine!

name: Rick
line: Oh, that was awesome! My grandkids weren't in that town, right? A-are my grandkids alive? ... H-hey, my drink is empty.

name: Morty and Summer
line: Aah!

name: Summer
line: Unity, what's happening?

name: Steven Phillips
line: Who's Unity? You kids have nice feet. Mind if I take a picture?

name: Summer
line: Gross, no!

name: Morty
line: I think you're getting what you wanted, Summer. Something's happening to Unity.

name: Summer
line: Do... all of you remember who you are?

name: Ron Benson
line: ...Yeah. My name is Ron Benson. I'm... an electrical engineer. Father of two, and as you can see from my flat concentric nipple rings, I'm a member of this planet's top race!

name: Summer
line: Okay, that's good! Uh... Don't focus too much on the last part, but...

name: Daryl Jefferson
line: I'm Daryll Jefferson. I'm a landscaper. And I'll be damned if that ripple-nipple bitch's race is superior! The cone-nipple people will rule this world!

name: Ron Benson
line: You shut your mouth, you dirty knife-nipple bastard!

name: Daryl Jefferson
line: What'd you say to me, you target-chested piece of shit?

name: Alien man
line: Race war!

name: Summer
line: Why are you fighting? Can't you see you're all the same?

name: Morty
line: Ah, Summer. Ha ha. First race war, huh?

name: Morty
line: Way to go, Summer. You started a race war.

name: Summer
line: I didn't start it! They're the racists! I... I merely empowered them to follow their apparently misguided dreams!

name: Morty
line: Okay, thanks for clarifying! Y- I'll have a super accurate headstone now!

name: Rioter
line: Hey wait, what race are you guys?

name: Morty
line: We’re neither! S-see?

name: Summer
line: Yeah, take my word for it. We just have regular nipples.

name: Rioter
line: Hey! These two freaks have no race!

name: Morty
line: Oh, there's no place like home! There's no place like home! Remember, Summer?

name: Summer
line: Oh...

name: Morty
line: From Dorothy and The Tiny People movie?

name: Summer
line: O-oh, yes, yes yes...

name: Morty
line: All the tiny people?

name: Summer
line: Dorothy, take us away! Take us away!

name: Unity (SWAT)
line: Hello Summer. Hello Morty.

name: Unity (Pilot)
line: It's okay! You're safe now.

name: Morty
line: U-Unity?

name: Unity (SWAT)
line: Yes.

name: Summer
line: Oh, Unity I am so sorry. I didn't know freedom meant people doing stuff that sucks! I was thinking more of... a choose-your-own-cellphone-carrier thing.

name: Unity (Pilot)
line: Oh, Summer, you did nothing wrong! I'm having fun with your grandpa! Lost a little control. Probably shouldn't be piloting a hovercopter, nor should I be... running two hundred thousand pediatric hospitals and twelve million deep friers, but hey! It's not like this planet can take its business elsewhere!

name: Morty
line: Um... should we maybe stop somewhere and get you a coffee? Maybe splash a little water on your face, or...?

name: Unity (Pilot)
line: No, no, if I wanted to be sober, I wouldn't have gotten drunk! Wooohoooo!

name: Jerry
line: Oh man. I cannot wait. I cannot wait to hear Rick explain his way around this. He is gone!

name: Beth
line: Jerry, stop! Please, okay, we weren't even supposed to be down here. If we confront him about this-

name: Jerry
line: Oh my god! I love this! I love that this is how far you will go for him. You wanna go upstairs, and cut carrots, and watch a Lifetime original, above a fucking alien dungeon! Your relationship with your father is psychotic!

name: Beth
line: Oh listen to you relish the idea that my genius father is a bad person! Step out of your ego for a second and look at this thing! It's a monster! He might have it chained up so that it doesn't eat the planet!

name: Jerry
line: Right, because your father's such an altruist? I once saw him briefly forget the word for humans! He's probably harvesting this creature's organs!

name: Beth
line: He's probably racing to cure its space aids!

name: Jerry
line: He's going to eat it!

name: Beth
line: He's protecting it!

name: Both
line: Shut up!

name: Summer
line: Unity! This place is a mess!

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: Oh, it's cool! The part of me that's the cleaning lady is coming on Friday. Oh my god! I have a meeting at the galactic federation in an hour. Oh, I'll never make it! Ah, I'll push it to next week.

name: Morty
line: Unity, could you get Rick out here please?

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: He's... unavailable! He's-

name: Summer
line: Having sex with you, we get it! Gross. Get him out here now.

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: I don't think he wants to be-

name: Summer
line: (shouting) Grandpa Rick!

name: Morty
line: (shouting) Rick! Rick!

name: Summer
line: (shouting) I'm gonna tell mom and dad about the gagoo you have locked up under the garage!

name: Rick
line: What the hell... is your problem?

name: Summer
line: Grandpa, we need to go home! Now!

name: Rick
line: Fine, geez!

name: Rick
line: See ya!

name: Morty
line: Uh, Rick? I think we should all go.

name: Rick
line: Tend your garden, kids, I'm kinda doing a thing here.

name: Summer
line: Grandpa Rick, we’re not leaving without you!

name: Rick
line: Oh my god you guys I get it. You're afraid the big bad hivemind is gonna steal your grandpa away.

name: Summer
line: Actually, no. I think Unity's great and you're a horrible influence on it!

name: Rick
line: What?

name: Morty
line: This isn't healthy, Rick! Y- you know you-you're really up to no good around here. I-at-at this place, you know?

name: Summer
line: You and Unity are like... like... leggings and mid-calf boots. You think you're great together but you're just bringing out the worst in each other!

name: Rick
line: Oh, gee, boy Summer, well put. Uh, why don't we see what Unity thinks. Unity?

name: Unity (Shades guy)
line: I'm just taking a little break from stuff. You know? I need to relax.

name: Rick
line: Oh, hey, wh-what's this on the news, guys? L-l-let me turn it up.

name: Unity (Todd)
line: In the news today, this looks a lot worse than it is. We’re... really just having a good time. Karen?

name: Unity (Karen)
line: Thanks, Todd. Up next: Are you a concerned grandchild or just a buzzkill? We'll tell you how you can really know for sure!

name: Rick
line: I think you two are a little outnumbered.

name: Summer
line: Okay! Well, what if you did it for me? What if you came with us as a favour to us... because you love us?

name: Rick
line: What? Dumb. Bye.

name: Morty
line: But Rick, Summer's just-

name: Rick
line: Summer's just a hyper-emotional, needy little- what's the word I'm looking for here... uh- human! It runs in the family! I can tolerate it but I can't give a crap about it. Take a hike.

name: Summer
line: Take care of yourself, Unity.

name: Rick
line: I'm not looking for judgement, just a yes or no. Can you assimilate a giraffe?

name: Beth
line: You're the worst!

name: Jerry
line: No! You're the worst! You don't support this family!

name: Jerry
line: All you care about is yourself!

name: Beth
line: You think supporting the family is about supporting you emotionally...

name: Jerry
line: You've got two children being dragged across the cosmos...

name: Beth
line: ...but you're unsupportable! Because it's never enough, Jerry!

name: Jerry
line: ...by your dangerously ill father, and you force me to watch it happen!

name: Beth
line: It will never be enough support to satisfy you! And you don't even know what it's like...

name: Jerry
line: Because you'd rather lose them and lose me than lose him!

name: Beth
line: ...to be afraid of losing anything because you cling and you cling and you cling...

name: Jerry
line: And why? Because you're the child, Beth. You, not me, you!

name: Jerry
line: Aaah!

name: Beth
line: Oh my god!

name: Beth and Jerry
line: Aah!

name: Blim Blam
line: You know what? I'm taking this.

name: Blim Blam
line: How do you- what is this?

name: Blim Blam
line: Uh, is there a slow setting? Best door ever.

name: Rick
line: Aaah! Okay, okay, now make him cry. But happy cry. Now make ‘em all make fun of the blonde one. Now make ‘em all do it on the table! I can’t believe you created a whole show for me. Now cancel it! Okay, now put it back on. Haha! Alright, I’m bored.

name: Unity (Administrator)
line: Rick, is there a way for you to call Summer and Morty? I feel bad that they-

name: Rick
line: Pfft, screw those guys! Uugh, I'll be right back. Don't waste your brain on those weirdos, Unity. They're no different from any other aimless chumps that you occupy. They just put you at the centre of their lives because you're powerful and then because they put you there they want you to be less powerful. Never gonna happen though, right?

name: Unity (all)
line: Never.

name: Rick
line: Never! Back in a flash.

name: Rick
line: Best weekend ever, Rick! I agree, Rick! Let's see how long we can go!

name: Rick
line: Hey Une! You got any more-

name: Unity (voiceover)
line: Rick, forgive me for doing this in notes. I'm not strong enough to do it in persons.

name: Unity (voiceover)
line: I realize now that I'm attracted to you for the same reason I can't be with you. You can't change. And I have no problem with that, but... it clearly means I have a problem with myself.

name: Unity (voiceover)
line: I'm sure there's no perfect version of me. I'm sure I'll just unify species after species and never really be complete.

name: Unity (voiceover)
line: But I know how it goes with us. I lose who I am and become part of you. Because in a strange way you're better at what I do without even trying. Yours, and nobody else's, Unity. P.S. I don't know where those coal miners were before they got assimilated. You might want to get checked.

name: Rick
line: Hey.

name: Beth
line: Dad... I... um... Jerry and I were looking for our weed whacker, and found your subterranean lair... and your alien prisoner. And... he got away. And I know I sound like mom but I can't sacrifice this whole family's safety just because I'm afraid you'll leave again, so no more alien prisoners, and, no more subterranean excavation without consulting us.

name: Rick
line: Okay.

name: Beth
line: ...Okay? Y-y-y-y-Okay like you're gonna quietly teleport somewhere and never come back?

name: Rick
line: No. It's your house.

name: Summer
line: Grandpa Rick! What happened... with Unity?

name: Rick
line: Who? Oh. Unity. Yeah, well, I mean honestly we’re talking about an entity that thrives on enslavement, you know. It's not cool. Fun's fun but who needs it? I'll be in the garage.

name: [After Credits scene
line: Rick’s spaceship is outside Beta-7’s main ship. Rick is driving, with Morty in the passenger seat]

name: Rick
line: Unity! Unity! Unity!

name: Beta-7
line: How can I assist you?

name: Rick
line: I wanna talk to Unity. Beta-7, I know it's in there!

name: Beta-7
line: You're classified as a hostile entity, and Unity doesn't want to talk to you.

name: Rick
line: I know your game, Beta-7, I’ve met a billion of you, you little on-deck in-the-wind shoulder to cry on!

name: Beta-7
line: You are classified as a hostile entity.

name: Rick
line: Well, you're just loving this, mother f- this isn't gonna shape out like you think, pal! Unity's not into other hiveminds! It's gonna suck you in and use you up and a month from now I'm going to be making out with all of you in a bunch of red wigs! Unity! Unity! Unity, I know you can hear me! Get out here!

name: Beta-7
line: Weapons systems engaged.

name: Rick
line: Oh, in your dreams you have weapons systems.

name: Morty
line: Ugh, Rick, you said we were going to a movie.

name: Rick
line: We are, Morty. Alright, Beta-shit-7, you just got saved by the bell, bitch!

name: Rick
line: 'They're no different from any of the aimless chumps that you occupy, they just put you at the center of their lives because you're powerful, then because they put you there they want you to be less powerful. Never gonna happen though, right?'

name: Unity
line: 'Never.'

name: Jerry
line: Steve, I just got a weird e-mail. Did you buy us airline tickets?

name: Uncle Steve
line: Aw shoot, it was supposed to be a surprise! I wanted to thank you for letting me live here all this time, so I'm treating the family to a vacation!

name: Beth
line: Steve, you're so sweet!

name: Morty
line: Thanks Uncle Steve!

name: Summer
line: Best uncle ever!

name: Uncle Steve
line: Look out world, the Smith family is goin' to Paris!

name: Summer
line: (offscreen) Yeah! Awesome!

name: Jerry
line: Rick, I don't like glowing rocks in the kitchen trash.

name: Rick
line: Well, I don't like your unemployed genes in my grandchildren, Jerry. But life is made of little concessions.

name: Jerry
line: I, you know what, I-

name: Uncle Steve
line: You're gonna land on your feet Jer. Some company out there's gonna thank their lucky stars they hired my little brother.

name: Rick
line: Who the fuck are you?

name: Jerry
line: My goofy brother Steve. He's been living here almost a year now, are you losing your mind?

name: Uncle Steve
line: Hey someone's been spending too much time around glowing rocks am I right? (Everybody except Rick laughs, Rick pulls out a gun and shoots Steve in the head)

name: Morty
line: What the hell, Rick? What the hell?

name: Rick
line: Everybody just relax for a second. There's no such thing as an 'Uncle Steve.' That is an alien parasite.

name: Jerry
line: But I've known him my whole life!

name: Rick
line: No, you haven't Jerry. (Rick puts on a pair of gloves and places the creature's body on the table, spewing pink liquid on the table, and examines it) These telepathic little bastards, they embed themselves in memories they use those to multiply, spread out, and take over planets. It's disgusting.

name: Morty
line: Steve wasn't real?

name: Rick
line: He's a real piece of shit! This is a big one, someone probably tracked in last week on the bottom of their shoe or on a piece of alien fruit.

name: Summer
line: Someone?

name: Rick
line: Get off the high road, Summer. We all got pink eye because you won't stop texting on the toilet.

name: Morty
line: But Uncle Steve taught me how to ride a bike.

name: Rick
line: No, 'Steve' put that memory in your brain so he could live in your house, eat your food, and multiply. We could be infested with these things, so we gotta keep an eye out for any zany, wacky characters that pop up.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Ooh wee, whatever you want Rick! We're here to help!

name: Rick
line: Thanks Mr. Poopybutthole. I always could count on you. (Mr. Poopybutthole passes a cartridge case to Rick who places it in his gun)

name: Rick
line: Alright, there's six of us and that's it. Me, Morty, Jerry, Beth, Mr. Poopybutthole, and Summer.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Maybe you got the first one in time Rick!

name: Rick
line: Can't afford to chance it.

name: Beth
line: Dad, why does our house have blast shields?

name: Rick
line: Trust me, Beth, you don't wanna know how many answers that question has.

name: Mr Poopybutthole
line: Ooh, gosh, it feels claustrophobic! Reminds me of that time we all got stuck in the elevator together. Y-- remember that? After the Hulk musical?

name: (Flashback
line: The family is stuck in an elevator. Jerry is wearing Hulk gloves and punching the elevator buttons. Morty is holding his crotch trying not to pee himself.)

name: Beth
line: Jerry, buttons don't work better if you hit them harder, and foam fists don't make you strong.

name: Jerry
line: I know. Friends make you strong. I watched the same musical you did.

name: Rick
line: Why couldn't I bring my portal gun?

name: Morty
line: Why did all the drinks have to be extra large? Oh, the Hulk. I just got that.

name: Summer
line: Just pee your pants. I did it the minute we got stuck. (all stare at Summer) Oh, oh, yeah, yeah, shame me. At least when I'm disgusting, it's on purpose.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Oh, y'all, we're gonna be fine. I've always been here for you guys, and I always will be. ( chuckles )

name: Nicky
line: Somebody call for repairs?

name: All
line: Yay! Cousin Nicky!

name: Nicky
line: It's me, Cousin Nicky. I'm walkin' here! I mean, I'm not. I'm crouched in the elevator shaft, but hey, I'm walkin' here! ( laughter )

name: Nicky
line: It's true. We really do get into some crazy situations as a family, mostly when we're cooped up like this. Hey, maybe Mr. Poopypants is right. L-let's get some fresh air.

name: Morty
line: Come on, cousin Nicky. You heard Rick. We have to stay quarantined until we know that there's no more of these things.

name: Nicky
line: I hear you, Morty. Back in Brooklyn, we got a sayin' -- 'we're walkin' here!' ( laughter )

name: Jerry
line: Nicky! (Rick shoots Nicky in the shoulder, and he reverts back into a parasite)

name: Nicky
line: Oh! ( gasps ) ( groaning )

name: Morty
line: What the...? Cousin Nicky was a parasite?!

name: Rick
line: Six, Morty! There's supposed to be six of us! If there's seven, then that means somebody's not real.

name: Beth
line: But how did you know it was Nicky?

name: Rick
line: I guessed. That's why I aimed for his shoulder.

name: Beth
line: So we can't trust any of our memories now? Nicky was the reason we found that old nazi submarine. Did that not even happen?

name: Jerry
line: Well, of course it happened.

name: (Flashback
line: Morty, Rick, Jerry, Beth and Nicky are tied up, a Nazi stands before them)

name: Nazi
line: Now that I possess the mighty staff of Rah-gubaba, the world will tremble before the Fourth Reich!

name: Morty
line: This is the last time I ask you for help on my history final, Rick.

name: Nicky
line: Hey, we got a word for Nazis back in Brooklyn, pal.

name: Nazi
line: I'm comfortable being called a Nazi. You think there's some other word that will hurt my feelings? (Hits Nicky on the head) Yeah. Think before you talk shit. Rah-gubaba, help me kill America! (Mr. Beauregard knocks out the Nazi)

name: All
line: Mr. Beauregard!

name: Mr. Beauregard
line: After due consideration, I have elected not to retire.

name: All
line: Yeah! Oh, thank god!

name: Mr. Beauregard
line: Now, I believe someone has a final exam to attend. Set a course for Morty's high school.

name: Mr. Beauregard
line: Perhaps I'm biased, but if that story never happened, then I wouldn't still be the family butler. ( chuckles ) dare to dream.

name: Rick
line: Wait.

name: Summer
line: And if Mr. Beauregard wasn't our butler, it's safe to say the family'd be in a hell of a lot of trouble. ( laughter )

name: Rick
line: No! Don't flashback!

name: (Flashback
line: Jerry has his head stuck in the staircase railing)

name: Summer
line: You're just gonna make more swelling.

name: Beth
line: Don't worry, Jerry. Just relax. We called the fire department.

name: Jerry
line: You know they won't come here anymore. ( grunting )

name: Mr. Beauregard
line: Marmalade is served. (everybody cheers)

name: Frankenstein
line: I guess I take back what I said about British cuisine. ( laughter )

name: (Flashback
line: Rick, Summer, and Mr. Beauregard are having a pillow fight)

name: Rick
line: Take that!

name: Sleepy Gary
line: We're trying to sleep.

name: (Flashback
line: Morty is in the living room with Beth, Jerry, and Sleepy Gary)

name: Morty
line: I don't want to go to the dance alone.

name: Mr. Beauregard (Off-screen)
line: Then perhaps, you shouldn't.

name: Beth
line: Aww. Mr. Beauregard.

name: Mr. Beauregard
line: Shall we, master Morty?

name: Morty
line: We shall.

name: Beth
line: Oh, wait, don't leave without letting Photography Raptor take a picture. ( raptor screeches ) ( camera shutter clicks )

name: Rick
line: Everybody stop remembering! These parasites are like bed bugs, and every flashback is another mattress. Look! There's only supposed to be six people in this house.

name: Beth
line: But there's always been 10.

name: Rick
line: No! Uh, the fact that I wrote this number down means that there's four parasites.

name: Frankenstein
line: You sure about that, Rick?

name: Mr. Beauregard
line: Begging your pardon, master Rick, but I seem to recall a great deal of confusion surrounding that number.

name: (Flashback
line: the group is doing the search from earlier, with the new characters added into the scene.)

name: Rick
line: All right, there's six of us, ( belches ) and that's it. Me, Morty, Jerry, Beth, Mr. Poopybutthole, Frankenstein, Sleepy Gary, Photography raptor, Mr. Beauregard, and Summer.

name: Beth
line: Uh, dad, that's like 10 people.

name: Rick
line: 6, 10, what's the difference? I just love the number 6 for no reason! Where's my pencil at?

name: Pencilvester
line: Right here, Rick! Use me!

name: Rick
line: Oh, thanks, Pencilvester! (writes the number 6 again) Yeah,I-I g-- I guess that is what happened, but I-I don't get why I would do that.

name: Pencilvester
line: Everybody makes mistakes, Rick. Why do you think I have one of these? ( laughter, camera shutter clicks )

name: Beth
line: That's it. Photos. Hard evidence. (Beth scrolls through photos, becomes suspicious) You're not in any of my photos, Mr. Poopybutthole.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Well, what do you know about this? You're not in any of mine.

name: Summer
line: All I have are pictures of me and my friends from school. (everybody else stares at Summer) What? What teenage girl has pictures of her family? It's not like we're Mormon or dying.

name: Frankenstein
line: I will admit it's suspicious that Summer's only friend is a magic ballerina lamb that we've never seen.

name: (Summer flashes back
line: Summer is asleep in her room and Tinkles flies in.)

name: Tinkles
line: Summer!

name: Summer
line: Tinkles! It's past my bedtime.

name: Tinkles
line: ( giggles ) Not in never past bedtime land! Here we go!

name: Summer
line: Ooh! Ooh! Ooh! Ooh! Ooh! Ooh! Ooh!

name: Gary
line: Summer, we're trying to sleep.

name: Summer
line: It was Tinkles! Tinkes?

name: Rick
line: That is su-- -- suspicious. We're always hearing about this Tinkles character, but we never get to –

name: Tinkles
line: Hi, everybody. I'm Tinkles, and these are my friends. ( all sigh )

name: Summer
line: See, everyone? Tinkles is real. That means so am I.

name: Frankenstein
line: I was on the wrong side of the pitchfork on this one.

name: Jerry
line: Okay, look, we shouldn't need evidence or logic to know who's family and who isn't. I know who the Smiths are. I've known Beth since high school. And her husband, Sleepy Gary, is hands down my absolute best friend.

name: Sleepy Gary
line: Thanks, Jerry. Beyond that, no offense to any of you, but all bets are off.

name: Rick
line: Look, I'm not used to being this unsure for this long. I'm just gonna aim for shoulders starting with the weird girl. (Tries to shoot Summer)

name: Summer
line: Aah! Grandpa Rick!

name: Rick
line: (with air quotes) Hold still, 'Summer.'

name: Gary
line: Rick, that is my daughter.

name: Rick
line: Oh, yeah? Well, what if you just think that, Sleepy Gary? I've known you for 15 years. Don't make me hurt you.

name: Sleepy Gary
line: Rick, these are our family and friends, the people we barbecue with. Have you forgotten the barbecue?

name: Rick
line: Wait, why would you want me to -- You're one of them, aren't you?

name: Hamurai
line: Rick, you love those barbecues, Rick. You love them. Hai!

name: Amish Cyborg
line: Remember it, Rick?

name: Rick
line: Shut up, Hamurai! Shut up, Amish Cyborg! What is this? '90s Conan?

name: All
line: Remember the barbecue. Remember the barbecue. Remember the barbecue.

name: Rick
line: You know what, Pencilvester? It took me my whole life to realize it, but I love barbecuing.

name: Pencilvester
line: You're good at it, Rick.

name: Rick
line: Watch me, baby. I'm like Tom Cruise from, um, 'Cuisine' or w-whatever that movie's called where he makes drinks. Yeah, check me out. I'm like Tom Cruise from 'Cuisine.' ( chuckles ) Yeah. Is that what it's called? 'Cuisine'?

name: Pencilvester
line: Wow! Hey, everybody. Let's give it up for the grill master, Rick! Rick! Rick! Rick! ( all chanting 'Rick' )

name: Rick
line: Wait. (cut back to the present, breathing heavily ) Noooooo! Shoot. Now look. It's like a 'Where's Waldo?' page. Can you find me? Check out all these zany characters. We'll be right back after these messages.

name: Sleepy Gary
line: I think you should put down the gun and we should get you to a doctor. What do you say we take down these blast shields?

name: All
line: Yeah.

name: Rick
line: Can't do that, Sleepy Gary. All right, everybody listen to me. I don't know if any of you guys are real, but this house has been infested with fake loved ones that spread through fake memories, and our planet will be destroyed if they get out. ( grunts )

name: Pencilvester
line: But Rick, even you have to admit you do tend to overreact to stuff.

name: Rick
line: You guys, we got to hurry. I just got back from Walmart. They're selling Nintendo 3ds systems for $149.99 on sale, plus every time you buy one, you get a $50 gift card. Brings the total price down to $110 after tax. Now, listen, we can flip those sons of bitches for 230 bucks apiece easy! They're all limited-edition 'Zelda' ones. Hurry! Hurry! Come with me! We can be rich, and we also all get to keep one and we can play Nintendo games! Nintendo, give me free stuff.

name: Rick
line: Okay, yes, I definitely remember doing that, but also, I would never do that.

name: Pencilvester
line: Don't overreact, Rick.

name: Jerry
line: Sleepy Gary, a word?

name: Sleepy Gary
line: Sure, Jerry. Rick, keep a level head, okay? 'Cause I'll tell you a secret about Frankenstein -- He's actually Frankenstein's monster.

name: Jerry
line: Sleepy Gary, m-my head is filled with memories of our friendship. I'm convinced that you're Beth's husband and I'm your friend, but if those memories can't be trusted, then...

name: Sleepy Gary
line: Jerry, just say it.

name: Jerry
line: Sleepy Gary, how do we know I'm real?

name: Sleepy Gary
line: Jesus, Jerry. No, you're real. Hey, look at me. Now, I don't know which way is up out there, but I know us, and you're real, Jerry. Remember our vacation?

name: (Jerry flashes back
line: Jerry and Gary are relaxing on a boat on the coast during a sunset.)

name: Gary
line: They're filming that new Star Wars movie down the coast. Should we check it out?

name: Jerry
line: Sure. Why not?

name: Gary
line: Maybe we'll see Chewbacca.

name: Jerry
line: I'd like that.

name: Jerry
line: What are we doing?

name: Gerry
line: I don't give a damn what else happens out there. You and I are going to survive this.

name: Jerry
line: Okay. Hey, we agreed. Never in the house.

name: Frankenstein
line: That's a cool watch there, Rick. Can I check it out?

name: Rick
line: Uh, no thank -- ( grunts ) Okay. Trying to figure out how to lower the blast shields, huh? Anybody here think it's suspicious that a lot of people in here can't wait to get out of here?

name: Frankenstein
line: Ah, you're paranoid, Rick. You've been paranoid since 'nam.

name: (Rick flashes back
line: Rick and Frankenstein are in Vietnam)

name: Rick
line: So, what are you gonna do when you rotate back to the world, Frankenstein?

name: Frankenstein
line: Shi-i-i-i-t. I'mma bust a -- ( cut back to the present, Rick grunts )

name: Rick
line: No! Get out of my head, parasite! No! Drop it. Give me the gun, Frankenstein! ( indistinct shouting ) Give it back!

name: All
line: Yeah! ( applause ) Frankenstein!

name: Rick
line: ( breathing heavily ) Is anyone here even real? Am I the only real person on earth?!

name: Reverse Giraffe
line: Maybe. Or maybe, just maybe, we're all real. You know me. I'm Reverse Giraffe. I have a short neck and legs. I went to college with Hamurai.

name: Hamurai
line: Hai!

name: Reverse Giraffe
line: I saved Ghost In A Jar's life in Vietnam.

name: Ghost in a Jar
line: Boo rah!

name: Reverse Giraffe
line: And Beth, how many times have I been a shoulder for you to cry on?

name: Beth
line: ( sighs ) Too many.

name: Reverse Giraffe
line: Okay, so maybe we're just all fake.

name: Mrs. Refrigerator
line: That don't make no sense!

name: Reverse
line: Giraffe: Or maybe, there's only one deceiver here -- The person that keeps telling us the path to salvation is being held prisoner and mistrusting each other.

name: Rick
line: Hey, don't blame me! I tried to shoot Summer 10 minutes ago!

name: Reverse Giraffe
line: I know we all have beloved memories of Rick, but are we really supposed to believe that a mad scientist inventor with a flying car just showed up on our doorstep after being gone for years?

name: Morty
line: Yeah, you know, he does have a lot of really weird, made-up sounding catchphrases.

name: Rick
line: Wubba lubba dub dub! Ricky ticky tavi, beyotch! And that's the wa-a-a-a-y the news goes. Hit the sack, jack. Uh-oh! Somersault jump. Aids! And that's why I always say shum shum shlippedy dop! Grassss tastes bad-ah. No jumpin' in the sewer. Burger time! Rubber baby baby bunkers! Lick, lick, lick my balls! ( laughs ) yeah! Say that all the time.

name: (cut back to the present) All
line: ( muttering ) That's a fake-ass catchphrase right there.

name: Beth
line: And don't forget his incredibly vague back story.

name: Rick
line: Beth, I'm your father!

name: Beth
line: Oh, are you, dad? Are you?

name: Morty
line: Rick, if you want to prove you're real, just do what any of the rest of us would do and -- and -- and open the blast shields and let us the hell out of here!

name: Rick
line: Why don't you make me, implausibly naive pubescent boy with an old Jewish comedy writer's name?

name: Mrs. Refrigerator
line: In your face!

name: Morty
line: Give me the gun. (Looks at everyone else) I'm not doing this in front of Pencilvester. Bring him to the garage. ( all cheering ) All right, you listen to me, you son of a bitch parasite scum. We could either do this the easy way or the hard way. You know, y-y-y-- do you want to live? Then open the blast shield doors.

name: Rick
line: Shut up, Morty, you brainwashed, little turd that might not even be real because I'm brainwashed, too.

name: Morty
line: You know, Rick, this isn't easy for us. You know, w-we all remember you as a friend.

name: Rick
line: Oh, oh, oh, really? Well, I remember you as a whiny, little piece of shit, Morty!

name: Morty
line: Oh -- oh, yeah?

name: Rick
line: Yeah! I've got about a thousand memories of your dumb little ass and about six of them are pleasant. The rest is annoying garbage. So why don't you do us both a favor and pull the trigger? Do it! Do it, motherfucker! Pull the fucking trigger!

name: Duck with Muscles
line: Oh, wow. Baby Wizard was a parasite? He set me up with my wife. (Morty shoots the duck, parasite screeches )

name: Rick
line: What the hell?

name: Morty
line: I figured it out, Rick! The parasites can only create pleasant memories. I know you're real because I have a ton of bad memories with you!

name: Rick
line: Holy crap, Morty, you're right.

name: Morty
line: Is -- is -- isn't that what you were trying to make me understand by yelling at me?

name: Rick
line: Well, yeah, duh-doy. T-took you long enough. (Rick turns the dial on the washing machine, the wall draws back to reveal a set of guns)

name: Rick
line: Now let's go, Morty. We got a lot of friends and family to exterminate. ( grunts )

name: Morty
line: Everybody remain calm! This is gonna take some explaining.

name: Rick
line: We need to kill everyone that we can only remember fondly. Who's got a bad memory about Mrs. Refrigerator?

name: Mrs Refrigerator
line: I-I-I-I -- everyone has bad memories of me. You remember that one time? (flashback, Beth, Jerry, Mrs. Refrigerator and a lot of other people on a roller coaster, screaming, cut back to the present) Ooh, man, we couldn't stop screaming.

name: Beth
line: Uh, roller coasters aren't bad, Mrs. Refrigerator. They're thrilling. And you've been a perfect companion to me my entire life.

name: Mrs Refrigerator
line: The jig is up! ( whimpering ) get me out of here. Get me out of here! Aah! ( screeching ) ( all gasping ) Oh, shit!

name: Rick
line: Everybody back! If you're not a parasite, you have nothing to fear. What about Summer?

name: Summer
line: Why am I always your go-to?

name: (Morty flashes back
line: Morty is hosing the backyard. Summer comes outside behind Morty and kicks him between the legs. Morty grabs his crotch and falls over in pain.)

name: Summer
line: Never go in my room again.

name: Morty
line: I didn't!

name: Morty
line: She's real. She's my bitch of a sister.

name: Summer
line: Nice.

name: (Summer flashes back
line: Summer walks into her parents' room wearing a dress and earrings with her hair done.)

name: Summer
line: Mom, are you driving me to --

name: Beth
line: Hmm? Yeah, yeah, yes. What time?

name: Summer
line: Oh, my god. Are you drunk?

name: Beth
line: (belches) (slurring) What're you, my life coach?

name: Summer
line: Your what?

name: Summer
line: Oh! God! Oh. Oh, my gosh. Oh! God! Mom!

name: Beth
line: Sweetheart, are you okay? I didn't mean to --

name: Summer
line: I'm gonna have a bruise! It's picture day!

name: Beth
line: It's not, don't overreact. I can clean it up.

name: Summer
line: (sobs) I want the police to take me!

name: Summer
line: Morty, give a gun to the lady that got pregnant with me too early and constantly makes it our problem.

name: Beth
line: Thank you, sweetie.

name: Cross Teddy Bear
line: Beth, Beth, please!

name: Beth
line: I thought it was too good to be true that we'd have compatible kidneys. (shoots the bear, parasite screeches ) ( guns cock ) ( screaming ) ( blasting ) ( screeching )

name: Rick
line: (Corners Pencilvester) Come on, man. Haven't we ever had an uncomfortable silence or an awkward fart on a road trip? Come on, Pencilvester. Give me anything.

name: Pencilvester
line: Rick, I'm Pencilvester. Listen to that name. You can't kill me.

name: Rick
line: You're right. (To Morty) Kill Pencilvester.

name: Tinkles
line: Summer, I've always loved you!

name: Summer
line: Yep. (Shoots Tinkles, parasite screeches ) ( all gasp, Summer shoots ) ( more screeching ) (Morty shouts)

name: (Summer flashes back
line: Summer walks into the kitchen and turns on the light, and sees Morty masturbating.)

name: Summer
line: Oh, my god!

name: Morty
line: I-I-I thought you went to a concert!

name: Summer
line: We forgot the tickets! Why in the kitchen?!

name: Morty
line: I do it everywhere! Stop shaming me!

name: Summer
line: You're not the victim here!

name: Morty
line: I hate you, and I was thinking about your friend Grace!

name: Summer
line: Aaaaaah!

name: Mr. Beauregard
line: Ah. Master Rick. Remember when you weren't going to shoot me? (Rick shoots Mr. Beauregard, parasite screeches )

name: Rick
line: I guess I did the butler! Ha ha! Does -- d-does that scan?

name: Ghost in a Jar
line: Oh, I-I get it. It's a play on 'the butler did it.'

name: Rick
line: Thanks, ghost in a jar. You always were good at pointing out potentially obscure comedy. (shoots ghost in a jar, parasite screeches ) ( screeches )

name: Jerry
line: You got to hide me, Sleepy Gary.

name: Sleepy Gary
line: Don't worry. I have a plan. If we can get to my boat, there's a -- (Beth shoots Sleepy Gary, Gary slowly turns back into a parasite, screeches )

name: Jerry
line: No. No! Send me to Gary. I want to be with Gary.

name: (Beth flashes back
line: Jerry and Beth are running from a homeless man toward their car. Jerry makes it to the car first, gets in and locks the doors. Beth is holding groceries and tries to open the locked car door.)

name: Beth
line: Whoa. What the hell?

name: Jerry
line: Look out for that homeless guy!

name: Beth
line: Open the door! Open the door! Open the door!

name: Jerry
line: There isn't time! Just run!

name: Beth
line: ( grunts ) Get out here and help me!

name: Jerry
line: They say you shouldn't do that! Just run!

name: Beth
line: Ugh. Sorry, Jerry. You're real.

name: Jerry
line: ( crying ) I'm a parasite!

name: Beth
line: Yeah, but you're real.

name: Jerry
line: (tries to kiss Beth)

name: Beth
line: Uh, uh, I need time to forget about Sleepy Gary.

name: Jerry
line: Me, too.

name: Rick
line: From now on, let's all be careful to wash our hands when we get back from outer space. That goes for everyone.

name: Jerry
line: This is depressing. We killed every good person in the house. We're what's left? What a family.

name: Rick
line: At least we're real, Jerry. We're real. Rikki tikki tavi!

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Ooh, whee! Amen to that. Now, this little poopypants is hungry. Will somebody pass me a pork chop? ( chomping )

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Huh. I-is -- is something wrong, Beth?

name: Rick
line: No, Beth!

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Oh, fuck.

name: Beth
line: Wait, but I --

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Oh, Beth! Why?!

name: Jerry
line: I need an ambulance! There's been a shooting. My wife shot... Uh, my -- my wife shot a long-time family friend.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Why?

name: Summer
line: Oh, my god, oh, my god, oh, my god, Mr. Poopybutthole.

name: Beth
line: I-I thought --

name: Morty
line: Keep breathing!

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Oh, god. What's happening?

name: Morty
line: Look at me! Look at me! Don't -- don't fall asleep!

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Is -- is this what bleeding to death is? Oh, whee. Is this how I die?

name: Rick
line: Oh, geez! Oh, my god!

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Why would you do this? Beth. It's not supposed to hurt. I-I thought... ( siren wails ) Ooh, whee.

name: Beth
line: Oh, he -- he's looking a lot better.

name: Rick
line: Listen, Beth, don't torture yourself. I made a similar mistake years ago, but, you know, on a planetary scale.

name: Beth
line: Is, um, is he mad at me?

name: Rick
line: He's not pressing charges. I mean, that's got to be the 'you shot me' equivalent of not being mad.

name: Beth
line: Can he have visitors?

name: Doctor
line: He'd like to be alone. He told me to tell you he's sorry you didn't have bad memories of him? If you love him, you should leave. ( door closes )

name: Rick
