line: (Smiles) And that's the wa-a-a-a-y the news goes.

name: Man
line: Hey, golf is easy now!

name: Man
line: Aahh! Golf is hard again! Golf is hard agaaaaaaain!

name: Terry
line: The view here is the same as yours, Jim. A giant head has entered Earth’s gravity, triggering climate change and natural disasters we thought were impossible for at least another eight years.

name: Jim
line: (in news studio) Let’s not make this political, Terry. Do we know what this giant head wants?

name: Giant Head
line: SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT.

name: Terry
line: Jim, you heard *static* said, “Show me what you got.”

name: Giant Head
line: SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT. I WANT TO SEE WHAT YOU GOT. (lamp post falls over, Terry runs out of frame)

name: Rick
line: Oh boy. Time to go, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Uhh, where?

name: Rick
line: The Pentagon. I mean, not THE Pentagon. *burp* The lame one, here on Earth.

name: Summer
line: Is it God? If it’s God, do we get out of school?

name: Beth
line: It’s not God, Summer.

name: Jerry
line: She’s allowed to think it’s God if she wants, honey!

name: Beth
line: Shut up, Jerry.

name: Jerry
line: Ok...

name: Beth
line: Dad, what do you know about this?

name: Rick
line: Morty and I are going to look into it. You guys hold tight.

name: Mr. Goldenfold
line: Scary stuff, huh? Pretty freaky. Hi, I’m Morty’s math teacher. I’m also part of the street team inviting folks to the church downtown so we can pray together.

name: Beth
line: How is praying going to help?

name: Mr. Goldenfold
line: Ma’am, a giant head in the sky is controlling the weather. Did you wanna play checkers? Let’s be rational! I’ll see you at God’s house! (leaves)

name: President
line: Gentlemen, gentlemen, one at a time! Simon?

name: Simon
line: SETI, NORAD, and every broadcaster on the planet are attempting to show this being what humanity’s got. String theory, world history, the human genome.

name: Nathan
line: Have you tried sending it launch codes? Mr. President, what America’s got is 70,000 megatons of KABOOM-BOOM! And I say we show it right up this floating head’s ass!

name: Guards
line: Hold it! Don’t move! (they approach Rick and Morty with guns)

name: Rick
line: Stay back! This watch turns people into snakes!

name: President
line: Stand down. Everybody stand down! I’m the leader of these people and I’m unarmed. There’s no need for any more snake-makery.

name: Rick
line: My name is Rick Sanchez. This here’s my grandson Morty. (drinks from flask)

name: Everyone
line: Hi, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Hey.

name: Rick
line: I’ve seen enough of the galaxy to know that what we’ve got here is a Cromulon from the Signus 5 Expanse. So you can forget about nukes, and you can forget about math. (points to viewscreen showing floating head) This head won’t go away until *burp* Earth shows them it’s got a hit song.

name: Everyone
line: Seriously, that’s impossible, etc...

name: Simon
line: You mean like Vivaldi?

name: Rick
line: No, Frasier. A live performance of a newly-written, catchy, original song. The Cromulon feed on the talent and showmanship of less-evolved lifeforms.

name: President
line: All right, all right. Thank you, Mr. Sanchez. Change of plan, people. Get me Pharrell, Randy Newman, Billy Corgan, and The-Dream. (no one responds) The-Dream? He wrote “Umbrella” and “Single Ladies”? You people haven’t heard of The-Dream?

name: Rick
line: You’re gonna wanna put them on that giant speaker system at your sonic testing facility at Area 51.

name: Nathan
line: How do you know about that?

name: President
line: For God’s sake, Nathan, the man turns people into snakes. He can use Google Maps.

name: Aide
line: Sir! Pharrell, Newman, Corgan, and that Dream guy. They’re all dead.

name: President
line: What? How is that possible? Do people just die when I name them?

name: Aide
line: The Grammys, sir. There was an earthquake and all the musicians... (sniffs, holding back tears) All the famous ones, they’re gone.

name: President
line: Dear God.

name: Aide
line: Hold on, sir, just a minute. Ice-T survived. He’s inbound on an F-15, ETA two hours.

name: Rick
line: Good luck, Mr. President.

name: Simon
line: Sir, the magnetic poles are about to reverse. In two hours, there may not be an Earth to save.

name: President
line: Sanchez! Are you a musician?

name: Rick
line: I dabble, Mr. President.

name: President
line: Get this man and his grandson on a Blackhawk to Area 51.

name: Father Bob
line: People! Everyone! Remain calm! Every crisis of faith is an opportunity for more faith! When God deals you an 11, you don’t fold! You double down, and always hit on a soft 16. That means you, Jews.

name: Jew
line: I beg your pardon, pastor, but the last I looked outside, it seems to be you that’s been dealt the weak hand. Jews rule! (no one responds) Nobody? Ok, tough church.

name: Principal Vagina
line: Hi, Principal Vagina. The name’s real, possibly Scandinavian. I’m just gonna come out and make this pitch. The old gods are dead. Fuck all previous existing religions. All hail the one true god, the giant head in the sky.

name: Principal Vagina
line: Ah, di di di di. (to Bob) Bob, Bob, I get it. But unless this (holds up a necklace with a cross) can beat that... what have you done for me lately? (tosses necklace to Bob) So if you wanna excuse me, I’m going out on the sidewalk and dropping to my knees and pledging my eternal soul to the thing that literally controls the fucking weather! (walks out) Outta my way!

name: Pastor Bob
line: Ok, if sanity’s been restored to this assembly, I’d like to talk about the cost of repairing our new organ. Sally, the plate, please.

name: Mr. Goldenfold
line: (holds up a dollar) Ohhhh, this is my favorite part!

name: Morty
line: Rick, are you really a musician?

name: Rick
line: Who’s NOT a musician, Morty?

name: Morty
line: Me!

name: Rick
line: Yeah, not with that attitude.

name: Jump Master
line: We’re in the drop zone! I’m the jump master! My name’s Jamey! With an E-Y! Go, go, go! (Rick slides down rope)

name: Morty
line: B-b-but we don’t have a song!

name: Principal Vagina
line: Giant head in the sky, please forgive all that we’ve done. We’re sorry for increased levels of emissions and our racism. And of course, the amber alerts I keep ignoring on my phone.

name: Rick and Morty
line: WhooooOOOOAHHHH!!!!

name: Rick
line: (picks up a microphone) All right, Morty, let’s get ready to do it! Why don’t you, uh, find a button on one of those keyboards and lay down some kind of beat?

name: Morty
line: Rick, I think we need to cut our losses. We get our family and portal out of here!

name: Rick
line: Morty! Good music comes from people who are relaxed. Just hit a button, Morty! Gimme a beat!

name: Morty
line: Oh man, ok, all right, um...

name: Rick
line: Ahhhhh yeahhhhh

name: Nathan
line: Get... schwifty? What the hell is that?

name: President
line: It’s our world’s best effort, that’s what.

name: Rick
line: Take off your pants and your panties

name: Nathan
line: Mr. Bulldops?

name: President
line: Don’t analyze it, Nathan. It’s working!

name: Rick
line: Take a shit on the floor

name: Pastor Bob
line: And third-level donors get our all access family pass.

name: Summer
line: Listen! The storm is stopping!

name: Rick
line: Hey, take your pants off

name: Giant Head
line: Hmmmm.

name: Principal Vagina
line: Please be kind to us for we are but tiny things with entire bodies stuck to your ground.

name: Giant Head
line: I LIKE WHAT YOU GOT. GOOD JOB.

name: Beth
line: Now hold on a second, let’s be rational about this.

name: Beth
line: No, I’m... I’m just saying, we don’t know if there’s a cause-effect relationship --

name: Beth
line: Oh, God, what’s going on now?

name: President
line: What the hell happened?

name: Aide
line: Mr. President, you’re gonna wanna see this.

name: Rick
line: I think planet Earth has just been transported.

name: Principal Vagina
line: The head has left and sent its children!

name: Beth
line: Holy CRAP!

name: Summer
line: Oh dear giant head, we apologize for that discussion! It will never happen again!

name: Simon
line: Sir, we’ve started picking up on a garbled signal. We’re decrypting it now.

name: Cromulon
line: WE ASKED THEM TO SHOW US WHAT THEY GOT. AND THEY DID. NOW WE’LL SEE WHICH OF THEM HAS GOT THE MOST. 24 HOURS, FIVE PLANETS, FIVE SONGS. BUT IN THE END, THERE CAN ONLY BE ONE. PLANET MUSIC! All participation is involuntary. Disqualified and losing planets are disintegrated by plasma ray.

name: Rick
line: Uhh, it’s probably a bad time to mention it, but any astronauts you guys had in orbit are definitely dead.

name: Cromulon
line: Welcome back to Planet Music! First up, let’s hear the latest song from planet Parblesnops. The Greebybobes! SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT.

name: Greebybobe
line: Hold it, hold it, stop! Music isn’t about competition or captivity! If you love music, you love freedom. Let these worlds be free, please!

name: Cromulon
line: DISQUALIFIED!

name: Cromulon
line: There’s one every season. Moving on to planet Arbolez Meterosos. Arbolian Meterososians. SHOW US WHAT YOU GOT.

name: Arbolian Meterososian
line: Ah two, three, four...

name: Aide
line: Rick, Morty, Ice-T. The timetable’s moved up. Earth’s on in six hours.

name: Morty
line: Like we’re not already under enough pressure! (Morty flips a bowl of peanuts at the aide and it hits him in the head. The aide leaves.)

name: Rick and Ice-T
line: Whoa ho ho ho ho!

name: Rick
line: Geez, Morty. The guy’s just doing his job. Take it easy.

name: Morty
line: Rick, Ice-T, could you guys take it less easy?! We’ve got six hours to come up with a song!

name: Rick
line: Genius happens in the moment, Morty. (walks over to keyboard)

name: Morty
line: Well, can we at least go get our family? You know, so we can take them with-with-with us if we lose?

name: Rick
line: That’s planning for failure, Morty. Even dumber than regular planning. (presses a button on the keyboard) Balls.

name: Rick
line: Morty, Morty, stop! Listen! There’s only so much charge left in this thing. If we portal home from here and back, we’re not gonna have enough charge left to get off-world. Get it?

name: Morty
line: What?!

name: Rick
line: Yeah, *burp* you see, I try to shelter you from certain realities, *burp* Morty. Cause if I let you make me nervous, then we can’t get schwifty.

name: Morty
line: Stop saying it like it’s a thing! You made it up!

name: Rick
line: Hey, Morty! Could you lick my... (Rick presses keys on the keyboard with the sample of him saying “Balls”)

name: Morty
line: Rick, cut it out! That’s not funny, Rick!

name: Nathan
line: I’ve seen enough. These guys are one-hit wonders.

name: President
line: And what’s your plan, General?

name: Nathan
line: We still have the nuclear option. On my word, we can launch a nuclear missile at every one of those heads in the sky.

name: President
line: Our planet’s held captive on a live game show and your solution is to shoot the audience? You can put your faith in nukes if we get through this, General. Until then, I’ll put mine in Rick and Morty. “Get Schwifty” was a jam.

name: Principal Vagina
line: Hello? Yes sir, yeah. Thank you sir, thank you. He says he’s proud of what we’re doing and hopes we have a great Ascension Festival! Happy Ascension!

name: All
line: Happy Ascension!

name: Beth
line: We should pack up and leave town now.

name: Jerry
line: I think it’s inspiring that our community is coping with fear in a way that involves a festival and homemade ice cream. If you’d stop being such an evangelical atheist, you might start enjoying yourself.

name: Jerry
line: Whoa! Look at you! You’re wearing the hat and everything!

name: Summer
line: Here’s yours! (puts hat on Jerry) Mom, do you mind if I cook dinner tonight?

name: Beth
line: Yeah, sure. Wait, what??

name: Summer
line: I love you guys. You gave me life. And it’s the will of the many heads that all children honor their parents.

name: Beth
line: Dinner sounds nice.

name: Ethan
line: Pardon, Mr. and Mrs. Smith. Summer, are you coming to the Ascension?

name: Summer
line: Father, can we please go to the Ascension?

name: Jerry
line: Sure! Let’s go to the Ascension. Wh-wh-what is it?

name: Principal Vagina
line: We hereby send these un-wantables skyward that they might be inhaled by the many heads, later to be sneezed back to us as better babies! (cuts first rope) Headward, free now to rise. (cuts second rope) Headward, free now to rise. (cuts third rope) Headward, free now to rise.

name: Summer
line: Oh yes, yes! Rise to the giant head! You are free to be free!

name: Ice-T
line: A squeegee comes up from the garage, right? And he’s got a lobster in one hand and movie tickets in the other. He’s like, “I’m ready!”

name: Ice-T
line: Who would take a lobster to see Iron Man 3?

name: Ice-T
line: Aw, damn. We’re out of original flavor Fig Newtons. I should get going anyway.

name: Rick
line: Wait, wait, wait! Come on, h-hold on a second!

name: Morty
line: What?!

name: Ice-T
line: Damn. You didn’t tell me you fuck around with portals and shit.

name: Morty
line: That’s it!

name: Rick
line: Whoa, whoa! Morty! Give me that!

name: Morty
line: You lied! You lied about the charge! You were just being lazy! Get back! Sit down!

name: Rick
line: Morty, just put it down. You don’t know what you’re doing.

name: Morty
line: I’m going to go find Mom and Dad.

name: Rick
line: Nooooo!

name: Rick
line: Ahhhh, shit!

name: President
line: Ah, shit.

name: Morty
line: Ahhh, shit.

name: Summer
line: And then Ethan played guitar and we learned the Seven Contemplations of the Head by singing them. It was really fun. Praise be the head!

name: Jerry and Beth
line: Praise be the...

name: Jerry
line: Yeah.

name: Principal Vagina
line: Hi folks, Head Priest Vagina. Thanks for farming all those potatoes. It’s 6 p.m., so if you’re a parent, you’re now entitled to adoration from your children.

name: Summer
line: I’m going to start dinner! (walks into the house)

name: Beth
line: I don’t know what to say. Summer is doing really well here.

name: Jerry
line: She’s aced every test in potato class, and look how important potatoes have become.

name: Beth
line: She’s not getting pregnant or doing drugs or missing curfew...

name: Balloon Man
line: Please help me! You can reach me if you try. Please help me!!

name: Beth
line: That’s not our business as long as Summer is thriving!

name: Summer
line: Taco time! (Summer pulls off the lid to reveal exactly 12 tacos.) I hope it pleases you as the head desires.

name: Beth
line: That’s wonderful, Summer!

name: Jerry
line: We’re so proud of you. But honestly, you don’t have to make dinner every night.

name: Summer
line: Of course I do, silly! (gasps and drops lid) Oh my God, daddy, I’m sorry I called you silly! I’m so sorry! (turns around and drops to knees) Heavenly head and cranial creator! Forgive my transgressions against family and community! May my chores complete me as I complete them!

name: Birdperson
line: Morty.

name: Morty
line: Birdperson?

name: Birdperson
line: You appear to be dying. I will make efforts to prevent this, but can promise nothing.

name: Rick
line: Wh-What do you think, Ice? Probably a little over-developed.

name: Ice-T
line: Shit. Over-developed, under-developed. Bad songs are bad songs.

name: Rick
line: Well, do you think maybe, could you give me some help with it, or... ?

name: Ice-T
line: Ah, hell no, man. You do your thing, but I can’t afford to get my pride wrapped up in your shame. You know what I’m sayin’?

name: Rick
line: Ice, I don’t want to be a negative Nelly or anything, but *burp* if Morty doesn’t come back with my portal gun and I eat it out there, it’s, uh, kind of your problem too.

name: Ice-T
line: Pfff. I ain’t worried about no Earth blowin’ up, man.

name: Rick
line: What? Why not?

name: Ice-T
line: Yo, this is why.

name: Rick
line: What the fuck? You can turn into ice?

name: Ice-T
line: My story begins at the dawn of time in the far away realm of Alphabetrium. There, every being is a letter of the alphabet. But I was frozen and exiled to the cosmos by my elders as punishment for not caring enough about anything. Earth is just one of the many stops on my lifelong journey with no destination. So you better believe I don’t care if it blows up! Cause I’ll just be ice, floatin’ through space, like a comet!

name: Rick
line: Take it from me, Ice. *burp* You can’t just *burp* float around space not caring about stuff forever.

name: Ice-T
line: Pshhhh. Man, watch me. Good luck, Rick.

name: President
line: Ok, things are getting out of hand. I better make sure Rick has everything he needs to “get schwifty.”

name: Nathan
line: Oh, for God’s sake, that’s enough.

name: President
line: What the hell are you doing, Nathan? I’m the goddamn President of the United fuckin’ States!

name: Nathan
line: I’m setting the nuclear option to launch one minute into Earth’s performance. And you, Mr. President, I hope you like being hit in the face with a gun!

name: President
line: Wait, wait, wait, why-why --

name: Birdperson
line: I believe I can access the history of Rick’s gun and help you get back to him.

name: Morty
line: But can you help me get to my family? You know, at my house?

name: Birdperson
line: Is your intention to abandon Rick using his own portal gun? In bird culture, this is considered a dick move.

name: Morty
line: All of Rick’s moves are dick moves! Wh-what am I eating? What is this, bird seed?

name: Birdperson
line: It is random debris. I found it in my carpet. I don’t know what humans eat.

name: Tammy
line: You know what THIS human eats!

name: Birdperson
line: Don’t be gross, Tammy.

name: Tammy
line: (leans over to Morty and whispers) Bird... dick.

name: Morty
line: Tammy... gross. Birdperson, you always stick up for Rick, but he doesn’t care about anyone but himself. He doesn’t think about the consequences of anything he does.

name: Birdperson
line: And as a result, he has the power to save or destroy entire worlds. And he is the reason you and I know each other. And the reason I’m alive at all.

name: Morty
line: What’s that? Who’s that baby?

name: Birdperson
line: Morty, suppose you could retrieve your family from Earth but had to abandon Rick. I could give your loved ones shelter on Birdworld, even jobs, possibly as worm ranchers. How often do you think you might look up at the stars and wonder what might have been had you just put your faith in Rick?

name: Cromulon
line: That was Chunky Tunk with “Full Ming Mong, Empty Gorp Dorp.” Up next, planet Earth!

name: Morty
line: Oh God! We’re up?!?!

name: Principal Vagina
line: Jerry and Beth, your family is a golden example of what Headism has to offer the world.

name: Beth
line: The world?

name: Principal Vagina
line: Headism is a hit. We’re taking it worldwide and would like Jerry to be our church’s “Head” of Advertising.

name: Jerry
line: You... would?

name: Principal Vagina
line: Beth, we’d like to promote you from horse surgeon, straight past human surgeon, to “Head” of Medicine.

name: Beth
line: That’s my dream! That’s my dream.

name: Jerry
line: Thank you. This is all so overwhelming, but, uh... we can’t.

name: Beth
line: Absolutely not.

name: Principal Vagina
line: I’m sorry?

name: Beth
line: We’ve been waiting 16 years for our daughter to respect us, but the key is, it has to be “our” daughter, not this person she’s become.

name: Jerry
line: We’ll take our chances raising her without fancy new jobs outside of a potato-based religion. (turns and puts his hands on Beth’s shoulders) And you know what? I’m sick of pretending that we’re together because of the kids in the first place! I married you because you’re the love of my life!

name: Beth
line: (puts her hands on Jerry’s sides) And I‘m lucky to have you and I never tell you that! You know, we will come out of this stronger as a family!

name: (Cut
line: Summer has tied Beth and Jerry to ropes and balloons outside.)

name: Beth
line: Please don’t do this, please don’t do this! Summer!

name: Jerry

line: Oh! Ow! Ahh! (Eventually, Morty gets up.)

name: Jessica
line: So, how do you feel, Morty?

name: Morty
line: Ah, geez. I’m miserable.

name: Rick
line: Am I good or what?

name: Morty
line: I guess it’s worth it, though, to know how much you care.

name: Jessica
line: Care? Me? Morty, I’m fine with you. I only did this for him. (Points at Rick.)

name: Rick
line: You lying bitch. She kept coming to our house, Morty, and kept asking me. 'Did did d-did you get a new Morty yet?'

name: Jessica
line: Because you kept drunk dialing me and crying about it.

name: Rick
line: I wasn’t crying!

name: Morty
line: Jacquelyn, I I-I-I wasn’t who I said I was.

name: Jacquelyn
line: You weren’t a 14-year-old boy from the Midwest who ran away from his family and capitalized on his lack of conscience by becoming a stock broker?

name: Morty
line: Oh. I guess I was pretty up front about that, wasn’t I?

name: Jacquelyn
line: You were up front about everything. You were my soul mate.

name: Morty
line: Well No-Not anymore. I’ll, um Y-You can keep the apartment, and and and, uh the drones.

name: Rick
line: She can’t keep the drones. They turn into a little Voltron robot. They’re awesome.

name: Rick
line: You can’t keep the drones.

name: Tricia
line: So, how was your date with Brad?

name: Jessica
line: It wasn’t a date. We were just having lunch.

name: Holly
line: You guys are getting back together, aren’t you?

name: Morty
line: (Looks down, sad.)

name: Rick
line: (Comes out of nowhere.) Morty, I need your help on an adventure. Eh, 'need' is a strong word. We need door stops, but a brick would work, too.

name: Morty
line: Okay.

name: Jessica
line: Morty.

name: Morty
line: (Morty stops and looks at Jessica and smiles.)

name: Jessica
line: Good to have you back.

name: Tricia
line: Have you ever been peed on before? Oh, my God. Yum.

name: Credits song
line: Hey, did you ever want to hold a terrifold? I got one right here Grab my terri-flap Squeeze it Grab it, squeeze it Tug on my terri-flap Hey, I want to take you to The terrifold dance Wanna come with me? You can grab my holdie-folds Squeeze ‘em tight You son of a bitch. Suck my holdie-flappy folds Lick my flappy foldie-holes My terri-flaps in your mouth Suck my flaps, you piece of shit. Whoo!

name: Man
line: Although only a handful of moon towers remain today, they were popular in the late 19th century. An entire town could be illuminated by... (He sees the containment unit.) What the hell is this? (Out of curiosity, he presses a button, releasing toxin gas, and slimey Stacy. The man backs away, and accidentally falls off the tower, screaming all the way down.)

name: Stacey
line: Sea Cucumber! Sea Cucumber!!

name: Rick
line: Alright, Morty. You ready for our adventure to the lost city of Atlantis?

name: Morty
line: *gives a thumbs-up* Ready as I’ll ever be, Rick!

name: Rick
line: Oh, for fuck’s sake.

name: Rick K-22
line: *holding clipboard* Hello, I’m Rick K-22. This is my Morty. (Morty K-22 waves.) We’re going from reality to reality, asking Ricks to contribute to the Citadel of Ricks redevelopment fund.

name: Rick
line: What are you, stupid? We’re done with the Citadel of Ricks. I was *burp* never on board with it in the first place, that’s why I murdered everyone in charge and left it to rot.

name: Rick K-22
line: *examines clipboard* Ohhh. That was you. *passes clipboard to his Morty*

name: Morty
line: They tried to murder him first.

name: Morty K-22
line: Oh geez. Well, you’ll be happy to know that... the Council’s gone now.

name: Morty
line: Yeah, he knows. He murdered them.

name: Rick K-22
line: You wanna rein in your Morty?

name: Rick
line: *glaring* Every day.

name: Morty K-22
line: *reading from script* The Citadel of Ricks redevelopment fund donates--

name: Rick K-22
line: *interrupts* Morty, he’s not gonna *belch* donate. You’re pitching the policeman’s ball to a black teenager here. *pulls out his portal gun and shoots a new portal* Let’s go.

name: Rick
line: You don’t have to be a dick.

name: Rick K-22
line: I think you know that’s not true.

name: Morty
line: Geez. I didn’t know there were still Ricks and Mortys living on the Citadel. I wonder what their day-to-day lives are like.

name: Rick
line: *straps harpoon gun to his back* Well, you can keep wondering that while we go on our fun, fresh, self-contained adventure to Atlantis. *shoots a portal* Anyone continuing to explore the Citadel is either stupid, or one of the unfortunate millions held hostage by their terrible ideas.

name: Morty
line: Man. Glad I’m not one of them!

name: [Title
line: Rick and Morty/Tales from the Citadel]

name: Rick (voiceover)
line: Citadel Morning News: News about the Citadel in the morning. Pretty self explanatory.

name: Rick D716-B
line: Good morning. I’m Rick D716-B.

name: Rick D716
line: And I’m Rick D716.

name: Rick D716-B
line: Must be nice.

name: Rick D716
line: Coming up! Gravity outages in East Sanchez Heights!

name: Rick D716-B
line: And, is your uranium-powered cellular matrix making you sick? The answer may not surprise you. It’s ‘yes, it’s uranium.’

name: Rick D716
line: Those stories and more after this break.

name: Narrator
line: Sixteen iterations off the central finite curve, there’s a Rick that works more with wood than polarity plating.

name: Narrator
line: His name is Simple Rick, but he’s no dummy.

name: Narrator
line: He realized long ago that the greatest thing he’d ever create was his daughter.

name: Young Beth
line: I love Daddy!

name: Narrator
line: We captured that moment and run it on a loop through Simple Rick’s mind.

name: Narrator
line: And the chemical that makes his brain secrete goes into every Simple Rick’s Simple Wafer Cookie. (Said wafer is displayed on-screen.) Come home to the impossible flavor of your own completion. Come home to Simple Rick’s.

name: Rick D716
line: Just one day remains before our newly democratic Citadel elects its first president. It’s anyone’s race among the Rick candidates.

name: Rick D716-B
line: But a certain other candidate should be getting at least one vote for most adorable.

name: Rick D716 (voiceover)
line: That’s right, the Morty Party candidate’s still in the race, and you just gotta love him for that.

name: Rick D716 (voiceover)
line: Here you see him in his little Morty suit, waving. Isn’t that adorable? Little jackass.

name: Rick D716-B (voiceover)
line: Uh, yeah, I think we actually have the audio for his speech here. “Aw geez, aw man, I’m gonna lose the election and stuff.”

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: We had a good run, sir, but I think it’s time to pull out of the race.

name: Candidate Morty
line: I feel pretty confident about tonight’s debate.

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: You shouldn’t, sir. You should be terrified.

name: Candidate Morty
line: Maybe you should find a little faith, young man.

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: You don’t pay me to have faith! And we’re the same age!

name: Cop Rick
line: Oh! S-sorry, I was expecting--

name: Cop Morty
line: A Rick partner? Lesson one, rookie: expect the unexpected. Now get in.

name: Morty
line: Mortys are human!

name: Cop Morty
line: Get the fuck off the car, you Rickless fuckin’ animal! (He pulls a lever and the car sends a taser shock through Morty, who falls aside.)

name: Morty
line: WHOA!! (The Mortys disperse and Cop Morty resumes driving.)

name: Cop Morty
line: The election’s got these yellow shirts more riled up than a Picture Day Jessica.

name: Cop Rick
line: That’s pretty harsh, sir.

name: Cop Morty
line: So report me. Nobody gives a fuck.

name: Cop Rick
line: Look, I’m just saying. Makes me a little sad to hear a Morty cop calling Mortys “animals”.

name: Cop Morty
line: Well, it makes me sad to see another Rick cop buying into his sensitivity training.

name: Cop Rick
line: Well, I’m glad to know there’s more like me.

name: Cop Morty
line: Oh, there was one. Why do you think that seat was empty?

name: Dispatch
line: Robbery at Fifth and *BURP* Avenue.

name: Cop Rick
line: Fifth and *BURP*? That’s Mortytown.

name: Cop Morty
line: (to dispatch) Unit 7 responding.

name: Teacher Rick
line: (spoken inside) 'Good idea, Rick.'

name: Students
line: (all together) Good idea, Rick.

name: Teacher Rick
line: 'This is a great adventure.'

name: Students
line: This is a great adventure.

name: Teacher Rick
line: 'I love being your new Morty.'

name: Students
line: I love being your new Mor...

name: Slick
line: (substituting for the word Morty) Farty!

name: Teacher Rick
line: Very amusing, Mr. Smith. Almost as amusing as when your first Rick was decapitated on Zorpathion 9. (Slick’s smug face becomes downcast.) Or was that your third Rick? How many Ricks have you had?

name: Slick
line: Five...

name: Teacher Rick
line: I see. So you are top of the class in something. (All the Mortys besides Slick laugh.) Tomorrow you will be transferred to your new Ricks. Hopefully, they will be your last. Yes, Slow Ri-- Tall Morty?

name: Tall Morty
line: Di-Did I gragitate this time yet?

name: Teacher Rick
line: Anything’s possible, Tall Morty. Ugh...

name: Lizard Morty
line: Guess we won’t be seein’ each other after this, huh?

name: Slick
line: I say we make our last day count. I say... we go to the Wishing Portal.

name: Glasses Morty
line: That’s a myth.

name: Fat Morty
line: It’s not a myth! M-m-my first Rick’s fourth Morty knew a Rick whose Morty went there.

name: Lizard Morty
line: If we’re not here for graduation, our butts are gonna end up in Mortytown.

name: Slick
line: I thought your last Rick fused you with a lizard, not a chicken.

name: Lizard Morty
line: Okay, fine. I’m in.

name: Glasses Morty
line: Me too.

name: Fat Morty
line: What the hell?

name: Lizard Morty
line: *retracts tongue* I-I thought I saw a fly.

name: Supervisor Rick
line: *whistles* Listen up, fucknuts! I’ve been your supervisor for five years but all shitty things must come to an end, and I have been promoted to regional manager. (Factory Ricks cheer unenthusiastically.) Yeah, I feel the same way. May we never meet again. Of course that makes the position of Supervisor available. (Rick J-22 looks hopeful.) So as of next week, the ass you’ll be kissing will be that of... (Rick J-22 smiles) K-83, (He frowns again) affectionately known as “Cool Rick.”

name: Cool Rick
line: I know I’m new to the Citadel and some of you might not think I’ve put in my time, but what can I say? I’m Cool Rick! *finger guns* Yo, ha-ha-ha, check me out!

name: Supervisor Rick
line: Alright, knuckle-*burp*-heads, any questions? (Rick J-22 raises his hand.) Alright then, back to work, you gold-Rickers.

name: Cop Morty
line: No Ricks, no families, high off their asses and runnin’ amok. Mortys are raised to be sidekicks. Without a side to kick, they just start kickin’.

name: Morty Mart Morty
line: They were, they were about my height, around fourteen years old... OH! Their shirts were yellow!

name: Cop Morty
line: *sarcastically* Yeah, make sure you get that down.

name: Cop Rick
line: Any mutations? Augmentations? Three eyes, a tail, maybe a buzzcut?

name: Morty Mart Morty
line: No, just four normal Mortys.

name: Purple Trunk Morty
line: *feels annoyed* 'Normal'?

name: Morty Mart Morty
line: *talks back to Purple Morty* Put it in your blog.

name: Cop Morty
line: *looking at two Mortys in a nearby alley* Lemme turn over a few rocks.

name: Cop Morty
line: Aw geez, hey, what’s goin’ on, fellas?

name: Morty 1
line: Aw geez, man, nothin’ man, we’re just hangin’ out and stuff.

name: Cop Morty
line: I hear that, ah geez, I guess I’m supposed to be figuring out who robbed the store across the street but aw geez I dunno.

name: Morty 2
line: *smirking* Ah geez man, that sucks that your Rick’s makin’ you do that.

name: Cop Morty
line: *angered* He’s not my Rick. He’s my partner. Aw, geez.

name: Morty 1
line: Well, maybe the uniform makes a big difference. Who am I to say? To me, you just look like a sidekick.

name: Cop Morty
line: CALL ME A SIDEKICK ONE MORE TIME! CALL ME A SIDEKICK!!

name: Morty 2
line: Hey man! C’mon, aw geez!

name: Cop Morty
line: WANNA SEE HOW I PAINT A WALL?!

name: Morty 2
line: It was the Mortytown Locos, man! The Mortytown Locos!

name: Cop Rick
line: Do you realize how many codes you just violated?

name: Cop Morty
line: Aw geez, Rick. What do I know about knowin’ stuff? Get in the fucking car.

name: Retired General Rick
line: More lasers.

name: Moderator Rick
line: You can take more time to answer the question if you’d like.

name: Moderator Rick
line: ...Okay, Juggling Rick. How would you solve the Citadel’s financial crisis?

name: Juggling Rick
line: First off, can I just say that I think this Citadel is the greatest in the entire multiverse. Now, I believe the answer to your question has three parts. (He reveals he’s holding three balls.) First, education spending must get muuuch higher! *starts tossing one ball*

name: Juggling Rick
line: But it has to be balanced with defense! *starts juggling all three balls* Whoa!

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: Can we fact-check this, please? Never mind, who am I kidding? This race is over.

name: Juggling Rick
line: *now juggling three balls and a chainsaw, he catches them all gracefully* And that’s how you run a Citadel. *bows*

name: Moderator Rick
line: Candidate Morty. The number of displaced Mortys is soaring, while Rick satisfaction levels are plummeting, and the divide between the two groups has never been wider. *smirks* Solve that one real quick.

name: Candidate Morty
line: I don’t see a divide between Ricks and Mortys.

name: Retired General Rick
line: Oh, shocker. *farts*

name: Reverse Rick Outrage
line: I’d like to offer a rebuttal. *farts*

name: Rick Guilt Rick
line: Gentlemen, gentlemen! I think we can all agree on one thing. *farts twice* Well, came out as two things, but you get the idea.

name: Candidate Morty
line: You guys finished? (Continues his speech.) The division I see is between the Ricks and Mortys that like the Citadel divided, and the rest of us. I see it everywhere I go.

name: Candidate Morty
line: I see it in our schools, where they teach Mortys we’re all the same because they’re threatened by what makes us unique.

name: Candidate Morty
line: I see it in our streets, where they give guns to Mortys so we’re too busy fighting each other to fight real injustice.

name: Candidate Morty
line: I see it in our factories, where Ricks work for a fraction of their boss’s salary, even though they’re identical and have the same IQ. The Citadel’s problem isn’t homeless Mortys or outraged Ricks.

name: Candidate Morty
line: The Citadel’s problem is the Ricks and Mortys feeding on the Citadel’s debt.

name: Rick J-22
line: Holy shit. (As the alarm rings, he runs out of the office and enters the Flavor Core chamber.)

name: Rick Worker
line: He's headed for the Flavor Core!

name: Candidate Morty
line: But I’ve got a message for them, from the Ricks and Mortys keeping it alive. A message... from the Ricks and Mortys that believe in this Citadel to the Ricks and Mortys that don’t: you are outnumbered!

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: Holy shit. (Candidate Morty walks backstage.) I don’t believe it! I-I can’t believe it!

name: Candidate Morty
line: I know. *puts a hand on his shoulder* That’s why you’re fired. *walks away*

name: Juggling Rick
line: Sounds like you’re looking for work. I can offer you a very enticing compensation package. *sets down bag and unzips it, pulling out three juggling clubs* First, let’s talk benefits.

name: Simple Rick
line: *mumbling to self* Daddy loves you... That’s Daddy’s good girl.

name: Rick J-22
line: *to Simple Rick* Your life is a lie, man. *to police* All your lives are lies! Don’t you get it?! They told us we were special because we were Ricks, but they stripped us of anything that made us unique!

name: Negotiator Rick
line: *through megaphone* We know how you feel. We’re working stiff Ricks just like you, but our assembly line is justice. What are your demands?

name: Rick J-22
line: *burp* I-I-I want a portal gun. Unregistered, untraceable, with enough fluid to take me off this goddamn prison!

name: SWAT Team Rick
line: The media’s outside.

name: Negotiator Rick
line: Well, keep ‘em there!

name: Rick D716-C
line: Anyway, so yeah, the suspect says the Citadel is a lie, built on lies, and some other shit. (Now sharing the screen with Rick D716 and Rick D716-B.) I say, appreciate the life you have, because it can always be worse. Back to you, Ricks.

name: Rick D716
line: Thank you, Rick 716-C. *mumbling to D716-B* That fuckin’ guy.

name: Rick D716-B
line: Tell me about it.

name: Rick D716
line: Ahem. Meanwhile, in election news, an unexpected turn of events as Morty from the Morty Party soars to the top of the polls.

name: Candidate Morty
line: Yes?

name: Reporter Rick
line: Morty! What’s your original reality and where’s your Rick?

name: Candidate Morty
line: Gosh. We moved around so much it’s hard to remember. I see every Rick as my Rick.

name: Candidate Morty
line: I hope they see me as their Morty.

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: *holding glass* Another, please, with less water.

name: Bartender Morty
line: *fixing a new drink* Hey, cheer up, pal! A Morty’s gonna be president. *gestures to TV* Imagine this kisser gettin’ blamed for everything!

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: I guess I shoulda had more faith.

name: Investigator Rick
line: It’s not faith you need. It’s fear.

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: What’s this?

name: Investigator Rick
line: *drains his glass* It’s secrets. Wh-wh-what do you think it is? *Gets up and walks away* Look at how I’m dressed.

name: Rick Reporter (on TV)
line: Taking on the system like this, are you afraid at all for your safety?

name: Candidate Morty (on TV)
line: I’d rather live in hope than fear. (Campaign Manager Morty looks shocked at the documents, then looks up at the TV.) If I had to fear anything, I’d fear other people being afraid. Of fear. Itself.

name: Candidate Morty (on TV)
line: But no, I’m not afraid.

name: Mortytown Loco
line: Hey Rick, man, when there’s a Morty president, you gonna lick my balls or what?

name: Bootleg Rick
line: Shit, grandson, you keep me peelin’ squap-squams and slippin’ nib-nibs I’ll lick whatever ain’t nailed down.

name: Cop Rick
line: Hands in the air!

name: Mortytown Loco
line: What the hell, man? What the hell in hell?

name: Cop Morty
line: You guys doin’ a little chemistry homework with Grandpa?

name: Cop Rick
line: Is this what I think it is?

name: Cop Morty
line: Bootleg portal fluid.

name: Cop Morty
line: Guess his math was off. Search the place.

name: Psychopath Morty
line: A-Are you... m-my new... Rick?

name: Cop Rick
line: It’s okay, Morty.

name: Cop Morty
line: Jesus!

name: Cop Rick
line: He stabbed me! He got me bad, Morty.

name: Cop Morty
line: *approaches Rick and kneels down beside him* Shh, it’s okay, you’re okay.

name: Cop Rick
line: You were right... *cough* Everything I learned in the academy was--

name: Cop Morty
line: It doesn’t matter. *helps Rick to his feet* Nothing’s wrong with putting your faith in a Morty. You just gotta pick the right one.

name: Cop Rick
line: Why is there a crib in here?

name: Cop Morty
line: Just somethin’ they do to make you feel bad.

name: Cop Rick
line: Boy, I got us knee-deep in paperwork, huh?

name: Cop Morty
line: Go to the car and grab a MediPack. Lemme worry about this.

name: Cop Rick
line: What happened?

name: Cop Morty
line: Same old story. Mortys killing Mortys.

name: Lizard Morty
line: Almost... got it...

name: Farmer Rick
line: Hey, y'all get the hell away from my damn Megafruit!

name: Farmer Rick
line: Sic 'em, boy! *his robot dog gives chase; the four Mortys tumble down into a river* I don't wear this dangnap hat and commit to this rural character so you can eat for free while you come of age!

name: Fat Morty
line: I bet the Wishing Portal leads to a reality where there... where all... where it's a bunch of French toast with boobies.

name: Lizard Morty
line: I bet it leads to a place where a bunch of fri-- flies everywhere! *Slick feels peevish*

name: Slick
line: Yeah, I bet it goes nowhere. I bet it's a big hole where the Citadel dumps all its broken dreams.

name: Fat Morty
line: Slick, why do ya have to be so dramatic?

name: Slick
line: *stands up* You wanna know why? *lifts his shirt to reveal a large barcode on his abdomen* Because of this! I'm part of an experimental line of Mortys with a trauma implant. How do you think it feels, Fat Morty, to know that no matter where I go, *Glasses Morty comes over to Slick as he sits back down feeling depressed* I'll always be the one that makes everybody sad and... a little bored? *Glasses Morty consoles Slick*

name: Glasses Morty
line: Slick, that implant isn't who you are, okay? You also roll up your sleeves. *they hug each other*

name: Fat Morty
line: I thought I was Left-Handed Morty.

name: Lizard Morty
line: Then you should use your left hand to eat more vegetables.

name: Candidate Morty
line: Hey there. How you doing? Great to meet you. *greets a Plumber Rick*

name: Plumber Rick
line: I'm a plumber, sir! I-I'm a Rick and I'm a plumber!

name: Candidate Morty
line: That doesn't sound like Rick work. You didn't come to the Citadel to be a plumber, did you?

name: Plumber Rick
line: *laughs joyfully* I sure didn't, sir! *a blueshirt Rick carrying a Rick baby comes next to Plumber Rick*

name: Father Rick
line: Mr. Morty, Mr. Morty! *gives his baby Rick to him* I cloned myself so you can kiss me as a baby!

name: Candidate Morty
line: This is just like a Morty baby!

name: Candidate Morty
line: Hey! *they shake hands* Did you end up getting a new job?

name: Campaign Manager Morty
line: Yeah, I did. Assassinating you!

name: Candidate Morty
line: I'm okay... I'm okay... I'm... *falls unconscious* Ohh...

name: Builder Hat Morty
line: You look like you could use a good time! One dance for 10, two for 25!

name: Cop Rick
line: No thank you, and bad math. *see Bearded Morty enjoying Jeans Shorts Morty dancing*

name: Bearded Morty
line: Ha-ha, yeah! This is a good time!

name: Cop Rick
line: What is the place?

name: Cop Morty
line: 'The Creepy Morty'. What is it your kind's always saying? 'Don't think about it.' Come on. There's someone important I want you to meet.

name: Big Morty
line: Ah, Bubblah! How'd it go with the Mortytown Locos?

name: Cop Morty
line: They had a little accident. They won't be causing any trouble anymore.

name: Big Morty
line: Those were bad Mortys. Very bad Mortys. *snaps his finger, Morty Bouncer 2 gives an envelope to Cop Morty*

name: Cop Morty
line: Big Morty likes to contribute to keeping the peace in Mortytown. *takes out a wad of dollar bills* Think of him as a drug lord, and us his cops on his payroll. *throws bills to Cop Rick*

name: Cop Rick
line: Morty...

name: Morty Bouncers/Cop Morty
line: *all said at once* Which Morty?

name: Cop Rick
line: M-m-my partner. Morty, you're right. Mortytown is bad, but that doesn't mean that we have to be. *Cop Morty is shocked*

name: Big Morty
line: Hey, what's goin' on here, Morty?

name: Morty Bouncers
line: *both said at once* Which Morty?

name: Big Morty
line: The cop, morons.

name: Cop Morty
line: *nervously* Don't worry about Rick, Big Morty. He's new. He doesn't understand how it works.

name: Big Morty
line: That's what you said about your last partner. *Cop Rick feels suspicious about this*

name: Cop Morty
line: Wh-why would you say something like that, Big Morty? You're fucking things up for both of us here!

name: Big Morty
line: Wrong. He's fucking things up for both of you. Unless he takes the money. *both Morty Bouncers and Cop Morty stare at Cop Rick sceptically for a beat; Cop Rick turns to Big Morty*

name: Cop Rick
line: Big Morty, you're under arrest. *both Morty Bouncers take out their laser pistols*

name: Cop Morty
line: S-smartest man in the universe.

name: Cowboy Morty
line: *drops his cowboy pistols* They're just props! Th-they're just props!

name: Cop Morty
line: Not so big now, are ya?

name: Big Morty
line: I never was! It was figurative! *Cop Rick aims at Cop Morty*

name: Cop Rick
line: That's enough!

name: Cop Morty
line: If we don't kill him, he'll talk!

name: Cop Rick
line: If you do, I'll talk. *Cowboy Morty talks out to the group by the strip pole*

name: Cowboy Morty
line: One thing's for sure: y-y'all don't have to worry about Cowboy Morty talkin'! This little cowpoke's gonna mosey up on outta here! *walks away, Cop Rick turns to Cop Morty*

name: Cop Rick
line: You told me to put my faith in the right Morty. I got faith in you, partner. Do the right thing. *Cop Morty pauses for a beat, starts crying tears down his face*

name: Cop Morty
line: Oh, Grandpa Rick! I don't wanna be on the Citadel anymore! I want to be a regular kid! I want to go to school and throw balls around and masturbate!

name: Cop Rick 2
line: The hell happened in there?

name: Cop Rick
line: Same old story. Ricks killing Mortys.

name: Negotiator Rick
line: Okay, man, okay! We got your portal gun.

name: Negotiator Rick
line: The hell's he doing? *Rick J-22 first removes the pink tube connecting behind the headgear and throws the headgear off of Simple Rick; he wakes up immediately*

name: Simple Rick
line: Wh-where am I?

name: Rick J-22
line: A bad place, but you're going to a better one soon.

name: SWAT Team Rick 1

name: Purple Suit Rick
line: Stop! *he wears a purple suit with green under shirt and green tie, purple top hat, and carries a gold cane* I'm Rick D. Sanchez III, owner of this here wafer establishment, and I say that the Rick in there is right! He's more Rick than any of you.

name: SWAT Team Rick 2
line: He's a terrorist!

name: Rick D. Sanchez III

name: Rick J-22
line: Rick. And I'm--

name: Rick D. Sanchez III

name: Rick J-22

line: What the hell have we become? *turns to the SWAT Team Ricks* Whatever time you were going to make him serve, he served it. It ends now! *walks up to Rick J-22* Come with me, friend.

name: Rick D. Sanchez III

name: Rick Worker

name: Narrator
line: There's a Rick who held a factory hostage after murdering his boss and several co-workers. The factory made cookies, flavored him with lies.

name: Narrator
line: He made us all take a look at what we were doing, and at the bargain he got a taste of real freedom.

name: Narrator
line: We captured that taste, and we keep giving it to him so he can give it right back to you, in every bite of new Simple Rick Freedom Wafer Selects. *shows wafer displayed on screen* Come home to the unique flavor of shattering the grand illusion. Come home to Simple Rick.

name: Slick

name: Fat Morty

line: Time for Big Boy. Duck!

name: Morty
line: Does he like it?

name: Rick
line: He's a metaphor for capitalism, Morty. What do you think?

name: Rick
line: Yoink!

name: President/Evil Morty
line: You can't outrun your past, Rick.

name: President Morty
line: Tch. Did you think my force field would be down the second time?

name: Rick
line: I was expressing disapproval of your dialogue!

name: President Morty
line: Ahaha! Disapprove all you want. Tonight, the quality of dialogue stops mattering. Tonight, I do that thing I wanna do, with the Curve thing.

name: Loudspeaker System
line: Nobody leave, everybody stay. Nobody leave, everybody stay. Nobody leave, everybody stay...

name: Rick D-716
line: In uncertain times like these, I think it's important for me to say 'eat shit, fuck you!' The drug companies paid for me to say every word, I have millions of dollars, and I don't care--

name: Rick D-716
line: Oh, God! Oh fuck, no! Whoa--

name: Rick D-716
line: And I'd just like to say that prescription drugs are great and you should buy them now.

name: Morty
line: What's happening, Rick?!

name: Rick
line: He hacked the entire city's portal supply. Come on, there still might be one way out of here: out the bottom.

name: Morty
line: What do you think he needed from your brain?

name: Rick
line: I assume schematics for the Citadel's dimensional drive. If he's gonna use it to blow the Curve, we do not wanna be here.

name: Morty
line: What is the Central Finite Curve?

name: Rick
line: Q&A after our survival. Hopefully we can snag some untainted fluid at the source and get the fuck outta here!

name: Rick
line: Or not.

name: Rick
line: Wow. I thought my capitalism metaphor was on the nose.

name: Morty
line: So did you help build the Citadel? Did you just lie to me about everything?

name: Rick
line: Can't you just sneak through the cave base? We turned a new leaf, Morty. We're back to simple adventures.

name: Morty
line: It's not a new leaf until you tell me everything!

name: Rick
line: Morty, we really don't have time for this. The whole place is gonna blow.

name: Morty
line: No, I-I don't trust you. I-I-I don't wanna do this anymore if I'm not gonna get straight answers from you.

name: Rick
line: God damm it! (takes out the brain scanner) Here's my fucking downloaded brain, Morty. You wanna jump the shark? You wanna know my stupid crybaby backstory? Knock yourself out.

name: Rick
line: No-not now!

name: Morty
line: Whoa. Dead wife?

name: Rick
line: Yes. Now everyone can shut up about it.

name: Morty
line: Wow, Rick. I feel a lot better having seen all that.

name: Evil Morty
line: Of course that's the case. In their minds, they're the underdog.

name: Evil Morty
line: And that's how they justify this.

name: Rick
line: Morty, I'm not responsible for every fucked up Rick out there.

name: Evil Morty
line: They literally all say that. They all have that excuse; it's part of their system. None of them have to be responsible, they're all victims of themselves. (sarcastically) 'Oh, it's so hard to be a genius!' Couldn't you just die?

name: Morty
line: Well what are you doin' about it?

name: Evil Morty
line: Jack shit. I'm leaving. Do you know what the Central Finite Curve is? They built a wall around Infinity, separated all the infinite universes from all the infinite universes where he's the smartest man in the universe. Every version of us has spent every version of all of our lives in one infinite crib, built around an infinite fucking baby.

name: Evil Morty
line: And I'm leaving it. That's what makes me ‘evil', being sick of him. If you've ever been sick of him, you've been evil too.

name: Morty
line: Rick, did you really leave the crows for me? Or did you come back because they dumped you?

name: Evil Morty
line: There you go, kid! Now you're Evil Morty too. Sooner or later, we all are, on this side of the Curve.

name: Orange Afro Rick
line: Don't worry, Morty. We still got a way out they never thought of. Operation Phoenix.

name: Orange Afro Morty
line: Doesn't that still mean, like, death?!

name: Orange Afro Rick
line: Sure, but the joke's on them cuz we just found a backdoor to getting off this rock.

name: Female computer voice
line: Rerouted. Rerouted. Rerouted.

name: Female computer voice
line: Rerouted. Rerouted. Rerouted.

name: Morty
line: Oh my fucking God!

name: Rick
line: Come on Morty, we gotta go!

name: Morty
line: Woah!

name: President Morty
line: You can come if you want.

name: President Morty
line: Don't blame me if you don't.

name: Rick
line: Ugh. From where I sit, Morty, that's the best deal on the table. I-I don't have a real plan.

name: Rick
line: Thanks, pal. I-I'm glad you ignored my advice.

name: President Morty
line: It's just as well. I lied. That second seat's a toilet.

name: Morty
line: Oh, super dick move! But weirdly kind of cool to admit it.

name: Rick
line: Geez, you guys really are bred for forgiveness. Let's go.

name: Rick
line: Say goodbye to the Citadel, fellas.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Woo-wee! Evil Morty! That was quite a scheme. Makes me wonder if there's an evil me out there. But I guess, sometimes I look at my life, and I may not even need ‘im. Cause, well, guess I made a pretty big mess of things myself. Ooo-eee.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: I never got my job at the university back. Remember that? Rick made me do karate. It was kinda funny, but I guess things went downhill from there.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Started isolating myself from Amy. Used to tell her everything I was feeling.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: But then I guess I stopped.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Because I wanted her to love who she thought I was, not who I felt myself becoming.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Ever think about how horrified the people we love would be if they found out who we truly are? So we just dig ourselves deeper, into our lies every day, (he walks back over to the stove) ultimately only hurting the people who were brave enough to love us.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Wish I didn't do that!

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: Wish I was brave enough to love them back. I don't know. Maybe you should try it.

name: Mr. Poopybutthole
line: We don't have as much time as we think. Ooo eee.

name: Rick
line: Ugh, guess this is how it ends. I thought I was better than this. Dramatic voiceover while stranded in space? I-I guess when you're dying, the first thing to go is your creativity. Citadel's gone, and-and the saucer we escaped in is out of power.

name: Alternate Morty
line: Oh man, I'm so scared in here ...

name: Rick
line: The extra Mortys went feral--

name: Alternate Morty
line: Gahhhh!

name: Rick
line: (cont'd) --Eh, some problems solve themselves. Been drinking a lot--Morty! I told you to write this down! I-I don't have a helmet like that Avengers guy did!--been drinking a lot of my piss. Portal Gun's still broken.

name: Morty
line: (interrupting) Guess that was all part of Evil Morty's plan.

name: Rick
line: 'Evil Morty'. Can we stop flattering this guy? His plan was to monologue and fuck off! He basically threw a tantrum to announce he was quitting Twitter!

name: Morty
line: Nobody quits Twitter. (pauses) Hey, remember, like a second ago, when you pretended to not know who Iron Man was. Who was that for?

name: Rick
line: Shh, shh, shush, Morty. This is how we go. Bear it with grace. (addressing cybernetics) Spinal cord, Robitussin as a base, then surprise me. (groans)

name: Morty
line: Mom!

name: Rick
line: Beth, maybe!

name: Rick
line: Is she trying to say something? (yells) We-we can't hear you! How dumb are... Beth, you're in a vacuum! Sound travels on air! Why am I yelling?

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) Is this a private party Or can anyone join?

name: Morty
line: (rolls eyes) Wow, great.

name: Rick
line: (obvious distaste) Yeah, that's... Wow, really worth it. That was not worth it! It's corny! (gestures) You! Corn! Dying of starvation here!

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) When I decided to say it, I didn't know it would be...

name: Morty
line: Oh, my God. Stop explaining. (yells) Stop explaining!

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) ... subjected to this scrutiny.

name: Rick
line: Are you finished? (pauses, exasperated) She's not finished.

name: Space Beth
line: (in text) Maybe I won't rescue you.

name: Rick
line: Oh, real mature!

name: Morty
line: Oh, nice.

name: Rick
line: R-real classy.

name: Rick
line: (reassuringly) It was a good line, honey.

name: Space Beth
line: (with disdain) I didn't need it to be. I don't care what you think.

name: Home Beth
line: (relieved) Oh my god, she found you. Here, eat. Eat.

name: Morty
line: Oh hell yes!

name: Rick
line: Hold on, buddy. Our systems could go into shock from solid food. (addressing robot which rolls out from the garage) Digestibot, convert to nutrient mass.

name: Rick
line: I'm just gonna risk it.

name: Home Beth
line: Since when do you guys get stranded? (turns to Space Beth) Thank you, by the way.

name: Space Beth
line: Almost left them out there.

name: Rick
line: Portal travel's broken. Mmm. Are these heirloom tomatoes? Digestibot, try these.

name: Digestibot
line: Yum. Yum.

name: Home Beth
line: So you can't hop realities anymore? Does that mean you'll finally have to wash your robe?

name: Rick
line: Good point. They need to reboot the Portal Index immediately.

name: Rick
line: Basically just a hard reset on the fluid. Hold tight, the Earth's gonna shake a bit.

name: Space Beth
line: Uhh ...

name: Home Beth
line: Oh!

name: Rick
line: (claps a hand to his forehead) Oh, shit.

name: Morty
line: (looks at his flashing hands) Wait, what? What's happening?

name: Rick
line: Instead of resetting portal travel, I may have reset portal travellers. Too late to apologise.

name: Jerry
line: Rick, why am I pulsing green? And don't say you don't know, because you're pulsing green.

name: Morty
line: (worried) Rick, are we about to die?

name: Rick
line: (annoyed) No, we're about to vanish from this reality.

name: Jerry
line: That's totally dying!

name: Rick
line: No it isn't! It's everyone from this reality returning to their reality of origin.

name: Morty
line: Back to our original universes!

name: Rick
line: I explained it fine, Morty. You're spoonfeeding spoons. Where is Summer?

name: Summer
line: Oh nice, you guys are back. Whoa.

name: Rick
line: (urgently) Summer, three of us are one-way blind-hopping. You gotta help us get back. There's a protocol for this in your chores server, filename 'booger-aids'.

name: Summer
line: Every file is 'booger-aids'!

name: Rick
line: I--I hate naming things! Just search for words like 'one-way blind-hop, reset map beacon'.

name: Jerry
line: (terrified) Why do I have a reality of origin?

name: Rick
line: There's no time to explain, Jerry. Counting on you, Summer! One-way blind-hop beacon protocol. (raises arms in excitement) Here we gooooo!

name: Jerry
line: So there was time to explain.

name: Rick
line: Don't waste extra precious seconds with your pettiness, Jerry! (to Summer) Summer, let's run down--

name: Summer
line: One-way blind-hop reset beacon, 'booger-aids'.

name: Rick
line: (surprised) Cool. Wow.

name: Jerry
line: (outraged) There was so much time to explain!

name: Rick
line: Yes, fine! Hindsight is 20-20. Who has ever taken this long to vanish?

name: Jerry
line: How did I end up not in my own universe? (realises) Oh, my god. The Jerryboree.

name: Rick and Morty
line: (deadpan) Oh, the Jerryboree!

name: Rick
line: (mockingly) Deep cut.

name: Home Beth
line: Wait, but where's our real dad and our real Morty?

name: Summer
line: (cuts in) Buried in the backyard.

name: Home Beth
line: That's what the possums are after.

name: Space Beth
line: Dad's got you in the family business too, huh?

name: Summer
line: Yeah, Morty's an easy mark, but Rick pays me in things like ...

name: Summer
line: (cont'd) Wolverine claws.

name: Space Beth
line: Well, looks like you got this. See you guys in another--two years?

name: Summer
line: Or you could stick around for this one? Looks like it involves Grandpa's grotty citadel. (pleading) We could, you know, break things, loot stuff.

name: Space Beth
line: (hesitates) I should ... probably get back to ... saving the galaxy.

name: Summer
line: Please?

name: Space Beth
line: (gives in) Guess I could loot some stuff. Fine. Yeah. Okay. Let's make it quick.

name: Home Beth
line: (feigns excitement) Awesome, I've never been. Let's do this. Okay. Adventure family. Woo! (laughs)

name: Summer
line: Uhh ... Okay!

name: Rick
line: Fuck.

name: Rick Prime
line: (offended) Excuse me? Bro, Ricks don't pass on this.

name: Voice
line: Rick, is that you?

name: Rick
line: (defeated) Yeah, Diane.

name: Diane
line: You've been gone so long. (passive-aggressively) Did you find our daughter's killer?

name: Rick
line: Not yet, sorry. Still looking.

name: Diane
line: You'll find him. You always do everything you set your mind to, except keep your family alive. But that was hardly your fault.

name: Rick
line: (ashamed, to the AI) Mute.

name: Diane
line: (distorted) If I could be muted, I wouldn't be too-too-too good at haunting you, would I, you dirty bear?

name: Rick
line: Yeah. I forgot I wanted to be haunted.

name: Diane
line: I guess you predicted you might. That's where haunting comes in handy, huh?

name: Rick
line: Very good point, sugar.

name: Morty
line: Rick?

name: Morty
line: Hello? Original family? Sorry about last time. Rick, he was in space prison. We couldn't just--hello?

name: Morty
line: Aaaah!

name: Morty
line: (disgusted) Aw, geez.

name: Morty
line: Ah!

name: Morty
line: (aroused) Oh!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Agh! Ah, fuck! Dammit Morty, there's no doctors anymore.

name: Morty
line: (in disbelief) Dad!?

name: Home Beth
line: Figures it's underwhelming, the one time I visit.

name: Summer
line: Yeah, sorry, usually, there's cowboy Rick and Mortys and stuff.

name: Home Beth
line: Looks like they could use a couple repairmen Ricks and Mortys, right?

name: Summer
line: Oh, tight! Little scavenger dudes. If they shoot at us, I'm allowed to ...

name: Summer
line: (cont'd) do this. Shit, yeah.

name: Summer
line: Space Mom, get in on this!

name: Summer
line: Cool Mom.

name: Space Beth
line: Let's keep it moving. I don't have all day.

name: Home Beth
line: I got it! I got it. (to the straggler) Sorry! Sorry! I got it. Sorry!

name: Home Beth
line: (awkwardly) I was ... gonna do it ...

name: Summer
line: (to Space Beth, mockingly) Ugh, terrestrials, am I right?

name: Diane
line: I kept up the search in your absence. You want a new list of potential locations?

name: Rick
line: You're always just one room away, huh?

name: Diane
line: Yeah. Remember, if you thought you could see or touch me, it might give you a level of (distorted) com-com-comfort.

name: Rick
line: Right, can't have that. Come on, Summer.

name: Diane
line: Who's Summer? Should I be jealous? I hope (distorted) Summer knows what happens to the people you love!

name: Old Man
line: Hey, Rick!

name: Rick
line: Hey, Mr Goldmanbachmajorian. S-still alive, huh? What's up?

name: Mr. GBM
line: I was hoping you could help me make sense of a note I found this morning? It's written by someone claiming to be me. They say my mind is 'held captive in a time loop, trapped in the day of a traumatic event by the agony of a formidable intelligence, but also that my captor forgot about aging, that my body spoils and yearns for death while my soul remains stuck in place, caught like a fly in amber.'

name: Rick
line: (with guilt) Right. I used to drink drink. (turns to Mr. GBM) Uhh ... no clue pal.

name: Mr. GBM
line: That's okay. I found other notes in the trash just like it. Poor weirdo. I pity them. Wish they could let go and move on.

name: Rick
line: Sounds healthy.

name: Mr. GBM
line: Sure would be!

name: Mr. GBM
line: Aaah, sweet death!

name: Diane
line: Was that symbolic? Are you letting go? I understand, baby. I forgive you!

name: Rick
line: (cuts in from inside the cruiser, furious) You don't get to say that, you're not her! You're a thing I built to torture myself. (aside) This whole fucking timeline is cursed. I gotta get out of here.

name: Diane
line: Because you want to move on.

name: Rick
line: Because I don't! And (burps) I have to. I came back on accident. The guy I'm looking for, he's... he's not findable, Diane. I live with a version of Beth now.

name: Diane
line: Sounds like a version of nice.

name: Rick
line: We have grandkids. That's who Summer is. She's going to get me out of here. (looks towards the empty doorway) She reminds me of you.

name: Diane
line: Oh really? Is she dead too?

name: Rick
line: (ignores her, despondent) Bye, Diane.

name: Diane
line: You're not honestly going to fly into that rift without coordinates, are you? Don't give up on us, Rick. I don't make the rules. Haunters gonna haunt.

name: Diane
line: Baby, are you killing yourself?

name: Rick
line: I'm more embracing the win-win of risking my life.

name: Morty
line: Where's Mom and Summer?

name: Jerry Prime
line: Oh, they're gone. Sorry, Morty.

name: Morty
line: Gone gone?

name: Jerry Prime
line: We spent a long time in that ice. A gentle mutant licked us out, but Beth got sick and Summer... didn't thaw right.

name: Jerry Prime
line: With no one left to blame, I finally had to deal with myself. Buried my grief at Barnes & Noble. 'Four Agreements', 'Eat Pray Love', Frank Miller's 'The Dark Knight Returns'. Learned to accept things for what they are.

name: Jerry Prime
line: In a few of these, the whole brain is still intact. Makes you wonder if some people were still in there, (cuts open the brain using a cleaver) just trapped in the horror. Anyway, it's awesome protein.

name: Morty
line: I'm so sorry, Dad. But my real, original Dad beat the apocalypse. I-I-I guess we all underestimated you. Hey, w-what's that game we always try to play as a family, y--the one we never finished?

name: Jerry Prime
line: Downbeat.

name: Morty
line: Yes! Let's play Downbeat. I-I bet I can find it! We can finish now!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Yeah, you should totally do that.

name: Morty
line: Hey, yeah, cool, I-I got it! We'll play Downbeat and we'll-we'll camp here tonight and then rebuild the house. (Starts carrying the box out of the room and downstairs) You know, we got food, fresh water, and we've got family.

name: Morty
line: The fuck? (drops the game and runs over to read the note on the sofa)

name: Jerry Prime
line: (written) Morty. I wrote this note in advance in case you're wondering how I left so fast. My plan is to wait for you to turn your back, them I'm going to grab all your shit and split. Depending on how long you were out of the room, you'll probably be thinking I can't be that far away and you'll want to foll--

name: Jerry Prime
line: (written) Morty, wrote this fast 'cause had to set trap. Thought you'd have cooler shit. See other note. Bye.

name: Morty
line: Motherfu--

name: Morty
line: (offscreen) Whoa, whoa! Slow down! Slow down!

name: Morty
line: Not cool! Oh!

name: Morty
line: What the hell, Dad?

name: Jerry Prime
line: Don't take it personal, Morty. That's one of the Four Agreements. I don't remember the other three, but I know Commissioner Gordon was cool with Batman moving on.

name: Morty
line: Batman doesn't abandon people!

name: Jerry Prime
line: You abandoned us.

name: Morty
line: I deserve that. But, you know, it... it improved you.

name: Jerry Prime
line: Oh, am I cool enough for you now? Well, that was easy, it only cost me fucking everything!

name: Morty
line: Whoa, hey, I-I--

name: Jerry Prime
line: You came back and talked about us like we weren't people, Morty! Then you bailed and left us to freeze!

name: Morty
line: I-I was apologizing for that earlier--

name: Jerry Prime
line: Your mom and sister died, Morty! (sighs) And I moved on. From caring. And that is the best deal you will ever get. So take it.

name: Morty
line: Please don't go! I-if Rick comes back, we ca-we can find you a new reality. A new Mom, a new Summer, a... job!

name: Jerry Prime
line: Oh, you don't get it, kid. Except for this conversation, my life is perfect. Rick was always right. (starts to leave) Everyone needs to let go.

name: Morty
line: Aww, you came back. I guess we really did form a bond.

name: Morty
line: Ow! Hey, stop it! Get away from me! (The Cronenberg roars and chases Morty.) No! Help!

name: Summer
line: Alright, pin dropped, Grandpa!

name: Summer
line: Come and get us.

name: Rick
line: Come on, come on, come on!

name: Diane
line: Baby? Something to keep in mind--if you were pulled home by whatever happened, it's likely our target was, as well. It's also likely he's having as much trouble leaving as you are.

name: Rick
line: He's trapped.

name: Summer
line: Grandpa!

name: Rick
line: Oh, fuck yes!

name: Summer
line: Grandpa--Grandpa?

name: Rick
line: Summer! Gold star, always believed in you. N-now the hard part.

name: Summer
line: Hard part?

name: Rick
line: Way worse things than me can see that beacon, too. Hunker down and protect it while I grab Morty. Rick out! Try to survive!

name: Summer
line: Oh, shit. (The space monsters start heading toward them) Domestic Mom should hide, maybe?

name: Home Beth
line: 'Domestic Mom?'

name: Summer
line: I mean, she's the cool space one.

name: Space Beth
line: Look, I'm not looking to get caught in whatever this is. You guys can both hide maybe, hash it out.

name: Home Beth
line: Oh, quit talking down. I'm you with the patience to do laundry.

name: Summer
line: Mom, stop being jealous of our bond!

name: Home Beth
line: She ran from our choices. I have to parent them.

name: Space Beth
line: It's not like I didn't care. That's what the clone was for. Aah!

name: Summer
line: Moms!

name: Rick
line: Morty!

name: Morty
line: Rick? I knew it! I knew you wouldn't leave me!

name: Morty
line: Ow! The fuck?

name: Rick
line: Morty, did you see another Rick here? Nondescript haircut, sci-fi jacket? (The device on his wrist displays a holographic map of the universe) Eh, of course you didn't see him, you'd be dead. Or you'd be a bomb. Do you feel bomby? Nah, you woulda blown up by now.

name: Morty
line: Wasn't the Rick here dead? Th-th-that's why you pick places, right?

name: Rick
line: Uh, well, your Rick, uh, yeah, not dead, more like, not around. When I met you, I was sorta hoping he might turn up one day--(a location of the holographic map starts to beep) You son of a bitch! I got you!

name: Morty
line: W-w-where are we going?

name: Rick
line: To kill your grandpa, little buddy.

name: Morty
line: Wait, what?

name: Morty
line: I don't understand. My original Rick killed your family? And you were just waiting for him to come back?

name: Rick
line: Seems like you understand fine, Morty. That was A+ re-piping. (Space Cruiser stops) We're here.

name: Rick
line: This guy, Morty, he hates being found but loves building elaborate shit. Like-like-like playing a ton of Minecraft but all on a private server.

name: Morty
line: Am I in a fucking K-hole right now? What is going on?

name: Rick Prime
line: (on a pre-recorded video displayed on a hologram projection) Whoa-ho-ho, you found me!

name: Rick Prime
line: I shoot the first monitor, too. Listen, I'm not here. Or am I?

name: Rick Prime
line: There's the clone you found! Or maybe it's me, all naked! Just a lil' Keyser Soze. I mean, why would I admit it's not?

name: Rick Prime
line: Oh-hoho, yeah! Look at him! Look at him go! Look at him dance! O-or me. Again, it might be me, like a 'Saw' thing. I'm very sneaky. Here's a bunch of killbots to deal with while ya wrestle with that.

name: Rick Prime
line: Obviously, I don't know who I'm talking to here.

name: Rick Prime
line: It's all prerecorded.

name: Rick Prime
line: But if you got this far, you probably think you're real special. Tell you what...

name: Rick Prime
line: Oop! There he goes! Maybe that actually was me! If you follow him down there, we can do a big fight. Fifty percent chance I'm not lying.

name: Space Beth
line: (through the communication device in the Space Cruiser) We're in trouble, asshole! I shouldn't have to beg.

name: Morty
line: Wait, my moms are in trouble?

name: Rick
line: Those versions of them are.

name: Morty
line: W-we gotta save them! Rick, this is an obvious trap. If you go down there he's just gonna kill you.

name: Rick
line: Good!

name: Morty
line: What? (Gets out of the cruiser)

name: Rick
line: Now what?

name: Morty
line: If you don't care if you die, why do you care if I die?

name: Rick
line: Knock it off! Get out of here! You did this last season! You're like a suicide bomber!

name: Morty
line: Takes one to know one.

name: Rick
line: Yeah, well, you get it from him, not me.

name: Morty
line: I don't know him. You're my grandpa, Rick. Rick and Morty. A hundred years.

name: Rick Prime
line: This place totally might go up, by the way. Here's a bunch of countdowns. One of them's probably accurate.

name: Space Beth
line: Ah, fucking stupid 5th-dimensional stomach juices.

name: Home Beth
line: Sorry for the sitcom fight, and maybe getting us digested.

name: Space Beth
line: You've got incredible timing.

name: Home Beth
line: Oh, don't be a bitch. I'm parenting. Makes sense you don't recognize it. You've been out of practice for a while.

name: Space Beth
line: Good! I'm glad that they have you! I don't want to be 'Space Mom.'

name: Home Beth
line: You've made that clear. Just don't let Summer mistake your rejection of her for good taste.

name: Space Beth
line: I'm not trying to. It's all her!

name: Summer
